Poirot__line_9: You take the old musty smelling pom-pom from Sebastian and feel...something. Within a few moments of holding it the thing glows and jerks away from your hands.
Poirot__line_11: Poirot := Yeah Corporeality, it’s so nice to be!
Poirot__line_13: A ghostly elf woman appears before you, her movements somehow coordinated and clumsy at the same time. Before you can do much of anything else she plants a wet, slimy, ectoplasm laced kiss right on your face.
Poirot__line_15: Poirot := Mwah! Thanks for giving me a chance coach!
Poirot__line_23: Poirot := I’m Poirot! Cheerleader extraordinaire, best performer in the land of the living or the dead! I’m limber, luminescent, and lively!
Poirot__line_27: Poirot := That doesn’t start with an L silly!
Poirot__line_29: <PLAYERNAME> := So what’s going on here exactly!
Poirot__line_31: Poirot := So like, I died a long time ago, but when a person who’s alive touches my pom-pom I get to live-live again-again.
Poirot__line_33: <PLAYERNAME> := Huh, so what’re you planning on doing?
Poirot__line_35: Poirot := See the sights, eat the food, have fun in that cute town with all its cute people, maybe starting with you!
Poirot__line_46: Poirot:= Okay! I’ll be hanging around your attic if you ever want to play!
Poirot__line_47: The ghostly cheerleader starts drifting off, humming some archaic music to herself.
Poirot__line_52: You approach the aerial acrobat and clear your throat.
Poirot__line_53: Poirot := Oh hey, ready for a roll in the hay?
Poirot__line_72: Poirot := Ok, so like, a long long LONG time ago? Back when my head was on my shoulders and I had skin and bones and tendons and blood and-
Poirot__line_74: <PLAYERNAME> := When you were alive, got it.
Poirot__line_76: Poirot := Yeah! When I was alive I was at this big game. Biggest of the year! A match up between the High Sky Howlers and the Green Grudge Gobblers.
Poirot__line_77: Poirot := Real intense rivalry but nothing compared to what the cheer squads had! You shoulda seen it. The flips, twists, spins, fluttering, bouncing, shaking, undulating and-
Poirot__line_79: <PLAYERNAME> := Super awesome and sexy moves, got it.
Poirot__line_81: Poirot:= Yeah! WAY awesome and sexy. Everything was going great, I pulled off the hardest move in tumbling EVER. The Triple Double Triple With A Half Twist And A Shimy!
Poirot__line_82: Poirot := Honestly I coulda like, died, just from attempting it. It was the best die of my life!
Poirot__line_86: Poirot:= Oh! Oh right, yeah I totally died the same day.
Poirot__line_88: <PLAYERNAME> := How?! I thought you landed your move.
Poirot__line_90: Poirot := I did! But when I landed, I landed right in the middle of the field. In the middle of the game. I even caught the ball!
Poirot__line_91: Poirot := Thinking on it I probably shoulda dropped it and ran but I was so excited and happy I just started hopping up and down.
Poirot__line_92: Poirot := Then the next thing I knew everyone was upside down! I got tackled by a Yeti and Ogre at the same time and everything faded to black and then…poof! Ghost girl! I think I remember some sparkly wings too but that might just have been my imagination.
Poirot__line_96: Poirot := Aw, don’t pout! Turn that frown upside down! I got to meet an awesome cutie like you because of it.
Poirot__line_97: Poirot := Gimme an H! Gimme a A! Gimme a P-P-Y! What’s that spell!? No, seriously what’s that spell again...?
Poirot__line_113: It doesn’t take long for the two of you to reach your room, once there you don’t so much take off your clothes as Poirot pulls them through your body. It’s a strange sensation but not a painful one.
Poirot__line_114: Her ghostly fingers leave trails of tingling across your skin and when you hold her there’s a solid weight to her that defies all known laws of physics.
Poirot__line_115: She plants her pussy on your face, you have no objections. Her sex tastes of citrus and sugar, even as you set to sliding your tongue against her folds you can feel her passing her head back to your hands.
Poirot__line_116: You’d expect the living dead to be cold but the lips that wrap around your shaft are hot, warmed by some strange otherworldly heat.
Poirot__line_117: The moments bleed into one another, sweat pours down your body, extoplasm hers. You can taste it in your mouth and feel hers teasing over your shaft, lips and tongue tracing over the contours of your hot, throbbing rod.
Poirot__line_118: Perhaps its willpower on your part, perhaps some spell of hers but you manage to keep from blowing your load even as she coats your face in hot, glowing, ghost goo.
Poirot__line_119: All good things come to an end however and eventually you finally fill her mouth with essence of <PLAYERNAME>. She rests her rump on your chest and you spend a moment or two toying with her hair as you enjoy the afterglow.
Poirot__line_121: It doesn’t take long for the two of you to reach your room, once there you don’t so much take off your clothes as Poirot pulls them through your body. It’s a strange sensation but not a painful one.
Poirot__line_122: Her ghostly fingers leave trails of tingling across your skin and when you hold her there’s a solid weight to her that defies all known laws of physics.
Poirot__line_123: Speaking of physics, the two of you flop onto the bed. At some point Poirot’s head detached from her body and becomes your own personal cushion.
Poirot__line_124: You can feel her tongue tracing the contours of your pussy and settle down to make it easier for her.
Poirot__line_125: Somehow Poirot’s head manages to maintain its position and even push forward for better access despite lacking any readily apparent forms of locomotion.
Poirot__line_126: Her body has, in the meantime, repositioned itself neck down, ass up, all ready to show you her muff. Absent her shorts, that electric blue button is ready for pressing.
Poirot__line_127: You push forward, thumbs pulling her outer lips aside and trace your tongue around her outer folds. She tastes like citrus and sweetness and you’re only too eager to taste her some more.
Poirot__line_128: You tug on her hips, pull her closer and dive deeper. The two of you exchange cunning lingual techniques for what feels like hours on end, hot bursts fluid raining down onto your bed as you while the hours away.
Poirot__line_129: Eventually however even your sun beaten body succumbs to fatigue and falls to the mattress.
Lucia Cistern Dialogue__line_27: Inside the cistern, Lucia is nowhere to be seen. However, a full-size cardboard cutout stands in her place. A note attached to the cutout gives instruction:
Lucia Cistern Dialogue__line_29: Lucia := Hey there <PLAYERNAME>! Okay then, just check out this chart here.
Lucia Cistern Dialogue__line_37: Lucia := This mock up represents your farm, we'll be using these little doodads to represent the stuff you want to build.
Lucia Cistern Dialogue__line_38: Lucia := Now you can drag the things you want to build to the locations you want to build them!
Lucia Cistern Dialogue__line_40: Lucia := Just point me at any of the little doodads here at the top if you want to know what they are, and what they'll cost!
Lucia Cistern Dialogue__line_42: Lucia := Then when you've made your choice, drag it down to the place you want to build it!
Lucia Cistern Dialogue__line_43: Lucia := Oh yeah, I almost forgot, some things can only be built in certain places. Keep an eye out for the special stuff and keep it in mind.
Lucia Cistern Dialogue__line_47: Inside the cistern, Lucia is nowhere to be seen. However, a full-size cardboard cutout stands in her place.
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[3]._stepC: The weather is very clear outside, but I am being stuck in here making cosmopolitans and martinis all day!
I am missing clear days outside, without having care in world. Now I am having to tend bar for a ridiculously stacked, masked woman, Camellia!
I am not loving or hating days like this. Weather is having little meaning when spending all of time in The Monarch.
Is No-goodnik {0} looking for drink? I am recommending warm glass of milk. Chii-chii-chii!
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[4]._stepC: Rain is perfect day for drinking and gambling. If only I was doing either…
I am always feeling very energetic on rainy days. Ever since I was little malyshka.
If I was having more choice in how I am spending day, I would be relaxing on balcony with strong spirits.
You are farmer, so why are you not moving to place where rain is constant? It would be making life easier.
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[5]._stepC: It is so windy today, that drunk could lean into wind and stay standing, Chii-chii!
Windy day is so meddlesome. I can hardly be keeping pipe lit when going out to smoke.
At least wind is blowing stale air out of inn. Too many customers are in need of bath!
Augh! I am hating when leaves are falling between chitin plates!
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[6]._stepC: Yes, yes, the lighting and thundering is very loud.
Agh! I am having hangover from last night, and thunder is NOT VERY HELPING!
Gehman is not having much fondness for storm, but I am remembering he enjoys watching the lighting.
Rotund cooking man, Thrund, he is being very startled by thunder, chii-chii!
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[7]._stepC: This weather is so cold, is making my chitin chatter when I go outside!
I suppose I should be thanking you. I much rather spend days like this in inn, than union cell.
Today is being rather chilly. Why don’t you buy cloverton’s favorite bartender drink?
I am using fresh snow for ice in drinks. It is Sascha Sasorikova Snow Special! Classy, no?
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[8]._stepC: I am very much enjoying hot weather. If only I could be enjoying cold drink and smoke while lounging on rock.
On hot days like this, Gehman and I would be laying out on comfy rock, and be soaking in sunrays.
Chii-chii-chii! I am not understanding why everyone is disliking hot weather so much. I am feeling the perfect comfort right now~
Very big, round man, Thrund is not understanding. Tall Island Ice Tea is not containing tea…
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[10]._step: Warm weather is making ideal environment for cool drinks. I have been raking in tips from left and from right!
Weather is so warm, if I were not working, I’d take nice long nap.
Gehman must be feeling much better about the weather. He always does like the summer.
I am hoping I can be convincing big hipped Camellia to let me enjoy sangria on break.
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[11]._step: Sometimes, on break, I am wishing to just dive under pile of leaves… What, I can enjoy the whimsy too!
With weather beginning to cool off, I should start concocting recipes of mulled wine.
It is making me very glad to see days get shorter. I am preferring company of moon.
I am preferring summer and fall most, so I am enjoying last few days of good weather.
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[12]._step: Gehman is so lazy in winter. I will have to be asking big man Thrund to make warm soup to take to him later.
The only benefit that cold months is having, is hot spiced drinks to be drinking by fire!
I am having difficult time getting out of bed lately. If only overly breasted Camellia would be opening bar in afternoon. I could be sleeping in.
I would be killing for hot, spiced nog with whisky… In way that is not condoning violence or anger issues!
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[13]._step: People are saying they are missing winter, but I am saying -bleh- to it! At least now my chitin is not clattering.
Perhaps I will go picking herbs for cocktails… Only so that I am not serving disgusting drinks. I am just having reputation to uphold now.
Back when we were very impressive mercenaries, we would be taking break from winter till spring. I am missing much needed vacation!
I am inventing new cocktail. How would you be liking daffodil mojito?
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[15]._step: Everyone but the regulars is out at market today. I am earning less tips because of fat breasted rotisseurs, and muscular, mysterious greentumbs!
It is maybe for best that market is today. I have splitting headache, and all of the sound is outside of inn.
You are farmer, why are you not setting up stall or something? Too worried to sell your fruits? Chii-chii!
*So* mysterious Camelia says inn gets busy on market day evenings, but I have been seeing much busier inns before.
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[16]._step: I am just enjoying when Brownie caravans come into town. They are so cute could you not just be kicking them?
There is brownie caravan coming in town today, da? I would be loving to sample some of starshine.
I am begging fat mammeried Camellia, why are we keeping inn open when everyone is stuffing face and drinking golden booze at brownie bizarre?!
I am almost thinking of asking mysterious, one-eyed Morgan is she will sneak me some Starshine… Do not be telling anyone I have said this or I will be gutting you!
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[18]._step: I wouldn’t be minding going on date today. As long as they were willing to pay my bar tab and not tell big, overly critical Sieger how much I drank!
I am very glad I am getting essential worker voucher for Matchmaking Day. I am not looking for useless dolts to try impressing me…I am getting enough of that at my job already!

I know what you are thinking. How can you be asking *very* beautiful Sascha Sasorikova out on date for matchmaking day? Well you can not, but you are welcome to leave gifts of booze and flowers at my door like the others!
During matchmaking days of yesteryear, Gehman and I would buy all of chocolate at market, and resell at exorbitant markup! I am missing look on their faces, Chii-chii-chiiii!
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[20]._step: There are so many thistles and meddlesome thorns in side today. They are like… meddlesome thorns in sides!
Everyone is say so important couple in town square is offering difficult challenge, but if Gehman and I were to be competing, it would be like walk on cake!
Everything is blooming and green today. It is giving me headache looking out window of room.
Are you going to be trying challenge from strange couple in town square? Do not be failing, or you will be making further mockery of Gehman and I!
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[21]._step: Ah, I am loving Provisioning Day, and not just because kind hearted Camellia has gifted me small, expensive bottle of rum!
It is so cold outside, but fire is warm and the eggnog is spiked, so I am feeling content. Happy Provisioning Day, No-goodnik {0}!
Provisioning Day is one holiday that I am enjoying in Central Kingdom. All of your other holidays are… very confusing…
Happy Provisioning Day, No-goodnik {0}. If you are thinking of giving me provisions, then you can start with some good booze, chii-chii-chii!
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[22]._step: I can not tell if you people are celebrating today, or running in fear! Pick one!
I am not enjoying today. All I know, is that first ghost that is asking me for drink is getting glassed…
If day like this was occurring back in old country, we would be drinking more and shutting windows till the morning.
I remember my first Hallowed Haunt. Well, I am remembering part before I was drinking myself stupid to forget it.
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[25]._step: I am not saying what we were doing was good, but I am not understanding how what Jerikan is doing in town today is any different…
Very big and important Jerikan is in town again. He is not so confident when caught unaware in Frontier… Perhaps I am oversharing though, chii-chii!
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[26]._step: Valpongis is in town? He is always good salesman. I bought one of my favorite whips from him, twice!
Valpongis is selling many wares, but I am never sure where he is getting some of his items… Maybe he is not so honest a salesman after all.
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[27]._step: That little mole woman, Digger, is setting up shop in the middle of town. At least, I think she’s a mole, from when I was seeing her in Savannah…
I am hearing petit, miner Digger is in town today. Let’s hope Gehman is not bothering her with discussions of favorite grades of steel, chii-chii!
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[28]._step: Those rotisseurs think they are so nice, with the big chests and the delicious foods… Maybe if they were selling food for cheaper, I would actually be getting lunch there today.
Gehman is always wantting to eat at rotisseurs when they are in town, but all I am thinking is how they can cook when huge tits are in the way!
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[29]._step: I know The Union hires almost anyone, but I didn’t think that they would hire mummies to sell crops in towns.
I am onto strange mummy men Greenthumbs.Why would they be selling crops if it were not ploy for something greater?
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[30]._step: Very self-important twink Skandr is in town. Do not be so hasty to trust him, I am knowing covetous look in eyes when I am seeing it.
Vodan is very motherly woman, but I am not trusting someone who is cavorting with Skandr. But who is asking Sascha? No one.
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[31]._step: When I am looking at kleptomaniac tinkerer Rekk, I am thinking of Gehman. This is getting out of hand, now there are two of them!
Everyone is so impressed with scrap collecting Rekk, but Gehman could be doing much more with much less than him!
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[36]._step: Tell me, no-goodnik. I am hearing you bested homunculi Kelpie hoard that was besieging Union outpost? It is wonder how Union gets anything done without meddling from you~!
Look at you, very big, very powerful frontiserman. Defeating the kelpies and the poachers… Just for you I offer special - Twice the price on cocktails, and you can be looking at beautiful barmaid!

When Pr- Gehman and I were doing very vague and undescribed operation in Savannah, we did not enjoy tangling with disgusting goo creatures. In fact, we were hoping Kelpie would slow Union down, but you are surprising in most bothersome ways.

Sadly, I must be thanking you for taking care of Kelpies in Savannah. Before you did, Gehman would be waking me up in middle of night to check for Kelpies on way to outhouse. Now I am hearing he is bothering little mechanic woman, chii-chii!
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[37]._step: I am getting occasional patron coming in and talking about how you vanquished big scary poachers. Imagine look on their faces when I tell them it’s *me* they’re talking about, chii-chii!
People are asking me, am I very deadly, very beautiful mercenary that no-goodnik farmer fought and barely bested? And, I am telling them, unfortunately yes…
Didn’t you get kidnapped? How am I still hearing people talking about how you arrested us on those savannah islands?
I should be insulted everyone is asking if I was poacher you brought in, but at least it is bringing in good tips…
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[38]._step: I have been hearing rumors of ruthless huntsman Rook when I did mercenary work. To know he was working for our employer is making me very glad that you dealt with him.
I am remembering rumors that Rook could shoot microplankton at one thousand paces… Perhaps we did not stand as much of a chance against you as we thought…
Look at you, venturing into forests and taking on very big time mercenaries… Perhaps you are not simply just simple, shovel-using farmer after all…
I should be very glad that you took down rook. Now Gehman and I are not only mercenaries that you have defeated.
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[39]._step: I am hearing rumors that you defeated a dullahan? Wow… I am not thinking I can complain much about you beating us now…
I hear that dullahan you defeated is related to you looking for our employer… I am beginning to think we were bottom of rung in organization…
You are big hotshot frontiersman now, da? If you are fighting dullahans, then perhaps our employer is more dangerous than I thought. Wait until Gehman is hearing about this.
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[40]._step: Well, you are taking down big man V, and he was Vaskin Robbins? Who would be thinking man of ice cream was cold blooded killer?
Horosho, no-goodnik {0}! Horosho! With mysterious employer Vaskin gone, now I can be worrying less about looking over shoulder at night.
You know, very reasonable and popular {0}. You should sit here at bar and let people buy you plenty of drinks for taking down big criminal, Vaskin. Be sure to tell them to tip me too!
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[43]._step: You know, I did not know if I would be enjoying work as bartender, but it turns out I have goot taste in cocktails, and I am not bad at the making of them either.
When I started bartending here, I told myself that I would not be sucking up to people just for tips, but it seems like people are liking when I scowl at them?
Once I am done with my sentence, I have been wondering what I will do next. Who is knowing, maybe I will keep bartending. Imagine that, chii-chii!
It is good thing that massive bosomed Camellia hired me as bartender. I have been showing her cocktails even she did not know!
Sometimes, I am missing former job as mercenary. I would travel Frontier, making my fortune with skill and daring… But, I am supposing those days are behind me, probably for better.
Back in day, I remember time when Gehman and I were nearly broke. It was only because of job guarding local lord, that we made some money. Mostly by stealing from him, chii-chii!
I was once well known mercenary on Frontier. I remember time when town hired us to take on local monster rampaging through town. Turns out, it was man in suit, trying to protect gold mine!
I used to know lots of big time mercenaries, but most of them have retired or died. Guess I left that life around the time I should have.
SaschaStingParoleBarks___nodes[45]._step: It’s about the last person you expect to see upon walking into the Monarch Inn. The tall, scorpion tailed Sting, cleaning a glass and returning any glance her way with a threatening glare.
Seeing you did nothing to lift her mood, but it did lift her eyebrow and add a dark venom to her voice.
Oh very nice, we are having visit from the goodest {0|goody-goody|boy|girl} in town. Are you drinking something with a bit of *oof* or are you only drinking the milk?
Er, Sascha, what are you doing here?
Having conversation with world’s great intellectual. What are you thinking I’m doing? Serving drinks, taking orders, earning tips.

Well hey there, {0}. I see you’ve already met our new bartender! Ol’ Sieger came by and dropped her off at our front door. Said something about an agreement with Miss Camellia, and Sascha here being an ‘unbalanced felon in need of reform.’
But, I don’t know about that. Seems a good lady to me. She’s got a sharp tongue but the customers seem to like it.
I’m on ‘working release programme’. They tell me if I am doing good work in the community, and keep from returning to ‘criminal lifestyle’ I can have back my freedom.
Parole, you mean. And if you do go back to the ‘criminal lifestyle’?
They promised a one way ticket to the Peregrine something-or-other. Compared to this place, that threat is looking more a tempting offer.
Ain’t she a kidder? The customers love her, and it leaves me loads more time to get in the kitchen. Say, speaking off, can I get you something to eat? I’ll fry it up good.
Yes, please, order something. You may get poisoning of food, then we will both be happy.
I don’t see how that would make me happy.
Better to be sick at home than here, no?
I’m glad you’re staying out of trouble. Maybe if you stick with it this could be a whole new start to your life.
I was a feared mercenary once.
And how did that work out for you?
Villager Gossip__line_6: PeasantF1 := I heard that there's a new Frontiersman being sent out here to tend to the abandoned farm!
Villager Gossip__line_8: PeasantF2 := I heard that they're like twelve feet tall!
Villager Gossip__line_10: PeasantF1 := I heard that they have two sets of wings, one like an angel and the other like a demon!
Villager Gossip__line_12: PeasantF2 := I heard that they can breathe fire out of their mouth and have an insatiable libido for monsterfolk!
Villager Gossip__line_14: PeasantF1 := I heard... That they have brown hair!
Villager Gossip__line_16: PeasantF2 := Whoah! Let's not get too crazy here.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_3: //To be played immediately after Arc 1 Act 3 Arc finale part 3
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_10: //Place Eve/Evan, Sieger, Goldra, and Brontide near an open section of the floor plan. They should all be in a loose huddle for the conversation.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_12: You head back up to the Union's common room. Sieger stands with Brontide, the two of them noticing you as you walk over. As you approach, Goldra joins the group as the four of you form a loose huddle.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_23: Goldra taps her foot on the floor impatiently.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_24: Goldra := Did you gain anything from your petit interrogatoire?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_25: Brontide := Only that their names aren't Sting and Prism.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_26: Sieger := We found out that their patron is probably rich as a sweetcake, but not nearly as sweet, haha!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_27: <PLAYERNAME> := That and their employer likes to sign his letters as 'V'
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_28: With that, Goldra raises an eyebrow.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_29: Goldra := Really now? And how did our resident agrarian find this out?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_30: You pull out the letter from earlier.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_31: <PLAYERNAME> := I found this in their camp earlier. Their employer only signed it as 'V'
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_32: Goldra takes the letter from your hands, looking over it a bit as a smirk rises on her lips.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_33: Goldra := My my. Perhaps you have an eye for details after all.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_36: Goldra := I can take some time to analyze the calligraphy, and whoever it is is careful enough not to use their name, but a letter is still a clue.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_37: <PLAYERNAME> := Wait, Goldra, why weren't you at the interrogation?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_40: Goldra := Your little 'chit chat' is quaint, but I'll be the one to conduct a proper interrogation.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_41: Goldra := Once I have all the answers ces petits planctons are so scared of me knowing.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_48: //Animate Goldra walking back to her normal Union Outpost position
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_55: She turns and leaves for her room. You feel apprehensive at how measured and sure her words were.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_56: <PLAYERNAME> := So, Sieger. What's going to happen to those poachers now?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_57: Sieger := Well, we'll see if they'll be willing to give up any more information. After that, they'll have to serve their time.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_58: Brontide := Sounds good to me. If you can't do the crime, don't do the time!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_59: <PLAYERNAME> := That seems about right. Hopefully they'll learn their lesson.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_60: Sieger := Well, we can only hope that's the case, haha! Brontide, any suggestions on what you'd like to do in the meantime?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_61: Brontide := Sir, I'd like to head back and help conduct a thorough search of their camp. Plus, the marines might need some help with all of those cages and scared catfolk!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_62: Sieger := Sounds good, you can head out when you have some spare time.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_66: //suggestion, have Brontide walk out of the outpost. Have him unavailable for the rest of the day. If not feasible, do the below direction.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_67: //Animate Brontide walking to his usual Union Outpost position.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_73: You're left with Sieger as he turns to look at you.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_78: <PLAYERNAME> := Sieger, anything you need me to do?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_79: Sieger reaches over and puts a hand on your shoulder
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_80: Sieger := Yes, I have a very important task for you.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_82: <PLAYERNAME> := Huh? But, sir, I think we should start to prepare. Back at the cells, they warned me about their employer.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_83: Sieger stops you, giving you a reassuring smile.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_84: Sieger := And we will be prepared, don't you worry. Preparing isn't a task for any one member of The Union. We'll all work towards whatever threat this V might still pose for our section of The Frontier.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_85: Sieger := But you, Frontiersman <PLAYERNAME>. You've been through quite a lot from what I hear, while tracking down these poachers.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_86: Sieger := Taking on a homunculus that was attacking the dungeon island is no easy feat. That alone would have been quite the task, but you went and did more.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_88: //The following lines are optional, based on which quests the player has completed. Take the jump out after you've implemented it
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_93: Sieger := From the reports I got, you managed to help someone find an artifact of theirs.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_96: //If eve/evan found a golden treasure horde
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_98: Sieger := You managed to find quite the sum of treasure from what I heard, haha!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_102: Sieger := Somehow you even found the time to help our camp doctor with much-needed medical supplies.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_108: Sieger := In the end, you went above and beyond, defending a union outpost from pirates and monsters. Not to mention ultimately capturing the poachers we've been looking for, for some time.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_109: Sieger := That's more than enough for a Union Member in a few years! You're quite the overachiever, haha!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_110: <PLAYERNAME> := I mean, I was just doing my job.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_111: Sieger := You did, and then some! I can honestly say that you represent what I would say is the ideal picture of a Frontiersman.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_112: <PLAYERNAME> := Gosh, Sieger, I don't know what to say!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_113: Sieger := But, venturing out is only one half of your duties, haha! A good Frontiersman also knows when to plant roots, and sow the earth.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_115: Sieger := And when trouble rares up again, I know that you'll be ready to help out once more.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_117: Sieger := So go and rest up, <PLAYERNAME>! And, thank you, for all of your hard work, haha!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_118: You nod, and turn to go as Sieger pats you on the back. As you descend down the stairs back to the rich earth of Cloverton, you start to think that for now, perhaps it would be best to take a deep breath, and appreciate the peace you helped bring about.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_120: //Fade to black, transition player to outside the union outpost. Fade back in, and end scene.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_3__line_123: //Scene ends. Arc 1 comes to a conclusion. Flag all barks related to conclusion, and have Gehman and Sascha visible in the training grounds.
Edeline Intro__line_4: Edeline:= Ara Ara~! if it isn't a new arrival standing in front of me!
Edeline Intro__line_8: Edeline:= A great pleasure to meet you. I'm Edeline, the proprietor of this cozy little appraisal house. Many adventurers tend to be burdened by hefty pockets out in the Frontier so they bank their income by investing into jewelry and expensive trinkets that I so gra-a-ciously provide.
Edeline Intro__line_10: <PLAYERNAME> := Gosh, I don't even recognize all the different stones you're wearing!
Edeline Intro__line_12: Edeline:= Only the best for my products. But, that's besides the point.
Edeline Intro__line_14: Edeline:= My business brings some fascinating *hu-man* clientele for me to exchange with, full of vim and vigor.
Edeline Intro__line_16: <PLAYERNAME> := Oh hey, I'm human! I- wait why are you getting so close?
Edeline Intro__line_18: //-bring Edeline’s sprite all the way to protagonists so they intersect-
Edeline Intro__line_21: The canid woman leans closer putting her hand on your shoulder and her mouth to your ear so close you can feel her breathing.
Edeline Intro__line_23: Edeline:= ~Welcome to Cloverton, feel free to ask me for assistance if you need a-ny-thing~
Fiohub__line_9: "What do you like to do with your spare time?":
Fiohub__line_13: "What kind of gifts do you like?":
Fiohub__line_60: <PLAYERNAME> := I think I will give Fio a gift.
Fiohub__line_66: r- Fio:= Ooh, this is a right banger it is!
Fiohub__line_67: r- Fio:= This is cookin’ from someone who’s good lookin’!
Fiohub__line_68: r- Fio:= You should treat me like this more often!
Fiohub__line_69: r- Fio:= Ooh this is a proper gift!
Fiohub__line_70: r- Fio:= You spent a lot of money on this yeah?
Fiohub__line_71: r- Fio:= Aw, this is right sweet!
Fiohub__line_78: r- Fio:= Oh this is nice.
Fiohub__line_79: r- Fio:= Pretty good of ya mate.
Fiohub__line_80: r- Fio:= Oh thank ya kindly.
Fiohub__line_90: r- Fio:= Thanks but no thanks.
Fiohub__line_91: r- Fio:= Didja mean to give this to someone else?
Fiohub__line_92: r- Fio:= Why’d you give me this?
Fiohub__line_93: r- Fio:= Don’t give me stuff like this.
Fiohub__line_94: r- Fio:= I don’t want it.
Fiohub__line_103: Fio := Well it depends, if it’s hot out I usually just lay in the sun once the chores are done. If it’s windy I like to fly kites. Otherwise I try to keep in shape with exercise.
Fiohub__line_105: <PLAYERNAME> := What about when the weather’s wet and cold?
Fiohub__line_107: Fio := Well I’m no wuss! I can work when it’s cold and wet out!
Fiohub__line_115: // have the fio portrait frown and sweat or something to that effect.
Fiohub__line_119: Fio := I like to study planting and stuff when it rains and snows. I haven’t had time to focus there and my skills have gotten rusty.
Fiohub__line_121: <PLAYERNAME> := I could help with that if you want.
Fiohub__line_123: Fio := Sounds good to me I guess.
Fiohub__line_128: <PLAYERNAME> := So what do you like to eat?
Fiohub__line_130: Fio:= Fruits and vegetables only, no meat.
Fiohub__line_134: <PLAYERNAME> := What kind of gifts do you like?
Fiohub__line_135: Fio:= Well I love me pipe and some smoke grass for it. Oh and BunBun wafers but those are pretty rare.
Fiohub__line_141: Fio := I’m good in bed and I’m good in a fight. Was pretty good at making herbs grow but I’ve lost the habit.
Fiohub__line_143: <PLAYERNAME> := We could study some of my old agriculture textbooks if you want.
Fiohub__line_149: // TODO: Use if player has not reached an affection threshold and learned about Fio’s backstory with bandits and so on.
Fiohub__line_150: Fio:= Just somethin’ I picked up along the way.

Fiohub__line_157: <PLAYERNAME> := Hmm, I get the feeling Fio and me have a solid connection now. So I suppose I could take things to the next level by taking her on a date...
Fiohub__line_166: <PLAYERNAME> := Hey Fio, wanna go on a date?
Fiohub__line_170: <PLAYERNAME> := Well like... Monarch Inn, I guess? Only real restaurant in town.
Fiohub__line_172: Fio:= Sure, but I get to order for myself.
Female Noble Intro__line_4: NobleF := How positively ghastly these rural supplies are! Items of such extraordinarily low quality cannot be found anywhere in the Ivory Kingdom! So chique! So scandalous!
Female Noble Intro__line_6: NobleF := You there, the bumpkin with the Union overalls...
KiramBarBarks___nodes[2]._stepChain[0]._: {0}! Ahoy there! Come ta join me with a pint? Feel free ta pull yerself up a chair!
Ahhh~ Nights like this make tha hard work days worth it, I got a pocket full o’ coinage, and don’t plan to leave ‘till it’s all gone yarrharrharr!
Yanno, I’m glad we’re plenty far out from proper civilization. Ya can still see tha starry sky when ya look up.
I don’t got much in tha way o’ plans, ‘sides gettin’ myself nice an’ tank’d up! Thrund’s already ‘ad his palms greased, so I got lots o’ food comin’ my way.
KiramBarBarks___nodes[3]._stepChain[0]._: A small drizzle like this is nothin’ compared to tha storms you’re liable to sail through! Why, I could manage to walk the deck and not slip even once!
Sea Kings and Scales… Wish I was allowed a day ta sleep in, feel like iffin I went ta sleep ta tha rain, I’d be harder ta wake than tha dead!
{0}, of tryin’ ta wash yer mouth with rainwater. Plenty o’ pirates do that, an’ sometimes wind up with a mouth full a’ microplankton fer their troubles.
Didja know {0}, there are places in tha world where the salt is *so* high in the surrounding islands, that even the rain becomes a bit briny.
KiramBarBarks___nodes[4]._stepChain[0]._: {0}! Lissen ta that wind! Now that we’re all nice an’ cozy in tha Monarch, it can blow all it wants fer all I care!
Yarrharr! On me way in, I watched a rogue gust practically *roll* Popondopulous’s mighty body over! ‘E was all sorts o’ flailin’ about an’ swearin’!
Ahoy {0}! As thanks fer all my help earlier, Camellia has offered me a free beer! ‘Course that’s long since paid now, an’ I’m on my fourth an’... Where was I going with this?
Ahhh~ A nice cool beer down my throat helps put tha rest o’ tha day behind me. It’s not tha only way ta relax, but it’s mine.
KiramBarBarks___nodes[5]._stepChain[0]._: Whew! {0}! Storms like this are wonderful when you’re piratin’! I’ve captured many a ship that came outta storm like this! It takes a professional crew to get through a storm with all hands, but no crew is good enough to escape a storm unscathed!
Gotta say {0}, I like that I’m not *always* in tha skies anymore. Storms like this are perilously navigated, and being at the wheel and fighting a tempest is nerve-wracking.
Haha! D’ye hear tha roar of that thunder {0}? Like canonfire from the skies above! Make sure ya cover yer ears when you see the lightnin’, else yer liable to deafen yerself!
There’re worse places ta ride out a storm than tha Monarch~. Why, I might go as far as to say that it’s pleasant ta be in here while tha storm rages outside!
KiramBarBarks___nodes[6]._stepChain[0]._: Feel that cracklin’ flame {0}. Say what ya will about Camellia, but tha Monarch always has a spot by tha warm fire on these snowy days.
This cup o’ cider is jus’ what I needed. I can feel my old bones heatin’ up an’ my muscles loosening their grip. Couple more o’ these an’, I’ll be righter than a ship sans port! Yarrharrharr!
I went ahead to tha Monarch earlier an’ shoveled tha snow away fer Camelia. ‘Course it weren’t fer free, I got a warm drink, an’ a hot meal as thanks!
Looks like there’s gonna be a fresh blanket of snow when all things are said and done. Maybe I’ll set a tent up fer meself later, let tha snow cover it an’ let it insulate me against the cool.
KiramBarBarks___nodes[7]._stepChain[0]._: Sea Kings this *heat*! Had I the resources, I’d submerge myself in a bath o’ ice until the weather decided it was gonna be more amicable!
Tha Monarch has been keepin’ me nice an’ cool. They got plenty o’ ice, and need chores done, long as I do tha work, I get my drinks nice an’ frosty~.

Scales and Kings, can’t stand this heat… I’m half-tempted to go completely topless, sure there might be a *few* decency laws I’d be breakin’, but given tha extenuating circumstances, I think I’ll be forgiven.
Ugh, tides… I think I’m gonna find myself a nice cool hole to hide in until this heat ends. If ya need somethin’, please, by all means, come find me.
KiramBarBarks___nodes[9]._stepChain[0]._: Ahhhh~ {0}! That summer heat is a bit muted now that we’re indoors, and I’m feeling nice and refreshed with this cool beer in me hands~!
At least durin’ tha night, tha heat ain’t as punishin…. Can’t stand tha wind comin’ in all… Hot an’ rude!

Got a lot of ways to keep cool during the summer heat {0}. One trick is to put a bit o’ salt in yer water, not a lot, but ya got salts in ya that get drained when ya sweat, sure water is all well an’ good, but yer body’s got other things it needs when it’s hydrated.
Ahoy! Keepin’ cool out there {0}? I got a nice spot near me with yer name on it if ya need ta take a load off an’ relax!
Feel that nip in the air {0}? Autumn is here in all its glory! Down at the docks, I’ll be moving a lot more crates before winter starts to settle in, so don’t be surprised if I got extra Korona to spend!

I jus’ can’t decide if I should be drinkin’ beer, or wine. On tha one hand, beer is good fer almost any time, an’ comes in fun flavors… But wine jus’ *feels* right yanno? Hah, life is so hard with these choices…

I like sailing around autumn, tha warm-cold air, plenty of clear blue skies, and even tha sky predators ain’t as active. Were I able, I’d take a casual cruise through tha currents an’ maybe do a little camping on a small island.
With tha Monarch freshly painted sky-side, I feel more than entitled ta sittin’ back an’ takin’ a load off my tired feet!
Ahhhh~ {0}! Nice of ya ta join me by tha fire! I can practically *feel* the heat meltin’ away all that cold from workin’ at tha docks!
Ahoy! Got meself a nice pipin’ hot bottle of mulled wine! Compliments of Camellia if ya can believe it! Such a generous hostess~.
Ye Scales and Kings… Tha older I get, tha harder it is fer me ta shake off tha cold. I’m still as limber as I was in my youth, but this chill pierces me right to the bone…
So, got any plans fer tha winter {0}? Mine are ta sit back an’ enjoy tha rest o’ tha month afore it gets warm again.
One o’ tha best times fer piratin’ is spring… Well, really it’s any time o’ year. Merchants get laden down with a lot of goods they saved up over the winter, and some are so eager that they travel with a *very* light escort.

Ye Scales… I remember back when I was a young matey in my corsaire days. Tha ol’ Cap’n would open up a fresh barrel o’ rum whenever Joy King day rolled around. ‘E loved ta crack one open, jus’ in case tha Joy King ‘emself happened to stop by.
Turns out Camellia has more than enough beer ta go around! So I’m gonna keep myself planted here as long as I can an’ enjoy her stock!
Ahoy {0}! Spring nights are perfect fer quenchin’ yer thirst, feel free ta pull up a chair an’ join me fer a spell!
I’ve been makin’ some progress gettin’ crates unloaded fer Market Day. Tha merchants can use all tha help they can get, an’ are willin’ ta pay *much* more than normal so they don’t run outta stock.
All that loadin’ an’ unloadin’ fer Market Day has got my feet an’ arms killin’ me. I’m glad I can take a breather at tha Monarch.

I like browsin’ around tha market when it comes in, but I really don’t got tha interest in most of what they sell… I suppose when I got korona burnin’ a hole in me pocket, I prefer ta spend it here at tha Monarch.

Ahhh, with all tha work done today, I’m proud that Market Day was able to go off without a hitch. While it’s goin’ on though, I’m gonna avail myself of some beverages in celebration of a job well-done~
Ahoy {0}! I’ve been volunteered to help with loading and unloading goods for the Caravan today. Fortunately I’ve worked out a deal! I help unload, and I get *one* jug of starshine!

Yanno, back when I was piratin’ with tha Corsairs, there were more than a couple Brownie Caravans that I raided. There were some very good hauls, but… Well… Turns out when ya don’t make good friends with tha only nomads, gettin’ help when ya need it becomes difficult.
{0}! So good ta see ya! I’ve already taken a part of the festivities myself! With all that done though, I’ll be finding a nice spot to lay down and get a nap, have fun~!
I really appreciate tha Brownies makin’ their way out ‘ere fer business. When I was… Much younger, I loved seeing their caravans flying in, an’ give me a look at a much wider world.
{0}! Planning on takin’ part in Matchmaker Day? Well, good luck fer ya! I myself am absolved from it, given my… Extensive criminal record, and current status as ‘under house arrest’, so have fun fer me, okay?

Ahoy {0}! Another Matchmaker Day has come around! I gotta say, it’s been a *long* long while since I was a part of it. Might surprise you, but pirates don’t generally make time fer dating when there could be loot.

Yanno, it’s nice ta see everyone coupled up here… Lotta familiar faces happy that they get ta spend time with friends an’ loved ones… Guess some of ‘em just needed a government-mandated excuse ta hang out!

I spoke with Yuuga earlier, she’s got a sense of humor I really like. Why if I were twenty years younger, an’ a bit dumber, I’d have asked *her* out on a date.. ‘Course, I know better than ta try my luck with a refined woman like that!
Whew! Been a minute since I saw Beth and her man Josiah. Last I saw ‘em.. Musta been a decade back when I was at port somewhere along the fringes. They showed up to bless tha local harvest, an’, well… They were some mighty fine drinkers!
{0}! Word through the gempas vines is that *you* were given some special seeds by Josiah fer tha Solstice! I’ll be on stand-by if ya need some help!

Ahoy there! Yanno, back durin’ my piratin’ days, the solstice was one o’ tha few holidays we observed. Mostly ‘cause in some places it’d get so hot that we couldn’t get near without sweatin’ our entire body weight. It’s very nice ta be able to celebrate in a town fer once.
Gotta admit, I do like how tha scenery feels more… Vibrant. Things growin’ around Josiah an’ Beth bloom in tha most beautiful ways.
Ah! Provisions Day… ‘S been a while since I’ve been a part of it. I’ve been told though ta give myself a rest today. Apparently I’m allowed this day off even during probation!
{0}! Have any plans fer today? I’m gonna spend time at tha Monarch later, Kellam an’ I are gonna have a contest ta see who can clear out Camellia’s Provision Day Reserves faster!
Ahoy! I got a bit of time before I am needed elsewhere… Well, not really *needed* per say… Yanno, it’s been a heck of a year {0}, an’ I’ve really come ta appreciate tha time I’ve spent in Cloverton.
Yanno, I wonder if Beauclaire has a fella back home waitin’ fer her… Or if she’d be interested in a swarthy pirate for a quick fling~!
{0}! C-can you c’mere. That… That’s the REAL Sebastian coordinating the Hunt isn’t it? I just… I’m *such* a huge fan of his, I’ve followed his career since I was a lad, and now… Please keep me from doin’ anythin’ dumb around him *please*!
Ahoy {0}! Gotta say, not a huge fan o’ this holiday. I’ve ‘ad ta fight too many beings from tha Mirror World ta be excited about tha prospect o’ fightin’ more.
I think my only solace fer this holiday will be tha Monarch. Partially because it’ll have plenty o’ people hidin’ out in it, an’ also because Camellia will be openin’ tha special reserves fer us.
Ah, {0}, nice ta see ya! I’m not gonna be up to much ‘till the Haunt passes. I can go out an’ fight an’ whatnot, but… Well, my heart just won’t be in it.
Haw! I’m guessin’ you met with Jerikan? He’s an ill-tempered one, that’s fer sure… Can’t blame him much fer it though. Much as I’d like ta get along with ‘im, it seems he’d much prefer ta keep me at arm’s length.

Jerikan’s in town today if ya haven’t noticed. Back in my military days, monster traders were much more… Unregulated. It’s better now, but only because people like Jerikan stepped up an’ forced tha Kingdom to do something about it.
{0}! Valpongis is in town today! I’ve bought a few curios offa him. Used to, back in tha day, I’d sell him some artifacts under tha table, but when I went pirate… Well, can’t really do business in the Kingdom when your handsome mug is on every Wanted Poster in tha frontier.
I collected a couple things fer myself from Valpongis. Took a little extra barterin’ ta get him ta relent… But now I’m the proud owner of *one* fancy drinking stein!
Ya stopped by Digger yet? She’s in town today, an’ I already helped offload some of her goods. I don’t really got a reason ta shop with her unless I gotta DIY somethin’, an’ even then, wood is pretty easy ta come by.
Gotta say, merchants like Digger are invaluable when yer on the edge of tha law. When ya need raw materials to patch yerself up, yer willin’ ta pay any price fer tha materials.
If there’s one rival I have when it comes ta culinary pursuits, it’s Rotisseur. It’s one thing that she can make a meat so juicy and delicious that it’ll haunt yer dreams, it’s *another* thing ta call Survivor Slop ‘slop’! The nerve of her!
Gotta say… Even though Rotisseur won’t try tha Survivor Slop, I do appreciate her skill with meat. I’ve never had a head fer grillin’ myself, but she makes it into an art form!
Yanno, there were lots of veterans that, after tha wars, wound up untethered and wanderin’. Greenthumb didn’t serve in the same places that I did, but I’m glad that he found somethin’ ta keep himself happy.
I don’t got much use fer seeds, but some o’ tha food Greenthumb sells is top-quality. Fresh foods taste much better than rations… An’ make fer a delicious side fer tha Survivor Slop~.
I’ve not got much business with Vodan or Skandr. I’ll say that Skandr has really picked up tha torch when it comes ta the monster nobility. There are many more monster nobles and scions than when I was young.

Gotta say, I appreciate how nurturin’ Vodan is to tha eggs in her charge. There have been some merchants from tha bad ol’ days that treated monster eggs like they were objects. She gives them tha affection that they *should* be gettin’.
Yarharrharr! I love seein’ Rekk around. Tha ol’ so-and-so is a credit ta scavengers everywhere! ‘is ability ta find them ‘diamonds in tha rough’ is nothin’ short of almost cheatin’!

Back durin’ my soldierin’ days, I knew quite a few people like Rekk. It’s illegal ta scavenge and dredge from battlefields, but… Well tha pay was significant if you were willin’ ta just look tha other way. Way I figured it, if I didn’t, someone else would, an’ I’d just be losin’ out on money I coulda sent back home.
From what I heard that Ripper Cat was one of many.. Experiments given ta Sting an’ Prism. Good on ya fer takin’ it out, an’ helpin’ them miners {0}.
Yarrharr, that Ripper Cat must’ve been a great danger ta tha mines. You takin’ it out kept it from rampagin’ further, so good job {0}!
From what I heard, takin’ out that Wizard’s experiment probably kept it from rampagin’ ‘cross tha entire dungeon. I dunno what havoc it woulda caused had ye not takin’ it out.

I remember hearin’ about tha avalanche where tha Wizard’s Lab was in the Savannah. I dunno what happened, but I guess it’s a good thing ya got out when ya did, otherwise ya might’ve gotten trapped inside!
From what I heard, that Kelpie had been obstructin’ tha frontline for a while. I think Prism an’ Sting knew ya were gettin’ close, so made a massive play ta buy themselves more time… Course, coulda been just a coincidence that it was there, so who knows.

Kings and Scales… What I wouldn’t give ta know how Vaskin is gettin’ control over these homunculi… A siege-maker like tha Kelpie is powerful, havin’ control over somethin’ like that… Well, I wonder just *what* is Vaskin plannin…
Yanno, I didn’t think much of Sting or Prism when they showed up. They were late-comers to tha operation, but they were able to get their hands on what Vaskin needed. Course, I don’t think they really liked tha life that we lead, but it was their only option.

I don’t think that Vaskin is good at puttin’ a person’s skills to tha best use. Sting an’ Prism woulda done a lot better in support roles… So I wonder why Vaskin sent them out in the first place, what was tha plan?
Takin’ out Rook musta *really* hurt Vaskin’s operation. ‘E was one o’ tha few people I’d call ‘competent enough ta leave on their own’. Meanin’ that Vaskin will ‘ave ta be more ‘hands on’ if he plans on keepin’ his operation runnin’.
Outta all tha operator’s that worked with Vaskin, I respected Rook tha most. Not nearly as psychotic as some of tha other people, an’ I even had a few good conversations with ‘im over tea.
Yanno… I never thought I’d live in a world where I’d never ‘ave ta see Boethilde again. She was always a constant presence around Vaskin, an’ I figured I’d ‘ave ta fight ‘er at some point… But now?... Well now I think I can sleep a bit easier.

Boethilde was tha best representation of how good Vaskin is at manipulatin’ people. Any other person she’d ‘ave killed immediately fer what they did, but him.. He ‘ad what she wanted, an’ knew how to apply tha pressure to get what he wanted from her.
YARHARR! {0}! Haw… He’s gone… I can’t believe it’s over, no more lookin’ over my shoulder fer that foul face of ‘is. I can’t speak fer what’ll come next, but takin’ out Vaskin was doin’ tha world a favor!
That slimy barnacle is finally gone! Whew… He was truly a blight on this world, an’ now that he’s gone… Well, I think I’m gonna keep celebratin’ every day fer at least a year!
I’d served with tha Corsairs for almost half my life before now. I already told ya about how we operated, I think. But we operated far an’ wide. Before Rourke stepped in, ya couldn’t find a better crew than tha Corsairs!

We ‘ad plenty of colorful members in tha Corsairs, kinda like tha eclectic bunch you’ve managed ta fall in with. Why, if I didn’t think better of it, I might suggest you try your luck in tha skies! Yarrharr!

Early on I really liked bein’ a pirate. It was much like stayin’ in tha Navy, but with better pay. Every day we’d set out on a new mission, to a new frontier, it was exciting and terrifying, an’ even better was when we found treasure… Course it couldn’t last forever, but I liked them days.

Rourke takin’ over tha pirates was… Bad. I think tha only solace I can take is that most o’ tha Corsairs outright deserted when they could, my only wish is that I could track down tha old crew… Make sure they were okay yanno?

Yonten_Hub__line_59: <PLAYERNAME> := I think I will give Yonten a gift.
Yonten_Hub__line_65: r- Yonten := Oh, I am pleased to be your friend.
Yonten_Hub__line_66: r- Yonten := Thank you for thinking of me.
Yonten_Hub__line_68: r- Yonten := Ah, you flatter me.
Yonten_Hub__line_69: r- Yonten := How nice of you!
Yonten_Hub__line_70: r- Yonten := Oh I could hardly accept this...but if you insist.
Yonten_Hub__line_78: r- Yonten := Thank you very much.
Yonten_Hub__line_79: r- Yonten := Oh thank you very much.
Yonten_Hub__line_89: r- Yonten := Thanks but no thanks.
Yonten_Hub__line_90: r- Yonten := Did you mean to give this to someone else?
Yonten_Hub__line_91: r- Yonten := Why’d you give me this?
Yonten_Hub__line_92: r- Yonten := Don’t give me stuff like this.
Yonten_Hub__line_93: r- Yonten := I don’t want it.
Yonten_Hub__line_102: <PLAYERNAME> := So what do you like to do in your spare time?
Yonten_Hub__line_103: Yonten := I like to spar, well maybe that’s an exaggeration. I spar, if I don’t I’ll get rusty.
Yonten_Hub__line_104: Yonten := Believe it or not I actually enjoy doing quiet work around the shop with my granny, and I like making ice cream when I can get a spare minute.
Yonten_Hub__line_108: <PLAYERNAME> := What kind of skills do you have?
Yonten_Hub__line_109: Yonten := Well I have combat training, did marine work for years. It’s nothing special.
Yonten_Hub__line_110: Yonten := I’m pretty good at logistics work. Y’know, stocking shops and ensuring we have supplies. Oh and I’m a deft hand with ice magic, most yetis are.
Yonten_Hub__line_114: <PLAYERNAME> := What kind of foods do you like?
Yonten_Hub__line_115: Yonten := Well I’m a yeti so we’re used to cold. I tend to go for the classics, heavy soups, dumplings, gravy etc. My real weakness is ice cream though. Heavy spices do bad things to my gut.
Yonten_Hub__line_119: <PLAYERNAME> := Any special items you’re on the look out for?
Yonten_Hub__line_120: Yonten := Not much of anything though...these rings of mine? They’re lucky, if you can find any like them I’d appreciate it if you brought ‘em to me. They’re kind of rare out here.
Yonten_Hub__line_121: Yonten := Oh and there’s counterfeits people make, usually humans. If you could get those off the market and bring them to me that’d be nice.
Yonten_Hub__line_122: Yonten := These things have some religious significance and I don’t like it when people appropriate our traditions.
Yonten_Hub__line_126: <PLAYERNAME> := I’m close enough with Yonten that I could probably take him on a date...
Yonten_Hub__line_129: "Yeah I’ll take Yonten on a date.":
Yonten_Hub__line_135: <PLAYERNAME> := Hey Yonten, wanna go on a date?
Yonten_Hub__line_137: // Cue Yonten looking a bit surprised and contemplative I guess? Maybe sweat drop emotes I dunno.
Yonten_Hub__line_139: Yonten := Well we have been spending a lot of time together, this would be a good step forward. Where did you have in mind?
Yonten_Hub__line_140: <PLAYERNAME> := Well the Monarch Inn seems like the best option for something to start with. I like Cloverton and all but kinda limited in terms of service diversity.
Yonten_Hub__line_144: Yonten := Heh, yeah I don’t wanna be rude but that’s about the only thing I miss from my Marine days, port towns usually had great restaurants so we gonna go now?
Orchid Intro__line_12: Merchant := Dammit I won't go lower than 30! This is an outrage!
Orchid Intro__line_20: Orchid := Oh, hello, new face around here?
Orchid Intro__line_22: <PLAYERNAME> := Yeah! Name's <PLAYERNAME>! What was all that about?
Orchid Intro__line_24: Orchid := Just another day in a Frontier town with some con artist trying to sell a “miracle magical machine.” They exploit the magical nature of this worl- I mean kingdom to try and sell trash that is clearly not magic to random curious passersby.
Orchid Intro__line_26: Orchid := I happen to know how to identify these things, so all these con men get screened through me. They find their way here one way or another, and then into Union’s logbook for counterfeit magic item trading.
Orchid Intro__line_28: <PLAYERNAME> := So you purposely attract these people to check their inventory’s validity?
Orchid Intro__line_30: Orchid := You wouldn't believe how fast a rumor of a magical item purveyor spreads in a central kingdom when it's not regulated by the Silentville Magic Academy, though it does step a bit on their toes, me freelancing and such.
Orchid Intro__line_32: <PLAYERNAME> := Now that you mention it, you don't look too drained by the magic or anything! In fact looking close at you, you-
Orchid Intro__line_34: Orchid := Oh, don't worry about that, it's just the, uh.. The heat from the sun playing a trick on you.
Orchid Intro__line_36: <PLAYERNAME> := Really? I think the weather's quite nice toda-
Orchid Intro__line_38: Orchid := *COUGH* Erm, ah, um... <PLAYERNAME> has a nice ring to it, I happened to know someone with your kind of attitude a long time ago-
Orchid Intro__line_40: There is a hint of sadness in her tone.
Orchid Intro__line_42: Orchid := I’m Orchid, came here a few months back. I help the local guild with any magic related problems in return for some korona in my pocket. That big windmill blowing away the winds won't maintain itself you know, and whatever lazy wizard that made it certainly isn't going to bother.
Orchid Intro__line_44: <PLAYERNAME> := Oh yeah, Magitek Windmills! We had a crash course on those back at the academy. These babies are even able to repel Sea Kings! I can't imagine how these Frontier towns would survive without them!
Orchid Intro__line_46: Orchid := Right you are. Well, <PLAYERNAME>, it's about time I get back to my work. If you happen to stumble across any actual artifacts that might be of magical merit, I could probably appraise it for you, for a nominal fee.
Simon Intro__line_4: Simon:= *Wheeze* A new shcent findsh me today. Alwaysh enjoy the fresh meat in theshe watersh, and you have the shalt licked aroma of shomeone fresh off the boat.
Simon Intro__line_8: Simon := *Wheeze* Aye! Tish the shcent of thoshe looking for a chance to prove themshelvesh! Remindsh me of my shea-pup days. *Wheeze* I can shmell you’ve the air of a hard worker!
Simon Intro__line_10: <PLAYERNAME> := T-thanks? I certainly don’t plan to slouch!
Simon Intro__line_12: Simon := *Inhale* Good to hear. I be Shimon Tenbolt, if there’s goodsh in thish town then Shimon hash lifted and moved it.
Simon Intro__line_14: Simon := *Wheeze* You come back to me after you've gotten your bearingsh and I’ll have plenty of fine work to chum your watersh!
Simon Intro__line_16: The sharkman attempts to crack a smile with his enormous mouth.
Simon Intro__line_18: <PLAYERNAME> := Is that.. A smile? I'm going to assume that's a smile.

Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_2: //To be played when the player arrives in Cloverton, after having defeated Sting and Prism in the Savannah Dungeon
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_5: //Place Eve/Evan, Sieger, several Union Marines, Sting, and Prism on the Cloverton docks.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_11: The voyage back to Cloverton is slow and uneventful, two qualities worth savoring after the tribulations you’ve been through. You watch as Cloverton grows on the horizon, the washed out colors slowly saturating as you get closer and closer. Finally, you come to a lurching stop, as you and everyone else begins disembarking.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_14: You step out onto the dock where you find Sieger and his crew have the captured poachers in tow.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_16: //Screen fades back in. Union Marines should be in a loose formation around Sting and Prism.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_24: Sting := Do not be so rough! We arre cooperating, imbecile!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_26: A few of the denizens of the docks watch on. Curiosity, apprehension, and even a few mirthful smirks cross their faces as Sieger steps down from the gangplank, and motions for the Union Marines to take them away.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_32: //Have the Union Marines, Sting, and Prism walk off screen and out of sight. If viable, have a slight camera pan following them before coming back to Sieger, Eve/Evan, and one Union Marine.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_40: //Player should start off screen and slide onto it.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_45: "Home sweet home, what a relief to be back here.":
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_49: "What a pain in the neck those two are!":
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_53: You breathe a sigh of relief too.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_54: <PLAYERNAME> := Home sweet home, what a relief to be back here!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_55: Sieger := Haha! Yes, Cloverton is a real gem in the rough, isn’t she? Don’t get too cozy yet though.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_60: Even though you’re glad to be back, you steel yourself for a bit more work.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_66: You stretch. Off in the distance, you can just make out Sting yelling an obscenity.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_67: <PLAYERNAME> := What a pain in the neck those two are!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_68: Sieger := Haha! Well, I imagine they’re none too happy about your interloping! I imagine they’ve still got a bit of fighting spirit we’ll have to deal with today.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_73: Sieger := Unfortunately, there’s just a little more to be done. I’ll need you to come with me to The Outpost. As the leader of the expedition that captured them, you’ll be able to help quite a bit, haha!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_75: Sieger looks over to the Union Marine nearby.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_76: Sieger := Lawrence, I’ll need you to go and report to Operations Director Jubelle. Tell her that I’ll need her assistance sorting out the logistics for treating and assisting the displaced captives and those poachers.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_82: Sieger := Well, no time like the present, haha! Let’s go!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_87: //Scene ends, immediately move to Act 1 Arc 3 Arc finale part 2
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_90: It's a short walk to The Outpost. You pass by townsfolk about their daily errands, but already you start to see the hushed whispers and gazes as people gossip just out of earshot.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_93: Sieger := Seems like everyone has an idea what's going on. I'm sure they'll be glad to know those poachers aren't skulking around nearby, haha!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_95: <PLAYERNAME> := Yeah, now they're going to sit around in... Hey, Sieger, do we have a jail?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_96: Sieger := Not to worry, Frontiersman <PLAYERNAME>, you'll have your answer soon enough!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_1__line_101: The two of you reach The Outpost, and Sieger holds the door for you as you begin the long journey up the stairs, only to descend down to the training grounds. Sieger moves ahead of you, as you round the corner at the top of the ramp.
Kellam Intro__line_4: Kellam := Heya stranger, came to have a drink didja? I had a good payday from the latest patch up job and I intend to empty it all on their best bernard beer reserve! Come have a pint with me!
Kellam Intro__line_6: <PLAYERNAME> := Sure! I think I've earned one!
Kellam Intro__line_10: Kellam := Ahhh that was good! Name’s Kellam by the by, I’m part of Lucia’s fixer upper crew. I used to cut through people for koronas but my partner could barely sleep for worry, so I had to take up this job.
Kellam Intro__line_12: Kellam := Now I’m cutting through wood and only thumping people if they don't put up the koronas. It pays the bills...
Kellam Intro__line_14: Kellam := And it pays for the beer so I ain't complaining! What's your story?
Kellam Intro__line_16: <PLAYERNAME> := Name’s <PLAYERNAME>, I’m the new owner of the farm stationed here. The Union assigned me to help out this place!
Kellam Intro__line_18: Kellam := We haven't had a person takin’ care of that place for a looong while, Kreyton once volunteered to take up the job, but between the existing farm in town and the paperwork needed, it's just been too much of a pain for anyone in town to take on.
Kellam Intro__line_20: Kellam := Hey if you ever need some construction done, toss a request to Lucia will ya? She’s the gnome at the water tower in the main circle of town. Her work contracts pay for my bills so ya could return me a favor for that drink yeah?
Kellam Intro__line_24: <PLAYERNAME> := Sure! I’ll try to get some boozant crops going to help the inn with restocking while I’m at it.
Kellam Intro__line_26: Kellam := That's the spirit! You and I are gonna get along just fine, <PLAYERNAME>!

Captain Intro__line_4: Captain := Ah, the Frontiersman. Your papers and documents have already been transferred to Jubelle along with the deed to the abandoned farm. Welcome to Cloverton!
Voyager Intro__line_4: Voyager := ... Fifteen trail rations for five ventures, a cat bell for dodging the cats, a pick for breaking through rock, bandages for our inevitable mutilation, a poster of Valeria for 'moral support'...

Birma Intro__line_4: Birma:= Hey hey, a frontiersman I reckon!
Birma Intro__line_6: <PLAYERNAME> := Yep that’s me! <PLAYERNAME>! Nice to meet you!
Birma Intro__line_8: Birma := And a friendly one too, welcome, welcome!
Birma Intro__line_11: As you shake her hand, an unfortunate sneeze causes flour to fly everywhere!
Birma Intro__line_13: Birma := Bless you! Name's Birma, and sorry about all the flour. I tend to get engrossed in my work, which leaves my station a bit disorganized.
Birma Intro__line_15: <PLAYERNAME> := Well, your disorganization doesn't seem to affect your goods! The smell is (achoo!) wonderful!
Birma Intro__line_17: Birma := Why thank you! I usually have my partner to help me out with the cleaning but today we’re manning two stations, Jubelle suggested that spreading our business to the port building is a good way to guarantee some sales. Kaleida Cloverton NPC Fortune Telling__l: // Kaleida in Cloverton telling the fortune of a selected NPC
Kaleida := Allow me just a moment to read the currents of your life…
Kaleida := Oh… Oh spirits and fates…
Kaleida := Edeline… Not far from now, I see a knight in shining armor who will look very well-kept, and will at the very least, be wearing a suit of armor that is NOT mostly rust…
Edeline := Hmmm… Alright, I get what you’re saying, I should be looking for a knight that looks MORE like a knight!
Kaleida := Yes… I mean no! I mean you won’t realize- Edeline, be careful of those that would deceive you for their personal gain.
Edeline := I will Kaleida, thank you for the advice!
Kaleida := Please Jubelle, allow me to assist in assuaging your fears of the future.
Jubelle := Thank you very much Kaleida, I need some good news.
Kaleida := I’ll see what I can do, now then… Let me see where the currents of fate carry you.
Kaleida := Your next delivery will be off-time, but by only half a day, furthermore you should expect a delivery from your home soon.
Jubelle := Whew… Alright, that’s better news than I thought it’d be. Thank you, Kaleida, sorry I’ve come to rely on you when I need to know if work is going to be rough.
Kaleida := It’s no problem Jubelle! I’ve used my abilities far more on Fi-Star, so please never feel afraid to ask!
Kaleida := Allow me, please, to peel the veil back, and reveal your future… I see… Many parties… So many parties! You will drink your fill over and over. Sometimes after work.
Kaleida := You are surrounded by friends and co-workers, and your cup will never be completely empty.
Kellam := Gyahahah! That’s not too different from how I live now. Thanks fer tha readin’ lil’ lady~!
Kaleida := Uh, wait, Kellam. Don’t you want me to look further? Perhaps revelry of that level could have consequences.
Kellam := There ain’t any need! As long as I work hard, then I’m gonna play hard. Otherwise what’s tha point ta life!
Kaleida := Well, alright then. Take care!
Kaleida := Oh, Minerva was it? What can I do for you today? Have you come to have your future told?
Minerva := No thank you, dear.I wished to come here in person and offer my apologies.
Minerva := Yes, dear. When I had heard through the gempas vine that Cloverton had acquired herself a new fortuneteller, I had expected an uncouth charlatan. However, I see now that is not the case.

Minerva := Your fortune telling is not the bawdy flimflammery that I have come to expect here on The Frontier. It appears that your skills have offered a pleasant distraction for many here in Cloverton. I hope that you can forgive my inhospitableness.
Kaleida := I… Well thank you, Minerva. It can take a lot to admit you were wrong when you could have stayed silent.
Kaleida := Thankfully, Cloverton has been very welcoming to me. So much so, I wanted to pay the town, and its people, back as much as I could.
Minerva := Well, be certain not to wear yourself out. Cloverton can not afford to lose such a pleasant addition to our community.
Kaleida := Well thank you, Minerva. Perhaps you might enjoy a tea reading sometime?
Minerva := A tea reading? Ho ho, that sounds lovely! Perhaps you may enjoy having tea with me and Edeline some time too?
Kaleida := I would! We can work out the details soon.
Kaleida := Montalvo, such a pleasure to see you again!
Montalvo := And a pleasure to see you as well, Miss Kaleida. Tell me, do the fates tell of an upcoming dip in the market?
Kaleida := You and I both know I can’t help you commit insider trading~
Montalvo := Ah, my heart, it cries out for the potential profits. At least tell me that I will not be forced to care for another incompetent!
Kaleida := Oh Montalvo, you won’t have to worry about that, there’s no one in Cloverton that wants to do what you do.
Montalvo := Your words, they bring me great relief Miss Kaleida, please, take these Krone as a symbol of my thanks.
Kaleida := Ohh Montalvo, it’s always a pleasure to read for you~.
Kaleida := I feel the currents that carry yourself through the eddies of time… Starting with the past: Caring for the dead is a laudable trait, none could fault you for honoring your friends.
Kaleida := However, leading to the present: Through your chilly front, those who come to know you can be counted as true friends.

Kaleida := And, finally, your future: I do not see any great misfortune for you. You will not have to worry of events of your past repeating themselves. You can leave the fate of the world in someone else’s hands.
Orchid := …Well thank you Kaleida, but I really needed to know where I misplaced my copy of ‘Exhaustive History of Magic’.
Within a pile of books you recently borrowed from someone named… Heather?
Orchid := Thank you very much! I know just where it is then.
Kaleida := Simon, you HAVE to stop breaking into people’s houses.
Simon := *Wheeze* Did ya predict something bad will happen?
Kaleida := …No, I didn’t, but nothing good can come from intruding into other’s homes.
Simon := Shorry then, gotta make deliveries, an’ if I won’t be in danger, then the deliveries will continue.
Kaleida := Please, allow me to chart the course of your future.
Tab := Oh like, maybe wait on that a sec? Because I wanna like… I don’t need to know my future, I just wanna know if my friends will be alright?
Kaleida := Oh! Okay, I can do that too. Please, a moment.

Kaleida := It seems that… All your friends will be perfectly fine, and happy for the foreseeable future. Work will cause strife with them, but your bubbly personality will be the light they need to tolerate it.
Tab := Like, Thanks Kali! I’m super-duper glad to hear that!
Kaleida := You’re welcome Tab, be well, okay?

Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_163: <PLAYERNAME> := No return address... guess it wouldn't be that easy.
