Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_169: // move Sascha to the front now
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_173: She starts rattling the bars violently!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_174: Sting := How are we losing to you people?!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_175: You fold up the letter for now, keeping it safe in your pocket
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_181: You think for a moment about what to ask the two of them...
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_188: "What kind of enterprise do they run?":
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_190: "What exactly did they want with all those catfolk?":
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_194: "I guess that's enough questions for now...":
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_198: <PLAYERNAME> := So, who exactly is your employer? That would help us a lot.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_199: Gehman looks in opposite directions before coming back to you.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_201: Sting := You are really not knowing how mercenary work is conducted.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_203: Sting := Coded messages, yes yes, not knowing anything about who is sending.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_204: Sting := Decoding messages was like needle in eye. It is why I was having Gehman do it.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_206: Sting := Yes, well I was very much overjoyed when they were saying they would not be sending more. If only they had kept sending more liquor...
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_207: <PLAYERNAME> := Really covered their tracks then, huh?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_208: Prism := Indeed... We only... ever met... one man...
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_210: Sting rolls her eyes, only to gesture vaguely.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_211: Sting := We should not be saying this, but he was very bland man, wore a bandanna. I am doubting this is helpful at all
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_213: Sting := Gehman, do not be giving them too much help!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_214: Sieger doesn't say anything, but looks at you with a nod.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_218: <PLAYERNAME> := What kind of enterprise do they run?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_219: Sting := You are beating me. They only ever arranged to meet in shady inns.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_222: Her face gets hot, as she slaps Gehman on the back of his head.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_224: <PLAYERNAME> := Whoever they are, they must have been pretty wealthy to arrange all of this.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_225: Sting := I am thinking you are right, but that is easy enough to see. You are not clever because of it.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_229: <PLAYERNAME> := What exactly did they want with all those catfolk?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_231: Sting := I am not remembering so well, but perhaps if you would be giving me some liquid reminder... Some bottles from our camp?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_233: Sieger := We could perhaps arrange that. If-
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_234: Prism := We... don't know... though, Sascha?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_236: Prism := They wanted... a gross though.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_238: <PLAYERNAME> := That's twelve dozen. Or twelve twelves, or a hundred and forty four.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_242: Sting := I can be giving you suggestions, if that is what you like to hear?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_245: <PLAYERNAME> := And you were fine with that?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_246: Sting := It is not mattering. Job is job, whether or not we like it.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_252: <PLAYERNAME> := Are there any other poachers? Anything else going on right now?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_253: Sting := That I am not knowing. Is usual for kind of work.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_254: <PLAYERNAME> := Sounds like they would have the funds for it though.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_255: Sting := Perhaps, but none of acquaintances were mentioning any kind of work like this.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_256: Prism := But Sascha... We don't have... a lot of... acquaintances...
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_258: Prism := Not specifically... but I think... they were only... interested... in one shipment...
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_259: Sting := Yes yes, they were mentioning quality over quantities.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_260: <PLAYERNAME> := Well, I guess that's a relief.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_266: <PLAYERNAME> := I guess that's enough questions. Think any of this will help, Sieger?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_267: Sieger puts a hand up to his chin
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_268: Sieger := I think we're definitely on to something. Plus, we've still got quite a few marines picking apart their campsite still.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_269: <PLAYERNAME> := Well, thank you for your time, Sascha and Gehman.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_270: Sting := Do not be mentioning it. We are returning no favor of friendliness.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_271: Prism := Thank you... for helping... I felt... sick? Earlier...
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_272: Sting shoots him a glance, but doesn't say anything.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_276: Sieger := I think that concludes things for now. You two will have to sit tight, but your meals should be coming around in about an hour or so.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_278: Sieger := Well, Brontide, Frontiersman <PLAYERNAME>. If you'll come with me. I'd like to discuss some things before you're dismissed.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_286: You turn to leave, but as you do you hear Sascha speaking up to get your attention.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_287: Sting := I am having to ask though, Farmer {boy/girl/nogoodnik}. Are you really considering going after not just us, but employer as well?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_288: <PLAYERNAME> := Well, I think so. I know we're going to want to make sure that we put a stop to this.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_289: Her expression shifts slightly... softening just enough to see a hint of concern.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_290: Sting := I would be being careful then. You have already done the ruining of one of their plans. I do not know how deep employer's pockets go, but if you begin cutting into 'bottom line' you may find yourself in serious trouble.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_291: <PLAYERNAME> := Well, we're The Union, that's the sort of thing that we deal with.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_294: Sascha grabs your collar though the jail cell.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_295: Sting := I am thinking you are not understanding. We are professionals, we are sure when we are telling you... You are meddling with affairs of people far more dangerous than us.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_299: UnionSoldier := Hey, hands behind the bar!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_304: Just as quickly as she grabs you, Sascha lets go.
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_305: Prism := Sascha is... right... They were... foreboding... even for... mercs like... us...
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_306: <PLAYERNAME> := W-why are you telling me this?
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_307: Sting := Who can be saying... But I am done with visitors for today. Thank you, do svidaniya!
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_314: Before you can say anything more, one of the Marines ushers you back from the cage. Another two, replacing Brontide at the winch, begin raising the cage up and away from the ground
Arc_1_Act_3_Conclusion_Part_2__line_319: Your meeting comes to an end, and in its absence you feel discomforted by their parting words.
Popondopulous Intro__line_4: Popondopulous:= Oi! You there! Don't jusht gawp, y'daft shit, I'm talkin' t'you...! --Urp!
Popondopulous Intro__line_8: Popondopulous:= Yeah, yeah - don't think I don't know who you are! I'd be havin' all the poon in the world... If it weren't for you two! *gulp*
Popondopulous Intro__line_10: Popondopulous:= The four of you think you can jusht shtrut 'round MY town and shtart takin' away MY sexh! With your protagonisht hair an' bottomless ass! I've been here 20 yearsh and shtill haven't gotten any ass!
Popondopulous Intro__line_14: Popondopulous:= I'll shee that the eight o'you are thrown outta thish town shome day!

taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_1: You accompany Yonten to the Monarch Inn and take a seat at an available table, a gentle buzz of conversation washes over you along with the strumming of Dire’s lute and his odd insectoid chirping. Bella takes your order before walking away with a waggle of her wide hips.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_3: You order your usual, Yonten orders four shrubsticks in red sauce, pasta, some yogurt, and a tall glass of creme soda. You two settle down to eat your meal and make some conversation.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_8: <PLAYERNAME> := Huh, thought you liked winter foods.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_9: Yonten := I mean I do, but those are what I’m good at cooking, this is a change of pace y’know.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_12: Things die down just enough that you can think to ask some questions...
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_28: Yonten := Yeah a few places, Southern Crossing was the last one.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_29: <PLAYERNAME> := Didn’t that place get wiped out?
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_30: Yonten := Yeah, I’d rather not talk about it if its all the same.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_32: Yonten := It’s alright, you didn’t know.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_36: Yonten := Ha? Is it that obvious? It’s been awhile since I dated anyone.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_37: <PLAYERNAME> := What, strapping monster like you should be the talk of the town I’d think.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_38: Yonten := Oh come on, I’m strictly average by Yeti standards.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_39: <PLAYERNAME> := Maybe, but Yetis are kind of rare in these parts.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_40: Yonten := You keep this up and you’ll see me blush. Let’s talk about something else.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_44: Yonten := Oh, huh, didn’t expect that one.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_45: <PLAYERNAME> := Well I am trying to get to know you.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_46: Yonten := Fair enough, it’s pretty good. I don’t miss the combat from my old postings and it’s nice being able to take care of Grandma but I do kind of miss my hometown sometimes.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_47: <PLAYERNAME> := Oh, and where would that be?
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_48: Yonten := Highclimb town, it’s a Yeti village and...I’ve been away. Can we talk about something else?
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_54: Your plates are finished and Argontel slides in from cleaning off a different table to add them to the mass of cutlery and dishes floating around in her body, she slides away to get back to her duties. You leave the money for the food with Morgan and make your way outside, as you go you manage to grab Yonten’s hand.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_58: Yonten := Oh uh, walk me back?
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_59: <PLAYERNAME> := That all you want to do?
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_61: Yonten := Well we could go to this spot I know and watch the sunset.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_62: <PLAYERNAME> := That sounds like a good time.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_64: You follow Yonten, hand in hand to the edge of the island and take a seat. A light breeze carries some snow with it and he huddles closely with you for warmth as the clouds swallow the sun and leave the two of you in twilight.
taking_yonten_on_date_1__line_66: Yonten := We should do that again, but I’ve gotta get home, catch you later?
Sailor Intro__line_4: Sailor := Workin' here with Simon's gotta be one of the wildest assignments I've had since I joined the Union! I mean, a real life sharkman from Kuwagra Island! You think he can take on a Sea King all by himself?

Sailor Intro__line_8: Sailor := Now that's gotta be a sight! I should save up for a trip there someday.

KiramArrested___nodes[0]._stepChain[1]._: The trip home takes most of the night, but by morning, Cloverton finally comes into view. You manage to get a few winks, and are finally jostled awake as the ship is moored to the docks.
KiramArrested___nodes[0]._stepChain[3]._: Minutes later, you disembark. A small squad of soldiers walk Kiram in the direction of the prison.
KiramArrested___nodes[0]._stepChain[7]._: It’s been a long trip for us all Frontiersman {0}. Tell you what, you go, get some rest.
KiramArrested___nodes[0]._stepChain[8]._: Thanks Sieger, I appreciate it. But, what about Kiram?
KiramArrested___nodes[0]._stepChain[9]._: Well, we’ll be holding him here while we determine exactly what charges to bring against him. It could take a while while Jubelle sends for the files on him.
Is there any chance I can speak to him?
Well, of course, if that’s what you would like. Like anyone held in our jail, he’s allowed visitation. I’d recommend you take it easy though, It would do you good to clear your head after everything that’s happened.
I know he’s a pirate, but he’s not all that bad a guy once you get to know him.
If you’re vouching for him, I’m sure he’s not…

But, that doesn’t change the fact that he kidnapped you, and put you in danger. He still has crimes to answer for, and I’ll be sure that it’s done fairly and just. Now, be sure to rest, no doubt you’ve been through quite the experience!

Well, do we have a better lead?
Not at the moment.
Well, what do we have to lose? And what if Kiram’s right and we send him off to Peregrin Gate’s prison anyway?
Well, Frontiersman {0}, if your gut is telling you something, then we can devote *some* resources to this. Jubelle?
… I can send a request to The Reconnaissance Division, but I’m pretty sure Goldra’s scouts are busy watching for more poachers.
That, and doing preliminary expeditions to that Dungeon Archipelago that’s drifting in along The Frontier’s border. That’s its own logistical problem until we can find an easier way to get there.
If we did that, would that satisfy your curiosity, Frontiersman {0}?
It would, and Kiram?
Sieger looks over to Kiram, his face tightened in deep thought.
Captain Kiram. I can’t say I see whatever it is that Frontiersman {0} sees, but I trust {0|them|him|her}, and {0|their|his|her} gut feelings.
Sso…?
If we were to commute your sentence for now, do you think you can agree to assist Frontiersman {0} in whatever it is they need, until we’re able to get to the bottom of this Robbin’s business?
Sir, he-!
Aye…
If you can do that, and if your tip leads us somewhere, *and* if it seems you’ve changed your ways… Perhaps we can talk clemency then.
Jubelle purses her lips, writing something down.

Until then, you won’t leave this island without Frontiersman {0} accompanying you, and I don’t want to see any mistreatment of any citizens of Cloverton, The Kingdom, or any pilfering of their things. How’s that sound?
Well, thank ye, Sieg- Commander Sieger, sir! That’s more agreeable a deal than I thought I’d ever get.
Good. Operations Director Jubelle, if you could write up the necessary paperwork?
You should consider yourself very fortunate that {0} here has vouched for your character.
Sailor’s got a good heart. I want you to know, that if I see you step out of line, or try to harm {0|them|him|her} in any way, the paperwork to Peregrin Gate will be the least of your worries.
Jubelle leaves through ramp
With that Jubelle turns and leaves, her tail curved straight up her back.
It’ll take the rest of the day to release Kiram here, and return his effects to him, so if the two of you have anything to say before we finish this meeting?
Thank ye, {0}. I don’t know what’d I do without yer help. I’ll do me best to return tha favor.
KiramRecruitment___nodes[13]._stepChain[: I’m gonna head out for now, you hang tight, okay?
Kiram raises an eyebrow, but waves you off.
Not exactly tha kind o’ advice a pirate likes to hear, {0}! I’ll be here if ya need me though!
KiramRecruitment___nodes[14]._optionData: I hope your land legs are steady, because you’ve got a lot of work ahead.
Well, let’s hope for your sake, that lead helps us out plenty.
Get some rest, Kiram. We’ll figure it all out once you’re on the other side of those bars.
KiramRecruitment___nodes[15]._stepChain[: I hope your land legs are steady, because you’ve got a lot of work ahead.
Yarr harr harr! I’m used ta doin’ all sorts of labors, this’ll be like another day aboard tha ship!
KiramRecruitment___nodes[16]._stepChain[: Well, let’s hope for your sake, that lead helps us out plenty.
Aye, I swear it. Now let’s just hope yer spies are worth their salt.
KiramRecruitment___nodes[17]._stepChain[: I think we both need some rest, we’ll worry about the rest later.
Aye, I could use a few winks, long as Sieger here doesn’t need anything else from me?
Not until I sign the letter for your commuted sentence, you’ve got a few hours that I wish I had.
KiramRecruitment___nodes[18]._stepChain[: Let’s head out, Frontiersman {0}, I’ve got plenty to do, and I’m sure you will soon too.
Sieger turns, motioning for you to follow him up the ramp. You follow, heaving a sigh of relief even as you realize the work ahead of you, and the looming questions about the merchant, Robbins…
Noble Talk__line_4: NobleM := Ahh Sea Kings swallow me! I knew we should have had our valet check the proper schedules for merchant arrivals, the vendor isn't here yet!
Noble Talk__line_6: NobleF := I really should go wrangle my sister before she fills our reserved luggage space with commoner garbage again...
Noble Talk__line_8: NobleF := I’m still recovering from that horrific episode with the pillows. These plebeian beasts don't even use hottons for stuffing!

Merc Intro__line_10: Mercenary := Alright, time to put the old girl to work.
Merc Intro__line_14: <PLAYERNAME> := Work? Doesn't seem like a Frontier town would be that busy to necessitate a sellsword.
Merc Intro__line_16: Mercenary := Ah. Some eggheads have hired me to escort 'em from Cloverton into the depths of the Frontier. You know, searching for something they call health potion or whatever.
Merc Intro__line_18: Mercenary := They always yammer about, you know, the usual. 'Nother waste of their time but 'nother generous payday for me!
Merc Intro__line_20: Mercenary := Stock up before you venture in yerself chum. It ain't gonna be Central Kingdom's paved streets and royal guards on every corner, we're talking dismemberment by sharp claws and eaten whole by sea kings, you know, that's why I chose a weapon with a long handle: it keeps me as far away as possible!

JubellePoacherTrapTurnIn___nodes[2]._ste: Jubelle, I have some good news.
Oh? Well I wouldn’t mind some good news. What is it, Sailor?
I’ve finished disarming all of the traps that were strewn about the Savannah!
Jubelle whistles, nodding.
That is good news! I’m sure Station Mistress Catarella will be glad she won’t need to stretch the scouts too thin. You also saved me a good amount of paperwork too.
And, I’m sure many of the scouts will be glad to know they won’t step right into one while they’re on their rounds.
Something wrong?
Let’s just say, I really hope that none of our scouts were falling for those traps… There were some- some *interesting* designs.
You take a moment to explain to Jubelle some of the more inventive designs you saw.
Well damn… Sorry, pardon my language.
Clearly they seemed to be working though, whether it was desperate monster kin, or starving, or… deprived of a bit of “shore leave,” if you catch my drift.
You still did a good thing taking care of those traps. This will go a long way to helping us stabilize that savannah archipelago’s ecosystem.
Jubelle gives you a pleased nod, taking a moment to write something down. As she does, Minerva leans over the nearby counter.
I apologize for prying, a terrible habit really, but I happened to overhear that you dealt with those ghastly traps I have been hearing about? Also, Jubelle, language.
Sure did!
Congratulations are in order then! While I am reluctant to see you wandering through such dangerous and untamed islands, you have certainly done a good deed, {0} dear.
Well thank you, that means a lot!
Minerva nods, but then notices Jubelle has finished writing.
Now, if you will excuse me, I will let you get back to your proceedings.
That’s high praise from Minerva, to be disregarding your “flagrant hikes” through the nearby Savannah.
Jubelle says that with a teasing tone. Minerva looks over to Jubelle, but does not add anything, instead going back to work.
You deserve a bit of praise from The Union as well! Now, I had a feeling you’d be able to take care of this for us. So, I set aside something we requisitioned a while back, but didn’t end up using…
Jubelle produces a crystal from her pouch that glows vibrantly in her hands.
A Ley Crystal… And it’s charged! We just had one of these laying around?
Well, technically, Commander Sieger and Lieutenant Commander Brontide wanted a new, heated swimming pool for the marines, but I think Cloverton would be better served with it in your hands.
Well, we should still get on that swimming pool at some point. But, I definitely know how I can put this to good use!
Excellent, and not to worry, I already did all the paperwork!
Jubelle stands there, her tail wagging proudly.
Thank you Jubelle, you’re the best!
The same goes for you, Sailor. Now if you’ll excuse me. I need to figure out what to do with these crates of pool toys we got…
You leave Jubelle to sort things out.
Peasant Intro__line_6: PeasantM4 := Ya ever considered moving out further into the Frontier?
Peasant Intro__line_8: PeasantF5 := And getting mauled by a half naked catgirl?

KiramDocksBarks___nodes[2]._stepChain[0]: Sun’s out, that makes for good drinkin’ weather in my opinion! Just me an’ a tankard… Ahh, ye talked me into it {0}, I’m gonna go get a drink!
Yarrharr {0}! Enjoyin’ tha weather? I plan to vacate the area an’ find some shade to relax in, maybe catch a nap while I’m at it!
Lookit tha sky {0}, not a cloud ta be seen! I’d suggest takin’ a ship fer a joyride if it weren’t fer my probation preventin’ me from stealin’, an’ thievin’.
Big plans tonight {0}, I plan on goin’ to tha Monarch, gettin’ myself a drink, an’ talkin’ shop with Thrund. ‘E’s a good cook, yeah, but my Survivor Slop beats his easy!
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[3]._stepChain[0]: A small drizzle like this is nothin’ compared to tha storms you’re liable to sail through! Why, I could manage to walk the deck and not slip even once!
Tha rain’s a savin’ grace ta every hungover pirate about ta miss their ship. Most people ain’t gonna notice ya till well after noon, but tha rain’ll get ye on yer feet just in time ta leave port!
Be mindful {0}, of tryin’ ta wash yer mouth with rainwater. Plenty o’ pirates do that, an’ sometimes wind up with a mouth full a’ microplankton fer their troubles.
Didja know {0}, there are places in tha world where the salt is *so* high in the surrounding islands, that even the rain becomes a bit briny.
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[4]._stepChain[0]: {0}! Brisk out isn’t it? Best be careful if yer plannin’ on walkin near the edge o’ somethin’, a random gust could knock ya right over!
Yarrharr! Found meself a perfect nap spot, plenty o’ leaves ta act as me bed… Now all I need is a large mug o’ somethin’ good, an’ I’ll have the perfect conditions fer nap time!

Ahoy {0}! I was about ta do some sweepin’ when wouldn’t ya know it, Morgan came over with a free beer from the Monarch, so I went over ta thank Camellia, and… Well, long story short, I may not have done a lot *here*, but I helped out down at the bar!
Ahhh, feel tha wind in yer hair {0}! Can’t get much better than the bit of reprieve that it offers against an otherwise stuffy day!
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[5]._stepChain[0]: Whew! {0}! Storms like this are wonderful when you’re piratin’! I’ve captured many a ship that came outta storm like this! It takes a professional crew to get through a storm with all hands, but no crew is good enough to escape a storm unscathed!
Gotta say {0}, I like that I’m not *always* in tha skies anymore. Storms like this are perilously navigated, and being at the wheel and fighting a tempest is nerve-wracking.
Haha! D’ye hear tha roar of that thunder {0}? Like canonfire from the skies above! Make sure ya cover yer ears when you see the lightnin’, else yer liable to deafen yerself!
I’ve been in much worse places durin’ a storm {0}. Imagine bein’ on a dhingy when the skies are like this! I figured after, if I can survive that, I can survive almost anything!
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[6]._stepChain[0]: Brrrrr! Gotta say {0}, being bare-chested while it’s snowing out has *very* few advantages… But I suppose I can have an excuse to show off my chest hair~!
{0}! You should be mindful to keep yourself warm when it’s snowing like this! Some mulled wine will do in a pinch, but I prefer myself a nice piping hot mug o’ cider!
I went ahead to tha Monarch earlier an’ shoveled tha snow away fer Camelia. ‘Course it weren’t fer free, I got a warm drink, an’ a hot meal as thanks!
Looks like there’s gonna be a fresh blanket of snow when all things are said and done. Maybe I’ll set a tent up fer meself later, let tha snow cover it an’ let it insulate me against the cool.
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[7]._stepChain[0]: Sea Kings this *heat*! Had I the resources, I’d submerge myself in a bath o’ ice until the weather decided it was gonna be more amicable!
Tha Monarch has been keepin’ me nice an’ cool. They got plenty o’ ice, and need chores done, long as I do tha work, I get my drinks nice an’ frosty~.

Scales and Kings, can’t stand this heat… I’m half-tempted to go completely topless, sure there might be a *few* decency laws I’d be breakin’, but given tha extenuating circumstances, I think I’ll be forgiven.
Ugh, tides… I think I’m gonna find myself a nice cool hole to hide in until this heat ends. If ya need somethin’, please, by all means, come find me.
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[9]._stepChain[0]: {0}! Enjoyin’ that summer heat? Yarharr! Just kiddin’. I plan on gettin a bit cooler down at tha Monarch with some drinks later, so don’t get too hot under tha collar!
Whew! {0}, I just got hit by a hot breeze! Were I still captain’n, I’d have ta adjust sails and change direction so I don’t accidentally get knocked higher into High Climb!

Got a lot of ways to keep cool during the summer heat {0}. One trick is to put a bit o’ salt in yer water, not a lot, but ya got salts in ya that get drained when ya sweat, sure water is all well an’ good, but yer body’s got other things it needs when it’s hydrated.
Ahoy! Keepin’ cool out there {0}? I plan on findin’ myself a nice patch o’ shade and coolin’ down, so don’t tire yerself out too much, cause I know I won’t.
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[10]._stepChain[0: Feel that nip in the air {0}? Autumn is here in all its glory! Down at the docks, I’ll be moving a lot more crates before winter starts to settle in, so don’t be surprised if I got extra Korona to spend!

I jus’ can’t decide if I should be drinkin’ beer, or wine. On tha one hand, beer is good fer almost any time, an’ comes in fun flavors… But wine jus’ *feels* right yanno? Hah, life is so hard with these choices…

I like sailing around autumn, tha warm-cold air, plenty of clear blue skies, and even tha sky predators ain’t as active. Were I able, I’d take a casual cruise through tha currents an’ maybe do a little camping on a small island.
I stopped by tha Monarch earlier, was able ta help apply a fresh coat o’ paint to tha sky-side. Ya can’t see it, obviously, but I still got paid in some premium beer~!
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[11]._stepChain[0: {0}! Bit cool out today isn’t it? Don’t mind me though, I’m perfectly fine! My chest hair is a natural insulator, and keeps me nice an’ warm, even when bare-chested!
Brrrr! {0}, it’s startin’ ta feel a bit chilly now… I’d put on a coat, but I’d rather stay at tha Monarch an’ get toasty by tha fire.
Ahoy! Plans for today {0}? Mine are mostly to sit at tha Monarch an’ relax. I know I don’t look it, but I deserve a nice rest after all tha work I’ve been doin’!
Ahhh, smell that crisp wintery air {0}! I’ve got plenty o’ experience sailin’ in High Climb, I barely notice how thin tha air can get anymore!
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[12]._stepChain[0: One o’ tha best times fer piratin’ is spring… Well, really it’s any time o’ year. Merchants get laden down with a lot of goods they saved up over the winter, and some are so eager that they travel with a *very* light escort.

Ye Scales… I remember back when I was a young matey in my corsaire days. Tha ol’ Cap’n would open up a fresh barrel o’ rum whenever Joy King day rolled around. ‘E loved ta crack one open, jus’ in case tha Joy King ‘emself happened to stop by.
Ahhh, that fresh spring air makes me feel a bit thirsty… I wonder if Camellia has gotten some more beer in. I might just stop by later an’ find myself a drink!
Ahoy {0}! Got any plans fer tha season? I’m gonna be workin’ down at tha docks fer a bit, get some income fer myself so I don’t have ta beg fer a beer!
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[14]._stepChain[0: I’ve been makin’ some progress gettin’ crates unloaded fer Market Day. Tha merchants can use all tha help they can get, an’ are willin’ ta pay *much* more than normal so they don’t run outta stock.
{0}! Once the day’s done, I’mma find myself a nice, cozy spot an’ rest. My feet are killin’ me from all tha unloadin’ I’ve been doin’ today!
Ahoy! Nice ta see ya out today! I don’t got much in tha way of shoppin’ ta do, so I’m just gonna get tha work outta tha way an’ hit tha Monarch after!

Ahhh, with all tha work done today, I’m proud that Market Day was able to go off without a hitch. While it’s goin’ on though, I’m gonna avail myself of some beverages in celebration of a job well-done~
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[15]._stepChain[0: Ahoy {0}! I’ve been volunteered to help with loading and unloading goods for the Caravan today. Fortunately I’ve worked out a deal! I help unload, and I get *one* jug of starshine!

Yanno, back when I was piratin’ with tha Corsairs, there were more than a couple Brownie Caravans that I raided. There were some very good hauls, but… Well… Turns out when ya don’t make good friends with tha only nomads, gettin’ help when ya need it becomes difficult.
{0}! So good ta see ya! I’ve already taken a part of the festivities myself! With all that done though, I’ll be finding a nice spot to lay down and get a nap, have fun~!
I really appreciate tha Brownies makin’ their way out ‘ere fer business. When I was… Much younger, I loved seeing their caravans flying in, an’ give me a look at a much wider world.
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[17]._stepChain[0: {0}! Planning on takin’ part in Matchmaker Day? Well, good luck fer ya! I myself am absolved from it, given my… Extensive criminal record, and current status as ‘under house arrest’, so have fun fer me, okay?

Ahoy {0}! Another Matchmaker Day has come around! I gotta say, it’s been a *long* long while since I was a part of it. Might surprise you, but pirates don’t generally make time fer dating when there could be loot.

Yanno, it’s nice ta see everyone coupled up here… Lotta familiar faces happy that they get ta spend time with friends an’ loved ones… Guess some of ‘em just needed a government-mandated excuse ta hang out!

I spoke with Yuuga earlier, she’s got a sense of humor I really like. Why if I were twenty years younger, an’ a bit dumber, I’d have asked *her* out on a date.. ‘Course, I know better than ta try my luck with a refined woman like that!
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[19]._stepChain[0: Whew! Been a minute since I saw Beth and her man Josiah. Last I saw ‘em.. Musta been a decade back when I was at port somewhere along the fringes. They showed up to bless tha local harvest, an’, well… They were some mighty fine drinkers!
{0}! Word through the gempas vines is that *you* were given some special seeds by Josiah fer tha Solstice! I’ll be on stand-by if ya need some help!

Ahoy there! Yanno, back durin’ my piratin’ days, the solstice was one o’ tha few holidays we observed. Mostly ‘cause in some places it’d get so hot that we couldn’t get near without sweatin’ our entire body weight. It’s very nice ta be able to celebrate in a town fer once.
Gotta admit, I do like how tha scenery feels more… Vibrant. Things growin’ around Josiah an’ Beth bloom in tha most beautiful ways.
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[20]._stepChain[0: Ah! Provisions Day… ‘S been a while since I’ve been a part of it. I’ve been told though ta give myself a rest today. Apparently I’m allowed this day off even during probation!
{0}! Have any plans fer today? I’m gonna spend time at tha Monarch later, Kellam an’ I are gonna have a contest ta see who can clear out Camellia’s Provision Day Reserves faster!
Ahoy! I got a bit of time before I am needed elsewhere… Well, not really *needed* per say… Yanno, it’s been a heck of a year {0}, an’ I’ve really come ta appreciate tha time I’ve spent in Cloverton.
Yanno, I wonder if Beauclaire has a fella back home waitin’ fer her… Or if she’d be interested in a swarthy pirate for a quick fling~!
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[21]._stepChain[0: {0}! C-can you c’mere. That… That’s the REAL Sebastian coordinating the Hunt isn’t it? I just… I’m *such* a huge fan of his, I’ve followed his career since I was a lad, and now… Please keep me from doin’ anythin’ dumb around him *please*!
Ahoy {0}! Gotta say, not a huge fan o’ this holiday. I’ve ‘ad ta fight too many beings from tha Mirror World ta be excited about tha prospect o’ fightin’ more.
I think my only solace fer this holiday will be tha Monarch. Partially because it’ll have plenty o’ people hidin’ out in it, an’ also because Camellia will be openin’ tha special reserves fer us.
Ah, {0}, nice ta see ya! I’m not gonna be up to much ‘till the Haunt passes. I can go out an’ fight an’ whatnot, but… Well, my heart just won’t be in it.
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[24]._stepChain[0: Haw! I’m guessin’ you met with Jerikan? He’s an ill-tempered one, that’s fer sure… Can’t blame him much fer it though. Much as I’d like ta get along with ‘im, it seems he’d much prefer ta keep me at arm’s length.

Jerikan’s in town today if ya haven’t noticed. Back in my military days, monster traders were much more… Unregulated. It’s better now, but only because people like Jerikan stepped up an’ forced tha Kingdom to do something about it.
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[25]._stepChain[0: {0}! Valpongis is in town today! I’ve bought a few curios offa him. Used to, back in tha day, I’d sell him some artifacts under tha table, but when I went pirate… Well, can’t really do business in the Kingdom when your handsome mug is on every Wanted Poster in tha frontier.
I collected a couple things fer myself from Valpongis. Took a little extra barterin’ ta get him ta relent… But now I’m the proud owner of *one* fancy drinking stein!
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[26]._stepChain[0: Ya stopped by Digger yet? She’s in town today, an’ I already helped offload some of her goods. I don’t really got a reason ta shop with her unless I gotta DIY somethin’, an’ even then, wood is pretty easy ta come by.
Gotta say, merchants like Digger are invaluable when yer on the edge of tha law. When ya need raw materials to patch yerself up, yer willin’ ta pay any price fer tha materials.
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[27]._stepChain[0: If there’s one rival I have when it comes ta culinary pursuits, it’s Rotisseur. It’s one thing that she can make a meat so juicy and delicious that it’ll haunt yer dreams, it’s *another* thing ta call Survivor Slop ‘slop’! The nerve of her!
Gotta say… Even though Rotisseur won’t try tha Survivor Slop, I do appreciate her skill with meat. I’ve never had a head fer grillin’ myself, but she makes it into an art form!
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[28]._stepChain[0: Yanno, there were lots of veterans that, after tha wars, wound up untethered and wanderin’. Greenthumb didn’t serve in the same places that I did, but I’m glad that he found somethin’ ta keep himself happy.
I don’t got much use fer seeds, but some o’ tha food Greenthumb sells is top-quality. Fresh foods taste much better than rations… An’ make fer a delicious side fer tha Survivor Slop~.
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[29]._stepChain[0: I’ve not got much business with Vodan or Skandr. I’ll say that Skandr has really picked up tha torch when it comes ta the monster nobility. There are many more monster nobles and scions than when I was young.

Gotta say, I appreciate how nurturin’ Vodan is to tha eggs in her charge. There have been some merchants from tha bad ol’ days that treated monster eggs like they were objects. She gives them tha affection that they *should* be gettin’.
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[30]._stepChain[0: Yarharrharr! I love seein’ Rekk around. Tha ol’ so-and-so is a credit ta scavengers everywhere! ‘is ability ta find them ‘diamonds in tha rough’ is nothin’ short of almost cheatin’!

Back durin’ my soldierin’ days, I knew quite a few people like Rekk. It’s illegal ta scavenge and dredge from battlefields, but… Well tha pay was significant if you were willin’ ta just look tha other way. Way I figured it, if I didn’t, someone else would, an’ I’d just be losin’ out on money I coulda sent back home.
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[33]._stepChain[0: From what I heard that Ripper Cat was one of many.. Experiments given ta Sting an’ Prism. Good on ya fer takin’ it out, an’ helpin’ them miners {0}.
Yarrharr, that Ripper Cat must’ve been a great danger ta tha mines. You takin’ it out kept it from rampagin’ further, so good job {0}!
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[34]._stepChain[0: From what I heard, takin’ out that Wizard’s experiment probably kept it from rampagin’ ‘cross tha entire dungeon. I dunno what havoc it woulda caused had ye not takin’ it out.

I remember hearin’ about tha avalanche where tha Wizard’s Lab was in the Savannah. I dunno what happened, but I guess it’s a good thing ya got out when ya did, otherwise ya might’ve gotten trapped inside!
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[35]._stepChain[0: From what I heard, that Kelpie had been obstructin’ tha frontline for a while. I think Prism an’ Sting knew ya were gettin’ close, so made a massive play ta buy themselves more time… Course, coulda been just a coincidence that it was there, so who knows.

Kings and Scales… What I wouldn’t give ta know how Vaskin is gettin’ control over these homunculi… A siege-maker like tha Kelpie is powerful, havin’ control over somethin’ like that… Well, I wonder just *what* is Vaskin plannin…
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[36]._stepChain[0: Yanno, I didn’t think much of Sting or Prism when they showed up. They were late-comers to tha operation, but they were able to get their hands on what Vaskin needed. Course, I don’t think they really liked tha life that we lead, but it was their only option.

I don’t think that Vaskin is good at puttin’ a person’s skills to tha best use. Sting an’ Prism woulda done a lot better in support roles… So I wonder why Vaskin sent them out in the first place, what was tha plan?
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[37]._stepChain[0: Takin’ out Rook musta *really* hurt Vaskin’s operation. ‘E was one o’ tha few people I’d call ‘competent enough ta leave on their own’. Meanin’ that Vaskin will ‘ave ta be more ‘hands on’ if he plans on keepin’ his operation runnin’.
Outta all tha operator’s that worked with Vaskin, I respected Rook tha most. Not nearly as psychotic as some of tha other people, an’ I even had a few good conversations with ‘im over tea.
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[38]._stepChain[0: Yanno… I never thought I’d live in a world where I’d never ‘ave ta see Boethilde again. She was always a constant presence around Vaskin, an’ I figured I’d ‘ave ta fight ‘er at some point… But now?... Well now I think I can sleep a bit easier.

Boethilde was tha best representation of how good Vaskin is at manipulatin’ people. Any other person she’d ‘ave killed immediately fer what they did, but him.. He ‘ad what she wanted, an’ knew how to apply tha pressure to get what he wanted from her.
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[39]._stepChain[0: YARHARR! {0}! Haw… He’s gone… I can’t believe it’s over, no more lookin’ over my shoulder fer that foul face of ‘is. I can’t speak fer what’ll come next, but takin’ out Vaskin was doin’ tha world a favor!
That slimy barnacle is finally gone! Whew… He was truly a blight on this world, an’ now that he’s gone… Well, I think I’m gonna keep celebratin’ every day fer at least a year!
KiramDocksBarks___nodes[42]._stepChain[0: I’d served with tha Corsairs for almost half my life before now. I already told ya about how we operated, I think. But we operated far an’ wide. Before Rourke stepped in, ya couldn’t find a better crew than tha Corsairs!

We ‘ad plenty of colorful members in tha Corsairs, kinda like tha eclectic bunch you’ve managed ta fall in with. Why, if I didn’t think better of it, I might suggest you try your luck in tha skies! Yarrharr!

Early on I really liked bein’ a pirate. It was much like stayin’ in tha Navy, but with better pay. Every day we’d set out on a new mission, to a new frontier, it was exciting and terrifying, an’ even better was when we found treasure… Course it couldn’t last forever, but I liked them days

Rourke takin’ over tha pirates was… Bad. I think tha only solace I can take is that most o’ tha Corsairs outright deserted when they could, my only wish is that I could track down tha old crew… Make sure they were okay yanno?
Birma Shop__line_4: Birma := Hey there <PLAYERNAME>, come to see what I've been baking?
Day3Start__line_4: Jubelle := Alright <PLAYERNAME> today we’re going to learn about monsters. We need to go to the Guild in Cloverton.
GradMonsterLeft__line_2: You awaken to find a note on your desk, official paperwork and a small letter of goodbye from one of your monsters.

GradMonsterLeft__line_7: You really should try to do a better job of staying on top of these events, it looks bad when you miss a graduation.
Day6AfterHatch__line_4: As if on cue, the egg cracks and splits open, an organic mass spills out, quickly shifting and taking the shape of an adult monster. Jubelle makes a few notes on her clipboard.
Day6AfterHatch__line_6: Jubelle := Okay, <PLAYERNAME>, can you tell me what you know about monsters and their care?
Day6AfterHatch__line_17: <PLAYERNAME> := Well, like all living things, monsters need food. They can get sick, they need a space to sleep, entertainment, exercise, etcetera. Now that the barn is repaired they should be able to rest comfortably.
Day6AfterHatch__line_18: Jubelle := A good summary... And you really should get your house repaired.
Day6AfterHatch__line_29: <PLAYERNAME> := Monsters can be used to harvest Essence and are also an excellent source of labor. I probably should set up some kind of job board.
Day6AfterHatch__line_30: Jubelle := You wouldn’t be able to breed or harvest from a monster if they’ve done a job that day, though.
Day6AfterHatch__line_31: <PLAYERNAME> := Yeah, but it would really help the farm.
Day6AfterHatch__line_32: Jubelle := Just try and remember to balance your need for essence and monster related products with your need for crops.
Day6AfterHatch__line_43: Jubelle := Alright then, I do believe that covers everything, up to and including a bucket list wish. See you soon, Frontiersman?
Day6AfterHatch__line_45: Jubelle := Don’t work too hard, and try to get that house repaired soon. We need you healthy.
Day6AfterHatch__line_47: Jubelle walks back into the clouds leading to Cloverton with an obvious sense of purpose.
Mill Tutorial__line_3: <PLAYERNAME> := I'm going to be producing a lot of byproducts and otherwise mostly useless substances both from the animals and my plants.
Mill Tutorial__line_4: <PLAYERNAME> := But thanks to the mill I can turn those into things I can sell or use on the farm!
Mill Tutorial__line_5: <PLAYERNAME> := Now I can do the work here myself or assign the monsters to do it for me.
Mill Tutorial__line_6: <PLAYERNAME> := Either way I'll need to keep track of my supplies and make sure I keep my workers fed.
FarmingUpdate__line_4: Jubelle := I am here to let you that the way we interact with crops has changed!
FarmingUpdate__line_5: Jubelle := Instead of pressing a button or the 1-5 keys to interact with a crop. Those buttons now select the tool.
FarmingUpdate__line_6: Jubelle := Use the interact while standing next to the crop with the tool you want to use to perform that action.

RockInteract__line_1: Hrmmm... Yeah... Nothing I can do to move that now. It'll probably be cleared off by tomorrow, so I better go deal with my crops and check out that dungeon.

JubelleProvisionDay__line_4: It is yet another day on the farm. Though this one differs what with all the cold and snow. Sure its that kind of season but something feels particularly...exposition worthy about today.
JubelleProvisionDay__line_15: Jubelle:= Its an excellent season, I know you have to work hard to keep things going but please take time to care for the ones you love <PLAYERNAME>!
JubelleProvisionDay__line_18: Jubelle approaches you and presses her cold nose against your cheek as she hugs you before walking off.
JubelleProvisionDay__line_22: Jubelle := You don't know what Provisions Day is?
JubelleProvisionDay__line_26: Jubelle := Yes! The year has gone by so fast hasn't it!
JubelleProvisionDay__line_28: <PLAYERNAME> := Yeah sorry, been so occupied. Hard to believe I can finally relax a bit.
JubelleProvisionDay__line_30: Jubelle := Don't work too hard dear.
JubelleProvisionDay__line_32: Jubelle hugs you for a moment and you can feel her warmth and the cold of her nose on your cheek before you two finally part.
JubelleProvisionDay__line_35: With that she leaves, going on her merry way.

Act 1 Fail__line_32: Sieger := What? Hahaha! No my friend, you’re still in the lands of the living!
Act 1 Fail__line_33: Fio := You keep laughin' like that and the headache might kill us.

Act 1 Fail__line_79: Sieger := Who am I? Please forgive me, I suppose we haven’t had the chance to be properly introduced.
Act 1 Fail__line_80: Fio := He runs the garrison you dork.
Act 1 Fail__line_81: Sieger := I am Commander Sieger of the Cloverton Union Outpost! Though you can simply call me Sieger, if you please!
Act 1 Fail__line_82: <PLAYERNAME>  := Wow, so that’s why you recognized me then, I take it?
Act 1 Fail__line_83: Sieger := Haha! Some of that, yes. However, this isn’t the largest town either!
Act 1 Fail__line_84: Sieger := I’m sure nearly everyone knows about your arrival, I’m looking on with great interest in your exploits, <PLAYERNAME>
Act 1 Fail__line_85: <PLAYERNAME> := Well, I’m certainly going to do my best. Though I ended up in quite the scuffle just now.
Act 1 Fail__line_86: Sieger := You’re in one piece, so I’d call it a good fight for you!
Act 1 Fail__line_87: Fio := I'm gonna have to teach ya how to throw a punch aren't I?
Act 1 Fail__line_88: <PLAYERNAME> := Thanks! So, what’s it like being Commander of the Cloverton Outpost?
Act 1 Fail__line_89: Sieger := Well, it means I can help the people of the Frontier! It is a time honored tradition, and one I uphold with great dignity!
Act 1 Fail__line_90: Sieger := If pirates dare attack, or if villains of all despicable shapes and colors rear their heads: I, Sieger, will put a stop to their nefarious plans!
Act 1 Fail__line_91: Sieger clenches his fist and pounds it over his chest with an emphatic thud.
Act 1 Fail__line_92: Sieger := I hope in that respect, I’ll be able to aid you sooner, should you ever find yourself in trouble again, haha!
Act 1 Fail__line_96: <PLAYERNAME> := How did that huge chunk of earth get here?
Act 1 Fail__line_97: Sieger := That? Well, I suspect it floated into your farm.
Act 1 Fail__line_98: <PLAYERNAME> := Well yes, I suppose that is the case. But, what I mean is: What caused it to do that?
Act 1 Fail__line_99: Sieger := Oh, forgive me, haha! It looks like this chunk here was part of a larger island.
Act 1 Fail__line_100: <PLAYERNAME> := Oh, I get it, and it broke off? That explains why there were Catfolk on it.
Act 1 Fail__line_101: Sieger := Exactly! Keen mind, <PLAYERNAME>! I don’t know the specifics, but sometimes Dungeon Islands become unstable, or collide, and these big CHUNKS come flying off.
Act 1 Fail__line_102: Fio := Some yahoo prolly went prospectin' and wasn't exactly careful about it.
Act 1 Fail__line_103: <PLAYERNAME> := Ohh. I suppose unattached to their mother island, they’d begin to deteriorate and begin to lose altitude. That would send them into the paths of other islands, right?
Act 1 Fail__line_105: Sieger := I have no idea! But, you seem to have a good grasp of the concept! All I can say, is that these chunks tend to float around strangely.
Act 1 Fail__line_113: <PLAYERNAME> := “Do we know what island this chunk might have come from though? Seems like it could have floated from anywhere.”
Act 1 Fail__line_114: Sieger := Actually, that I do know! These things tend not to float far from their mamas! So you can safely guess it’s from whatever Dungeon Island has migrated nearby.
Act 1 Fail__line_115: <PLAYERNAME> := Gotcha! Is there a Dungeon Island nearby?
Act 1 Fail__line_116: Sieger := Yes! It’s the one that floated nearby recently. I’m sure of it after seeing those Catfolk that came with it.
Act 1 Fail__line_118: Sieger’s smile changes to a wry one for a moment.
Act 1 Fail__line_120: Sieger quickly shakes his head and beams once more
Act 1 Fail__line_121: Sieger := Now, is there anything else that I can help you with, <PLAYERNAME>?

Act 1 Fail__line_127: Sieger takes a good look at the island chunk, sizing it up.
Act 1 Fail__line_128: Sieger := I wouldn’t worry though, it’ll probably crumble off of your farm before too long, haha!
Act 1 Fail__line_132: <PLAYERNAME> := “Why did those Catfolk attack me? They didn’t even hesitate.”
Act 1 Fail__line_133: Sieger := Ahh, well I might have a clue as to why.
Act 1 Fail__line_134: Sieger’s demeanor changes, becoming more serious than he’s been so far.
Act 1 Fail__line_135: Sieger := I’m pretty sure that these Catfolk came from the nearby Dungeon Island.
Act 1 Fail__line_136: Sieger := There’s been some rumors of Poachers in this region of the Frontier, they might have tracked the Dungeon Island here.
Act 1 Fail__line_137: Fio := Someone prolly needled 'em once too often while trying to get some jink.
Act 1 Fail__line_147: Sieger := Oh, you didn’t know? They’re despicable people.
Act 1 Fail__line_148: Sieger := They trawl through the Frontier and harvest the essence of monsters through grisly means.
Act 1 Fail__line_149: <PLAYERNAME> := How do they do that, Sieger?
Act 1 Fail__line_151: A tight, clammy feeling gathers in your stomach at the word.
Act 1 Fail__line_153: Sieger := Terrible, but profitable among the morally bankrupt.
Act 1 Fail__line_154: Fio := Bloodletting is when they feel nice about it.
Act 1 Fail__line_159: Sieger := Indeed, this no doubt confirms that they’re here.
Act 1 Fail__line_163: <PLAYERNAME> := So that’s probably why they attacked me, right? They can’t take the chance.
Act 1 Fail__line_164: Sieger := Yes. We’ve had a few reports of increased aggression from monster groups along this region of the Frontier, no doubt because of those poachers.
Act 1 Fail__line_165: Sieger takes a deep breath, and his confident demeanor returns.
Act 1 Fail__line_166: Sieger := No need to fret though. It’s the Union’s duty to bring law to the Frontier, and I, Sieger, will ensure that justice is served in the end!
Act 1 Fail__line_167: <PLAYERNAME> := Well, I don’t envy the poachers if you find them, but I don’t think I would pity them either.
Act 1 Fail__line_168: Sieger := Hahaha, they’ll have some time to rethink their ways, thirty to forty years behind bars to be precise!
Act 1 Fail__line_169: Sieger := So worry not, <PLAYERNAME>, all will be well in time!
Act 1 Fail__line_170: Fio := Huh, well I don't doubt your muscles at least.
Act 1 Fail__line_174: <PLAYERNAME> := Is there anything I can do to help?
Act 1 Fail__line_175: Fio := Learn to throw a punch for starters.
Act 1 Fail__line_176: Sieger := You can! I’m glad to hear that your heart also beats to a rhythm of justice!
Act 1 Fail__line_177: <PLAYERNAME> := I feel awful about what’s happening to them!
Act 1 Fail__line_178: Sieger := As any decent person should. But unlike any citizen, you can do something about it!
Act 1 Fail__line_179: Sieger := You’re a Frontiersman of course! You can venture out into the Frontier, and even to Dungeon Islands.
Act 1 Fail__line_181: Sieger := And you put up enough of a fight just now, that I think you could make a difference if you do.
Act 1 Fail__line_182: Sieger := That said, no one should face a cabal of greed such as theirs alone!
Act 1 Fail__line_184: Sieger := Exactly! I’m sure you’ve met more than a few with the merits to venture out, you should talk to them, yes!
Act 1 Fail__line_185: <PLAYERNAME> := Of course, I bet I can convince one or two people to come with me, but how would I get there?
Act 1 Fail__line_186: Sieger := Well for that, you’d want to talk to Jubelle! She’s great. She can set up all of the logistics for transportation out into the wilds. I’d be sunk without someone like her.
Act 1 Fail__line_187: <PLAYERNAME> := Why’s that? Aren’t you the Commander?
Act 1 Fail__line_188: Fio := He's the punchy type, needs someone to make sure the bills get paid and food is on the table.
Act 1 Fail__line_189: Sieger := Of course, I have an excellent sense of justice!
Act 1 Fail__line_190: Sieger := Not so great a sense of direction. Hahaha!
Act 1 Fail__line_191: <PLAYERNAME> := Hah... I see. Well I’ll definitely talk to her if I can!
Act 1 Fail__line_192: Sieger := Excellent! Though of course, you have your other duties as well. I can’t lay any blame on you if you find yourself unable to do so, your intent shows me your strength of character!
Act 1 Fail__line_193: Sieger := Now, is there anything else you have need of?
Act 1 Fail__line_197: <PLAYERNAME> := I have to get going for now, the day’s still early. Thank you again for the help though, Sieger!
Act 1 Fail__line_198: Sieger := Of course, any time a citizen, or Unioneer, is in need of help, I’ll be there!
Act 1 Fail__line_199: Sieger := All right men, if they’re restrained let’s get them down to the outpost.
Act 1 Fail__line_208: Sieger := And after that, let’s head down to the pub. I could use a second breakfast! Haha!
Act 1 Fail__line_209: Sieger turns to leave, but then turns back for one last moment.
Act 1 Fail__line_211: Sieger := Now, one of you better buy the first round, I bought it last time!
Act 1 Fail__line_212: Fio := I think I'm gonna have to find a way to get some booze of my own.
Tro's Lab to Poacher Arc Transitional__l: You hear a knocking at your door, brisk, business like. You answer promptly.
Sieger := Good Day citizen, I hope you have some time to talk.
Sieger := Excellent, you’re aware of the poachers yes?
<PLAYERNAME> := The legal definition thereof or is there a more present problem?

Sieger := There is, in fact, a more present problem. Someone is stripping the region of resources and riling up the local monsters, and I know it’s not you since you tend to leave vegetation and sullen but otherwise healthy locals behind when you hit an area.

Sieger := I need you to apply some good old fashioned violence to the goo infected monsters near the base camp near Tro's Lab. Once we’ve removed them we can push deeper in and start dealing with those poachers.
Sieger := Well that covers what I needed from you, I’ll be seeing you soon I hope.

RooksLetterDialogue___nodes[0]._stepChai: You awake to the faint smell of cigar smoke, and the feeling of a soft weight on your chest: A letter, written on old parchment.
You pick up the letter, a wax seal with an ornate ‘R’ holds it closed.
Opening it you read the words scrawled in a clean, elegant hand. Your eyes begin to scan over the dark, moon-lit words.
To begin with, you have my congratulations on defeating Sting and Prism. While unorthodox, their prowess in combat is fairly regarded amongst mercenaries and sellswords.
RooksLetterDialogue___nodes[2]._stepChai: In addition, you’ve bested The Cyan Corsairs. Escaping from their clutches is no mean feat. You’ve impressed and vexed both me and my employer respectively.
RooksLetterDialogue___nodes[3]._stepChai: To continue though, you have my condolences. The task of bringing you to my employer has now been left to me. Unlike the corsairs I’m no dockside bravo. This is my profession, and I’m quite good at it.
No target has yet escaped my sights. The chances of you bucking this trend are, in a word, unlikely.

However, I will give you an offer. In light of everything, you seem a {0|person|man|woman} of honour. Instead of turning this into a long and needless contest, a contest you will surely lose, I instead propose we meet in single combat. It will be held on a ground of my choosing, but one in which you will be afforded equal advantage.
There is a wonderful, forested archipelago that should lay within your reach. It is there I shall host our confrontation.
If you decide to forgo this offer, should you to tarry too long, or seek to evade me; I will have to deploy other methods. These methods are as distasteful as they are effective.

To start there is that pair at the Cloverton docks, the owl and her boisterous companion. Then there is that Marine Captain, Seiger. If necessary, there’s also that lovely couple, Birma and Clodagh, or all the friendly staff at the inn.
If you doubt my abilities at all, do remember: I have stood above your sleeping form and felt your breath on the back of my hand.
The letter ends, but the chill it gives you feels like pin pricks on the back of your neck. You fold the letter up and put it aside.
… Alright, you’ll get your meeting, Rook.
You return to your bed, but sleep doesn’t return to you. You try to rest yourself for the trial ahead, but all too soon the sun rises.
Farm Scene Dialogue__line_5: You arrive at your new home, a small plot of land with a handful of old buildings. They need some repair and care, but otherwise are still in working order.
Farm Scene Dialogue__line_7: Jubelle := So, here we are. I realize it doesn't look like much, but you have the full support of the guild.
Farm Scene Dialogue__line_9: <PLAYERNAME> := This is great! My very own farm...
Farm Scene Dialogue__line_11: Jubelle uses a quill pen to make some notes.
Farm Scene Dialogue__line_13: Jubelle := Alright I do believe it’s time we moved on to the next part of our refresher course.
Farm Scene Dialogue__line_17: Jubelle := Farming. Unless you’ve falsified your records, you should do fine on this.
GarstFarmIntro__line_2: It does not take long to arrive at your farm. Garst, for his part, is only too happy to settle in. Seeing as how he doesn’t, for the moment, own a personal item beyond the clothes on his back, that is an exceedingly short process.
GarstFarmIntro__line_7: <PLAYERNAME> := Okay, it is small at the moment, but with some elbow grease we should be able to change that.
GarstFarmIntro__line_8: Garst := Well, this is certainly a step up from the Maelstrom’s cascade of debris. Thank you, <PLAYERNAME>.
GarstFarmIntro__line_9: <PLAYERNAME> := Oh, and if you recall anything about your history feel free to tell me.
GarstFarmIntro__line_10: Garst := I shall endeavour to keep you abreast of any developments with my amnesiac condition.

SecondRookLetterForestF2___nodes[1]._ste: Without opening your eyes, you can feel a soft weight on your chest. Could it be another letter from the mysterious sniper…?
Before you can react, you feel the little weight suddenly lift! Is someone there!?
Your heart fills with dread, as you prepare to reach for your shovel…
Oy, oy! What’s the sour look for, {0}? Have a rough night, didja?
Didn’t lookit! You was snorin’ like a Stonebreaker!!!
Wats wrong with it? I was bored! And I’m ready for brekky, so hop to it!
<shake>Get out of here, Fio!!!</shake> You scared the hay out of me!
Oh, and ya had this on yer chest. Didja fall asleep reading, again?
Fio throws something small and flat at you like a frisbee: A letter. You manage to snatch it out of the air, and shoot back an angry glare.
SecondRookLetterForestF2___nodes[2]._ste: To confirm your suspicion, you bring the letter a little closer to your face and take a whiff.
The fine paper smells faintly of cigar smoke, and - What is that… scented moisturizer?
Huh! I wonder what brand he uses…
You break the ornate wax seal, and your eyes quickly find the orderly greeting at the top of the page.
Since I have deprived your personal record of my arrest, it remains that I owe you some professional courtesy or another.
Seeing as I cannot tolerate debt, I have been forced to quickly decide upon your remittance. I hope it will serve you well.
"Remittance"? This guy is seriously deciding how to reward me for beating him?
As per my agreement with my current employer, I stand guard over a number of stout <color=red>gates</color>, perfectly impassable without my employer’s permission…
Coincidentally, it is possible to break through them with a well-aimed shot from a high-calibre rifle.
Should you happen upon any one of these <color=red>gates</color>, my trigger finger may unfortunately slip at just the right moment…
Such are the terrible consequences of having unpaid overtime, I suppose.
I’ll be watching, little Robin Hood.
Signed, <color=red>Rook!</color> Great, another heartbreaking work of self-centered genius. Couldn’t he just have let me arrest him?
Still, if this weirdo’s brain really works the way he says it does, then maybe I can trust him to help me out this once. Only one way to find out!
Day2End__line_5: Kreyton := Alright! Well done, <PLAYERNAME>! I sure hope ya can give me a challenge! Nothin' makes me happier than seein' everybody with a full belly an' knowin' it was my crops that did it.

SummerEventIntro__line_1: You hear a knock at the door. As usual you answer it. There is, however a wrinkle.
SummerEventIntro__line_7: Lucien := Hail and well met my good farmer.
SummerEventIntro__line_9: <PLAYERNAME> := Oh, hello, can I help you?
SummerEventIntro__line_11: Lucien := Why indeed you can! I am Lucien, a traveller from far afield, I come to Cloverton on Sabbatical and seek the aid of an experienced farmhand.
SummerEventIntro__line_13: Beth := And I am Beth, his better half.
SummerEventIntro__line_15: <PLAYERNAME> := Huh, so what do you need me to do?
SummerEventIntro__line_17: Beth := We are caretakers of a powerful Artifact.
SummerEventIntro__line_19: Lucien := Indeed, and to be proper stewards of it we need to perform an important ritual.
SummerEventIntro__line_23: Beth := One invoking the nature of harvest and care for the land. We have many skills and can manage some agricultural feats on our own but we aren’t specialists like you darlin’.
SummerEventIntro__line_28: "No, this sounds way too freaky for me":
SummerEventIntro__line_33: Lucien := Take these seeds, grow them and then when they have reached fruition they will open a portal into my tome. From there gather your mightiest comrades, overcome the beasts within and you shall gain a great prize.
SummerEventIntro__line_43: Lucien := A powerful tincture that can make any crop reach harvest in but a moment.
SummerEventIntro__line_45: Beth := A kind of super fertilizer if you will. That’s an oversimplification but it’s to the point really.
SummerEventIntro__line_47: <PLAYERNAME> := Wow! That is kind of a big deal, so where can I find you once I grow these seeds?

SummerEventIntro__line_52: <PLAYERNAME> := Yeah I’m a recent arrival to be honest.

SummerEventIntro__line_56: Beth := Regardless we’ll be staying with Kreyton while we’re here.

JubelletoGiev__line_4: // Ahhh, another day on the farm. Now that all of that cat business is out of the way, you can get back to working your beautiful farm!
JubelletoGiev__line_7: // Jubelle walks up to the player from the bridge to town.
JubelletoGiev__line_11: Jubelle := Good morning, <PLAYERNAME>. I know you just woke up and all, but I have an important summons for you.
JubelletoGiev__line_12: You can see her ears twitching slightly, and she is gripping her notebook rather tightly.
JubelletoGiev__line_13: <PLAYERNAME> := Is everything alright Jubelle? You look a little... Tense.
JubelletoGiev__line_14: Jubelle := You have just been summoned by the town Wizard. He specifically contacted me and asked for you.
JubelletoGiev__line_16: Jubelle := He has never contacted me directly for ANYTHING. Whatever he wants from you, it must be important.
JubelletoGiev__line_17: <PLAYERNAME> := Alright well, I guess I will head over there once I am ready. Thank you Jubelle. Where is he?
JubelletoGiev__line_18: Jubelle := He has his workshop in the Windmill in the middle of town, on the highest island. I don't know much else beyond that, but it can't be too difficult.
JubelletoGiev__line_19: <PLAYERNAME> := I'll head over there soon then.
JubelletoGiev__line_20: Jubelle := Take care, please. We can't have anything happening to you so soon after that last trouble you took care of.
JubelletoGiev__line_21: Jubelle := OH! And before I forget. Lucia, said you should come see her sometime today.
JubelletoGiev__line_22: Jubelle := She's our resident foreman and architect.
JubelletoGiev__line_23: Jubelle := She said she's gotten plans ready for improving on your farm whenever you're ready.
JubelletoGiev__line_24: Jubelle := You can find her in the cistern building, the opposite side of the town center from the bridge to your farm!
