ProvisionDay__line_323: Her tongue slides into your mouth and you can feel it, cold but not shocking. Somehow it feels like sweet relief after a warm day and the two of you squirm around on the blankets, legs clapping together until finally it’s too much.
ProvisionDay__line_325: The clothes come off, and you quickly find yourself pressed into the bedding. Her body is strange, almost wooden in places but yielding and soft in others.
ProvisionDay__line_326: She’s relentless, rebuffing your every attempt to take control. She presses you down and grinds her folds against yours. Somehow she tweaks her hips and heat crawls up your spine.
ProvisionDay__line_328: No matter how you move somehow she finds a way to tease your folds. She isn’t using her fingers and somehow she’s already put you over the edge three times.
ProvisionDay__line_329: You aren’t sweating though, and she’s nice enough to pause and kiss you now and again but in the end you simply can’t handle her pace.
ProvisionDay__line_348: // use if player wants to have sex with Clara again
ProvisionDay__line_349: Clara := As you can see everyone has gathered 'round to enjoy the spoils of our victory. Make sure to mingle with your fellows, I'm sure everyone had something to say to a dashing hero like you.
ProvisionDay__line_352: Clara := Care to tend my fields?
ProvisionDay__line_366: // Provision == 8, preventing this scene from appearing again this year
ProvisionDay__line_371: As you and Clara get your clothing back into place, looking only slightly rumpled, you hear the clear ring of metal on glass.
ProvisionDay__line_376: Someone had struck their glass with their knife. The crowd hushes and someone steps forward, standing in front of the tree. They clear their throat and start to speak.
ProvisionDay__line_380: Montalvo := Ah, a fine day for the Union's citizens. Today we celebrate our prosperity and a magnanimous heart. Every year we face harsh weather, vicious bandits, xenophobic monsters, and magic maddened men and women.
ProvisionDay__line_381: Montalvo := It's not all bad. We have our triumphs among the struggle and today we enjoy good food, fine company, and the largess of our homeland's industry. So drink, be merry and enjoy yourself!
ProvisionDay__line_382: Montalvo takes a bow and melts back into the crowd among a small bout of applause and cheers.
ProvisionDay__line_387: Sieger := Well here we are yet again. Despite everything we're not dead, the town is still standing, we have a good stock of food for the future and Union's managed to send us another care package.
ProvisionDay__line_388: Sieger := Thank you all for your work, remember to have faith in one another and to always work together. There's nothing we can't overcome with hard work, a can do attitude, and a good helping of teamwork. So eat, drink, and be merry because tomorrow we'll probably have another problem to solve.
ProvisionDay__line_389: Sieger salutes the crowd and gets back to the business of finishing his drink and eating his weight in good food.
ProvisionDay__line_394: Camellia := I have the pleasure of being the founder, proprietor, and madame of the Monarch Inn. I have seen this town grow from a handful of cobbled together shacks into the bustling business you see before you.
ProvisionDay__line_395: Camellia := Every year we're a little better off and a little happier and it pleases me to see everyone's hard work pay off. So tonight, do me the favor of enjoying yourself because we'll be back to work soon enough.
ProvisionDay__line_396: Camellia saunters back into the crowd, fan in hand, smirk on face. Back to being aloof and mysterious.
Day3Montalvo__line_5: You arrive in Cloverton’s Guild Headquarters. Most matters of commercial concern are handled here. Jubelle places a pair of fingers on your shoulder to get your attention and then points you at a distinctive looking avian man. You approach him as a pair.
Day3Montalvo__line_7: Montalvo := Ah, Signorina Jubelle, I see you have arrived with your protege. <PLAYERNAME>, was it?
Day3Montalvo__line_10: Jubelle := <PLAYERNAME>, this is Montalvo, he’s in charge of the monster indenture contracts.
Day3Montalvo__line_11: Montalvo := A pleasure to make your acquaintance, Ensign. You are here for an introduction, si?
Day3Montalvo__line_13: <PLAYERNAME> := Yeah! Can’t run a farm without Guild connections.
Day3Montalvo__line_14: Montalvo := Indeed, we control everything essential to the business. They taught you at the academy, si?
Day3Montalvo__line_16: <PLAYERNAME> := Yes! I got good grades on monster/human management theory!
Day3Montalvo__line_17: Montalvo := Eccellente, you will not mind giving me a refresher then, si?
Day3Montalvo__line_19: <PLAYERNAME> ?= Uh, sure I guess I’ll start with...
Day3Montalvo__line_33: "Lets just do the short version, I'm busy.":
Day3Montalvo__line_44: <PLAYERNAME> := Monsters have certain inherent traits that can be bred for. Great strength, stamina, intelligence, etcetera. Some are positive, some are negative. Part of my job as a farm owner will be breeding monsters with desirable traits.
Day3Montalvo__line_46: Montalvo := Just so. You can, at least, pay attention to your lessons Ensign.
Day3Montalvo__line_54: <PLAYERNAME> := Hush, I’m going places with this.
Day3Montalvo__line_57: <PLAYERNAME> := Ahem, as I was saying, monsters lay eggs, eggs need to be tended to so that the child inside can hatch. Up until recently, this required a fairly specialized group of doctors, midwives and attendants.
Day3Montalvo__line_59: <PLAYERNAME> := But the reintroduction of ‘Incubation Technology’ by the wizards has both increased the speed with which eggs can be hatched and drastically reduced infant mortality. They are essential to anyone who wants to breed monsters.
Day3Montalvo__line_61: Montalvo := Nicely done. Elementary perhaps, but a thorough reading of the subject.
Day3Montalvo__line_67: <PLAYERNAME> := Monsters, like most life forms, can breed. More importantly, due to oversaturation of magical energy, purebred monsters will, over time, become more and more feral and crazed.
Day3Montalvo__line_69: Montalvo := And there is a way to stop this, si?
Day3Montalvo__line_71: <PLAYERNAME> := Yes, the foundation of certain guilds lies in trade for goods and services with Monster tribes. Humans are incapable of using magic due to a quirk of our biology. Save for a few individuals capable of channeling ley energy without assistance, few, if any, humans make for good magic users.
Day3Montalvo__line_73: Montalvo := And how is this quirk of humanity useful to monsters?
Day3Montalvo__line_75: <PLAYERNAME> := Humans pass their inability to absorb energy onto any offspring they have. Two humans will produce a normal human child. A human and a monster, however, will almost always have a child of the same breed as the monster they partnered with.
Day3Montalvo__line_77: <PLAYERNAME> := As such, many of the relationships formed with independent monster tribes revolve around the ability of humanity to provide those tribes with a long term source of sane, stable offspring.
Day3Montalvo__line_79: Montalvo := Well said, Ensign, but you seem to have forgotten something.
Day3Montalvo__line_83: Montalvo := Just so. Expand on them, please.
Day3Montalvo__line_85: <PLAYERNAME> := Traits can come in many forms in monsters Greater durability and endurance, more magical power, more robust and effective muscles, and so on. With careful selection, these traits can be passed down from parent to child.
Day3Montalvo__line_87: Montalvo := But traits are not strictly positive, no?
Day3Montalvo__line_89: <PLAYERNAME> := No. Yes. Whatever, you know what I mean. Sometimes negative traits will pop up during breeding. These can also be removed with careful selection of partners.
Day3Montalvo__line_91: Montalvo := That seems to be a complete reading of the material. Nice job.
Day3Montalvo__line_98: <PLAYERNAME> := All modern magical devices require essence to work. Historically, essence was collected by either slaying powerful monsters or harvesting certain natural elements. Certain alchemical advancements have rendered both methods obsolete.
Day3Montalvo__line_100: Montalvo := And what would those be?
Day3Montalvo__line_102: <PLAYERNAME> := Bluntly, the bodily fluids of monsters can be harvested and refined into useful essences. Put simply, male and female monsters can have their milk and sexual fluids harvested. Once the magical essence is refined from those fluids, it's ready for use in a variety of industries.
Day3Montalvo__line_104: Montalvo := Always good to see a recruit who can keep a straight face through that explanation.
Day3Montalvo__line_111: Montalvo := Alright, nicely done. Here Jubelle will carry this egg for you Ensign. Your farm should already have a basic incubator ready for use. Go home, lock it in and keep an eye on it. Make sure to come back and see me if you want new eggs or indenture contracts. Really you should be breeding your own workers. As you said, someone has to keep magical corruption rates down.
Day3Montalvo__line_113: <PLAYERNAME> := It was nice to meet you, Mr. Montalvo!
Day3Montalvo__line_114: Montalvo := And you as well, Ensign.
Day3Montalvo__line_118: Montalvo := Ah so that's how it is?
Day3Montalvo__line_120: <PLAYERNAME> := Sorry, I just want to get back to work!
Day3Montalvo__line_122: Montalvo := Fine then, give me this 'short version.'
Day3Montalvo__line_124: <PLAYERNAME> := I take the egg, it goes in the incubator. Out comes monster. Treat monster good so they can join society. If I treat bad I get fined and maybe lose farm.
Day3Montalvo__line_128: <PLAYERNAME> := Collect and sell for a profit so they can be refined into useful materials.
Day3Montalvo__line_130: Montalvo := Alright, I do believe that covers everything. Here Jubelle will carry this egg for you Ensign. As you say 'put it in an incubator and out comes monster.'
ProvisionDayGroup4Buya__line_7: Buya := I simply cannot believe Yonten said that, and with WHOM?
ProvisionDayGroup4Buya__line_8: Tab := Oh yes I've heard it with my very eyes you see!
ProvisionDayGroup4Buya__line_9: OldManHatson := To think kids are up to such things these days, while when I was their age... I was... and we were...... and then......
ProvisionDayGroup4Buya__line_10: OldManHatson := What were we talking about? Hats right?
Outpost Door Scene__line_5: You reach the far end of the courtyard, Jubelle lagging not far behind. In front of you is an enormous two story building, the bulk of which sits on the second story.
Outpost Door Scene__line_6: Its heavy stone masonry rests carefully atop the shoulders of two separate single story buildings. Between them you catch the sight of what would be a quiet veranda, were it not for the sounds of regimented discord flowing down from above it.
Outpost Door Scene__line_7: <PLAYERNAME>    := Oh, this must be the Union Outpost!
Outpost Door Scene__line_9: Jubelle			:= A good eye, Sailor. Might I suggest you check in with them? You are the new Union Farmer after all, it'd be good to meet some of the people you may be working with while you explore the Frontier.
Outpost Door Scene__line_10: <PLAYERNAME>    := That might not be a bad idea. Want to come with? You could introduce me.
Outpost Door Scene__line_11: Jubelle			:= Oh! Thanks for the offer, but if you do go, permission to be at ease. It can be a bit loud up there, and that veranda has my name on it after all this walking.
Kreyton After farm Scene__line_6: <PLAYERNAME>	:= Forgemaker save me! What is that?!
Kreyton After farm Scene__line_7: The island rumbles as a giant figure approaches.
Kreyton After farm Scene__line_9: You answer with a whimper. There is no other sound you can muster for this towering ogre woman.
Kreyton After farm Scene__line_11: <PLAYERNAME>    := Ah! I'm... I'm <PLAYERNAME>! I just got here to Cloverton. I'll be taking care of a farm here.
Kreyton After farm Scene__line_12: The ogress stops, looking at you intently - and then smiles from ear to ear. Sincere happiness flashes in her huge, honest face.
Kreyton After farm Scene__line_13: Kreyton			:=  A landowner! Like me! It is the most amazing thing! I am Kreyton! Kreyton, the oogress, landowner of this cheery farm!
Kreyton After farm Scene__line_14: You gulp. She's extremely loud, and extremely large, but she has a friendly, pleasant voice.
Kreyton After farm Scene__line_15: You give the farm a good look around and are taken back.
Kreyton After farm Scene__line_17: <PLAYERNAME>    := Honestly, it's amazing. The plants are all perfectly cared for, and the soil isn't tired in the slightest. Are you the only one working here?
Kreyton After farm Scene__line_18: Kreyton			:= Aye. It's my heart, this farm. It feeds me! And anyone who's hungry. So I keep it healthy. If yer ever hungry, come! I also sell things. Jerkey. Fresh crackers. Good for a journey!
Kreyton After farm Scene__line_19: <PLAYERNAME>    := I'll be sure to visit from time to time. Just remember, I'm a farmer too! I hope we can have some friendly competition!
Kreyton After farm Scene__line_20: <PLAYERNAME>    := If I ever need anything from you, I'll be sure to let you know!
Giev Expansion__line_4: Giev := Would you like to expand your farm?
ProvisionDayGroup6Edeline__line_6: Edeline := Montalvo my favorite customer! What is that GHASTLY garb you are wearing!
ProvisionDayGroup6Edeline__line_7: Montalvo := What, but this is a new tunic issued to the members of the merchants guild, it's said to be quite fashionable.
ProvisionDayGroup6Edeline__line_8: Edeline := Darling no no no, that is terrible, you can't be found dead in THAT, what will your colleagues think? The buttons are not even gem encrusted, you must come to my shop first thing in the morning tomorrow! Ill give you a special villager discount of 0.5%!
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_3: Jubelle	:= Lady Camellia, I would like to introduce you to someone.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_6: A woman appears next to you out of nowhere.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_7: The woman standing before you looks like a very fancy woman. Fancy in many, many places. All the right places.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_8: Jubelle	:= Ahem. This is Lady Camellia.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_9: Camellia := Don't be such a stick-in-the-mud, my dear Jubelle. Let the Frontiers{man/woman/person} admire the scenery.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_11: <PLAYERNAME> := Ah! Yes. Cloverton is rather breathtaking. I'm sorry.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_12: Camellia := This must be <PLAYERNAME>, the new Frontiers{man/woman/person}.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_14: Camellia := I know a great many things. I also have many expectations of you, my dear.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_15: She presses a finger to her lips as she gives you a coy smirk.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_16: <PLAYERNAME> := Expectations! Sure, 100%!  What sort of expectations?
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_17: Camellia := Eager and straight to business! Wonderful! I want a local supplier to stock my bar and kitchen. I plan to have a lot of coin invested in your farm, <PLAYERNAME>.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_18: Camellia := Not immediately, of course. Eventually I'd like to serve Cloverton Pleepo Gratin with a glass of Cloverton Cheronne Blau.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_19: Camellia := I would love to take pride in something locally grown and locally made.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_21: <PLAYERNAME> := You will! I may be young, but I know my way around a farm patch! Cloverton can count on me!
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_22: You give a quick flex of your arms and pose for Lady Camellia.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_23: Lady Camellia responds with a thin smile, immediately hidden behind her fan.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_24: Camellia := On to it, then. It was a pleasure to meet you in person, <PLAYERNAME>. Jubelle. Enjoy the rest of the day.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_27: Jubelle wags her tail as Lady Camellia leaves and reclines on her lounge chair. You let out sigh and exchange glances with a grinning Jubelle.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_28: Jubelle	:= If I might say so myself, I think she likes you.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_30: Jubelle	:= Lady Camellia is the owner of this place. She's a bit eccentric for some, as there's very little she shares about herself but seems to know everything there is about everyone else.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_31: Jubelle	:= With that said, she does care for the citizens of Cloverton. The Lady also brews some wonderful tea.
Camellia Scene Before farm__line_32: Jubelle closes her eyes and smiles, wagging her tail faster.
ProvisionDayGroup5Fio__line_6: Fio := So you're saying I have to pay taxes to the union just for living in the vicinity of the kingdom and utilizing many of its municipal establishments and services?
ProvisionDayGroup5Fio__line_7: Minerva := Quite correct, this is how most civilized society of a central kingdom opera-
ProvisionDayGroup5Fio__line_8: Fio := HOH lady you are living in a make-believe land!
Rotisseur Market Day__line_4: You come upon a woman who looks vaguely familiar, as if someone had created a person out of a matronly mold and instilled it with happy, domestic life.
Rotisseur Market Day__line_6: Rotisseur := Come one come all, meat, pastries, vegetable dishes. Cooked with a mother’s love!
Rotisseur Market Day__line_26: Rotisseur := I sell food of all kinds, meat, bread, and vegetable dishes. Well, usually one or the other. You look like a strong young guilder, no doubt wrangling monsters and working soil. Come to me if you’re tired from working all day and want something to eat.
Rotisseur Market Day__line_31: Rotisseur := Oh lil’ ol’ me? Well it’s true the girls and I tend to dress the same but really we’re just a bunch of house wives and bachelorettes looking to make our way in the world with our home making skills. Don’t pay me no mind, buy some of my food!
Yonten Intro After__line_4: Yonten			:= Greetings! I'm Yonten the shopkeeper.
Yonten Intro After__line_7: This is a real-life yeti! The yeti are so rare they're almost legend.
Yonten Intro After__line_8: Granted, those legends are mostly about derelict ships with suspicious claw marks and blizzards engulfing towns in the middle of July.
Yonten Intro After__line_9: You feel a chill running down your spine. It turns out that the air around Yonten is pleasantly cool.
Yonten Intro After__line_12: <PLAYERNAME>    := Yes! No. No, you didn't. I was just surprised is all.
Yonten Intro After__line_13: He scratches the back of his neck.
Yonten Intro After__line_14: Yonten			:= Ah, yes. It happens all the time. I am an unusually tall fellow.
Yonten Intro After__line_15: And a yeti. But you can't tell him that.
Yonten Intro After__line_16: Yonten			:= If you ever need me, I'll be behind the counter from sunrise to sunset, six days a week, for all of your salt and biscuit needs.
Yonten Intro After__line_17: <PLAYERNAME>    := Sound great! I'll be sure to visit often.
Yonten Intro After__line_18: Yonten			:= I'll be here. Anything else you want to know?
Yonten Intro After__line_25: "How long do you plan to stay in Cloverton?":
Yonten Intro After__line_31: Yonten	:=	I used to be a sheriff before. Now, I administrate some of the Union's local dealings. That doesn't mean I won't take my shopkeeping duty seriously.
Yonten Intro After__line_35: Yonten := I don't plan to be a shopkeeper forever, though. One day - I'll leave. Maybe I'll go further into the Frontier, maybe back home. Maybe...
Yonten Intro After__line_36: His face changes for a second. It seems like an unpleasant memory flashed in his mind.
Yonten Intro After__line_37: Yonten := Sorry. I'm getting melancholic. Too much time under the hot sun. Anyway, come visit whenever you need something. Chances are, we'll have you covered.
Yonten Intro After__line_41: Yonten := Pleasure meeting you. Hope to see you soon.
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_1: //The player is introduced to the Dock Staff
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_8: The station lies next to you. A tall, cozy looking dockside shack, the hind wall is a hive of shelving and cubbies where all manner of shipping jetsam resides.
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_9: Two dock workers currently man the station. One looks to be a feyish woman, with long earthy-blond hair tied up in a pony-tail.
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_10: The other, towering over the nearby packages, is a tall, white, avian woman who closes her book as you approach.
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_12: <PLAYERNAME>	:= Oh! Jubelle, who are these two, co-workers?
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_13: Jubelle			:= Yes! Good eye Sailor, these two are-
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_14: Minerva			:= The name is Minerva. It would be a pleasure to meet you, but I have not been given the privilege of knowing this Frontiersperson’s name.
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_16: Minerva			:= Ah, <PLAYERNAME>, well, then it is a pleasure to make your acquaintance, please keep out of trouble while you are here. Now, let me introduce you to our station’s darling Ta-
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_19: Tab				:= Hey there, nice ta meetcha! So your name is <PLAYERNAME>? That’s a really nice name! Are you going to be the new Union Farmer? I heard one was coming, but I didn’t think <PLAYERNAME>’d be a cutie!
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_20: Minerva			:= Tabbitha, let us be hospitable to our guest for a change, and not ask th-
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_21: Tab				:= So who’d you get the cute nose from~? Mom or Dad? Where’d you grow up? What’s your favorite food?
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_24: Minerva			:= Please excuse her, <PLAYERNAME>. She has a woeful predisposition for being both immature and inquisitive at the most dreadful of times.
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_25: <PLAYERNAME>	:= N-no, no, it’s okay! It only caught me off guard.
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_26: Minerva			:= Do not worry, Frontiersman. I will take time to remind her of our commitment to professionalism here at the Cloverton Station.
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_27: Minerva         := As for yourself, should you have any need to travel, or to make any personal shipments, feel free to visit us any time.
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_28: <PLAYERNAME>	:= I'll keep that in mind, though I don't know if the chance will come as long as I'm doing my job well!
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_29: Minerva			:= Well, in that case, feel free to drop by any time. I'm sure Tabbitha would enjoy speaking to you. When she has remembered her manners of course.
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_32: Jubelle			:= Sorry about that, Sailor. Tab means well, but she can be a handful for even Minerva sometimes.
Boarding Station Scene dialogue__line_33: <PLAYERNAME>	:= No harm no foul! Now c'mon, you still have to show me around the rest of this town!
Jaero Door Scene__line_7: You watch as Jubelle takes in a deep breath, her demeanor softening for a moment.
Jaero Door Scene__line_8: Even you can pick up on why. The air in this part of town is laced with sweet and fragrant scents, the source of which seems to be the large, two story building in front of you. Carved, hanging planters dangle delicately in front of the door.
Jaero Door Scene__line_10: <PLAYERNAME> := Wow, it smells so nice! Is this a flower shop?
Jaero Door Scene__line_11: Jubelle := That, and more! This is Sunset Emporium, let's head inside and get you acquainted with Jaero.
SurpriseMechanicBandit Market Day__line_: <PLAYERNAME> := Something about this guy gives me the creeps... is that contraband? Why is he hiding?... Maybe I should go get the gua-

SurpriseMechanicBandit := He-llo there VALUED CONSUMER, it am me! Your exclusive client in the acquisition of VALUED GOODS! Me have LOOT, yes genuine LOOT! Buy box, buy key! Open up and see! Become BIG WINNER today!
<PLAYERNAME> := Oh void... What have I gotten into?

SurpriseMechanicBandit := This no SCAM, this QUALITY TRANSACTION! All you, the VALUED CONSUMER, have to do is use PREMIUM CURRENCY to buy SURPRISE MECHANICS! This will synergize with your desire for high quality goods to create ONGOING ENGAGEMENT with SURPRISE MECHANICS!
//show player emote, jiggle it around a bit to indicate yelling

SurpriseMechanicBandit := It's alright, I forgive you, you just don’t know what you want - nay, NEED. But my day will come, someday you will need a BOX OF SURPRISES, and I will be there to provide it!
With that declaration the surprise mechanic bandit hauls ass off towards the city docks.
// Surprise Mechanic Bandit leaves the city
ProvisionDayGroup2Brontide__line_8: Jaero := Why yes, I do admit that the traditional use of the stalk of Lavapple Bloom for this spectacular celebration. Reminds me a lot of the scriptures pertaining to the worship of the Crimson Root-
ProvisionDayGroup2Brontide__line_13: Brontide := Wowee this one has my name on it! Huh no sender card, I wonder what's inside!
ProvisionDayGroup2Brontide__line_18: Goldra := Brontide, damnit, be careful do you even know how hard I looked for that th-
ProvisionDayGroup2Brontide__line_19: Goldra := I mean ...show some dignity as a noble!
ProvisionDayGroup2Brontide__line_21: Goldra nervously crosses her arms feigning indifference.
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_6: // warn if men/women unavailable before showing menu
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_8: Yuuga := Oops- Looks like we're all out of available men. Are you still interested?
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_10: Yuuga := Oops- Looks like we're all out of available women. Are you still interested?
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_15: // no pending dates remain this year, warn before jumping to sex menu or ending
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_18: // if the player has Yuuga's scene filtered, just railroad the conversation to ending instead of showing a single option menu
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_63: // first ticket of the year is free
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_67: Yuuga := Since you already participated this year, that will be <TicketCost> Korona
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_79: Yuuga := Alright, thank you for your payment.
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_81: Yuuga takes your money and drops it into the depths of the oils within her cauldron.
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_93: // continues the sequence in a separate file
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_96: Yuuga := I hope you're ready, because it's time to determine just who your lucky partner is going to be!
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_98: With a wave of her hands, several envelopes magically appear, followed by a short ballot box that poofs into existence behind Yuuga. Tossing the envelopes into the air, each one spins around before making a line right for the slit in the ballot box.
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_100: Once the last one is inside, the box begins to glow and shake, until, finally, it spits out a card to reveal this year’s date...
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_104: Yuuga:= Orchid! Cloverton’s little MISStery! She's promised to put her own little magical twist on your time together.
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_106: Yuuga:= Dire! Some of you here in Cloverton might recognize him as the bard for The Monarch. He’s a very earnest man and has assured that he will give his date the best musical performance he can possibly offer.
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_108: Yuuga:= Sieger! Cloverton’s commander of the guard and local hotty. Often busy inspiring his comrades and keeping the town safe, he says he's looking forward to taking things slow for a bit.
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_110: Yuuga:= Lucia! Voted number one in cuteness for several years running. Our little engineer has always been a fan of pushing the boundaries of what could possibly fit on an island. She has promised to show off her prowess in the form of a "movie night"!
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_112: Yuuga:= Edeline! Ostensibly one of the most mouth-watering women in Cloverton, this merchant-jewler has made a veritable load of gold. She says she wants to keep things very casual and classic for her date, drinks and dinner.
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_114: Yuuga:= Jubelle! Cloverton’s very own Goodest Girl, she performs her duties with precision and elegance. She has apparently made arrangements to ‘fly through the sky’ whatever that means!
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_116: Yuuga:= Morgan! Second-sexiest - but first-cutest - woman working in the Monarch. This fashionista apparently has made plans for some shopping!
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_118: Yuuga:= Simon! Many of you have seen him around, that or he's broken into your house to deliver your packages! The strong fishman has shared that he wants his date to bring a healthy appetite!
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_122: Yuuga := So then, what’ll it be? Are you ready for your date?
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_123: Yuuga := Or will you refuse, and stew in a cell instead?
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_125: Yuuga := So then, what’ll it be? Will you accept this date?
Yuuga Ticket Menu__line_142: // player accepts the date, ends sequence & starts another

Jaero Recruit__line_4: You enter Jaero's shop to the tingle of a small bell. He’s carefully adjusting some blueish fluid mixture with some kind of powder and measures of water.
Jaero Recruit__line_6: Jaero := Ah, welcome <PLAYERNAME>, come to do some shopping?
Jaero Recruit__line_17: Jaero := Glad to be of service! Can I help you in any other capacity?
Jaero Recruit__line_18: <PLAYERNAME> := Yeah! I need to go into the mines to deal with those cats who are causing all kinds of trouble!
Jaero Recruit__line_20: Jaero := I see, and you were hoping I could help?
Jaero Recruit__line_21: <PLAYERNAME> := You can, right? Mandrakes are supposed to have amazing powers!
Jaero Recruit__line_23: Jaero := Well, we usually do, but not all of us are suited for combat.
Jaero Recruit__line_26: Jaero := Thankfully I happen to be fit and reasonably good in a brawl! Shall we go?
Jaero Recruit__line_31: Jaero := Oh, did you need some advice on growing a finicky plant?
Jaero Recruit__line_32: <PLAYERNAME> := Nah, I need to go deal with some cats in the mine, and I need a strong partner to help me out!
Jaero Recruit__line_34: Jaero := Just because I’m a mandrake doesn't mean I have combat abilities. We're all a little different. Some manticores can generate perfume!
Jaero Recruit__line_37: Jaero := Fortunately for you, I do in fact have combat abilities and prowess both! When do we go?
Jaero Recruit__line_39: <PLAYERNAME> := Oh! I will let you know before I head out.
GreenThumb Market Day__line_4: You come upon a bandaged man wearing farmer’s garb. He has the distant look of someone whose mind is occupied elsewhere. Still, at your approach he speaks up.
GreenThumb Market Day__line_6: GreenThumb := Seeds, saplings, seeds and saplings. Cultivated by honest hands. Come to me if you wish to garden or farm.
GreenThumb Market Day__line_26: GreenThumb := Seeds, saplings, plants. I sell plants that I grow. Some of them may be of higher quality than what you have. I do not mean to insult your skill, but one can’t expect to excel in everything, yes?
GreenThumb Market Day__line_33: GreenThumb := I was a soldier, some of my comrades were mercenaries. The distinction is largely academic. We were at war and now we are not. We hope to make the world a better place by growing things and filling the world with life, instead of taking life from it.
GreenThumb Market Day__line_35: <PLAYERNAME> := Sounds like a noble cause to me.
Jerikan Market Day__line_20: You can hear something like a rattling noise coming from what you assumed was some kind of mask. It is, in fact, a large pottery jar.
Jerikan Market Day__line_22: // Make some kind of rattling noise here
Jerikan Market Day__line_24: Jerikan := What’s rude is your ugly face walking up here and expecting service. You’re lucky I can do whatever I want these days, human, I’m too busy to commit to a species wide grudge.
Jerikan Market Day__line_34: Jerikan := What, do you wander all of creation asking everyone’s life story? A human bound me and enslaved me once. I don’t like your kind.
Jerikan Market Day__line_36: Jerikan := Glad we agree on something. Now buy something or piss off.
Jerikan Market Day__line_42: You can hear something like a rattling sound from Jerikan’s ceramic ‘head.’
Jerikan Market Day__line_46: Jerikan := Monsters, monsters, you dense fuck!
Jerikan Market Day__line_52: Jerikan := I go out, I find monsters, I drain ‘em of excess magic and then I sell their contracts to shmucks like you.
Jerikan Market Day__line_56: Jerikan := You got any other stupid questions?
Day4Inn__line_5: You enter the Monarch Inn. As ever, it buzzes with pleasant activity. You have maybe a moment to think to yourself before a pleasantly androgynous woman approaches and smiles at you and Jubelle.
Day4Inn__line_7: Morgan := Ah, <PLAYERNAME>, Jubelle, welcome to the Monarch Inn. I do believe a seat and meal were reserved for you two.
Day4Inn__line_8: <PLAYERNAME> := Oh, uh, I don’t think we’ve met.
Day4Inn__line_9: Jubelle := This is Morgan, she’s Camellia’s right hand woman.
Day4Inn__line_10: Morgan := A pleasure to make your acquaintance, <PLAYERNAME>, maybe I could show you my room some time.
Day4Inn__line_14: Jubelle := As fun as it is to see <PLAYERNAME> blush, we do have an appointment.
Day4Inn__line_17: Jubelle := Stop flirting with this wayward farmer, they led me on a merry chase before they came here and I’m hungry!
Day4Inn__line_20: Morgan := Ha, fair, fair take your usual spot, Jubelle.
Day4Inn__line_22: As you move towards your booth, you can see a matronly bee woman exchanging words with a rather well built mantid man. Jubelle pauses before the pair.
Day4Inn__line_28: Jubelle := <PLAYERNAME>, this is Bella, and Dire.
Day4Inn__line_31: Dire := Hey, nice to meet you.
Day4Inn__line_33: Jubelle := <PLAYERNAME> is fresh from the Academy. Bella is one of Camellia’s workers, and Dire is the Inn’s bard.
Day4Inn__line_35: <PLAYERNAME> := Nice to meet both of you!
Day4Inn__line_36: Jubelle := I’m sure we’ll all be seeing a lot of each other.
Day4Inn__line_44: Jubelle keeps moving towards the kitchen. Camellia waves at the pair of you as you pass but doesn't speak up otherwise, Jubelle nods to her and you return the wave. The canid woman walks with you towards the center of the inn, and a wave of heat rolls past you, taking the air out of your lungs.
Day4Inn__line_45: You both move into a cramped space that smells of spices, cooking oil, meat, and vegetables.
Day4Inn__line_47: An enormous swinish man dominates the space, checking small notes, grunting to himself and dicing vegetables or slicing meat with lightning quick movements.
Day4Inn__line_49: Jubelle has to raise her voice to make herself heard over the sound of the working cook.
Day4Inn__line_51: Jubelle := Thrund, I have someone I want you to meet!
Day4Inn__line_55: The swinish man snorts and turns to regard you.
Day4Inn__line_57: Thrund := Wif respec' I'm very busy.
Day4Inn__line_58: Jubelle := I’m sure, but we’re here for food and <PLAYERNAME> is our town’s new farmer.
Day4Inn__line_59: Thrund := Ah see now, Lady Camellia has big plans for ye.
Day4Inn__line_71: Camellia := It is my hope that you will run an active and efficient farm and supply my establishment with a wealth of foodstuffs.
Day4Inn__line_72: Jubelle := I’m doing my best to make that happen.
Day4Inn__line_73: Camellia := Excellent, I look forward to seeing what you’re capable of.
Day4Inn__line_80: <PLAYERNAME> := I hope to meet those expectations!
Day4Inn__line_85: Jubelle := Now then, Thrund, I was hoping you would cook us some breakfast. Just the usual for now.
Day4Inn__line_86: Thrund := As ye see fit ma’am.
Day4Inn__line_88: The pig-man gets to work, creating a storm of diced meat and vegetable matter, frying up bits of eggy substances and kneading bread. Jubelle sits at the bar, waiting patiently alongside you until two plates are placed in front of you.
Day4Inn__line_90: A meal! Fat, meaty slices of Bose have been laid onto a plate next to Scrambled Eggtrap with slices of Hotton Braided Bread. It is an excellent meal, the eggtrap has a thorough consistency, the bose has been carefully sauteed in its own fat, and the hotton bread has been baked to perfection.
Day4Inn__line_95: Jubelle := Yes! Thrund knows his craft, I wanted to introduce you to everyone here and have him teach you how to cook.
Day4Inn__line_96: <PLAYERNAME> := Well it couldn’t hurt to get some tips from a professional...
Day4Inn__line_98: With the meal finished you stand and pause, a question occurs to you.
Day4Inn__line_100: <PLAYERNAME> := So do we leave the dishes here or...?
Day4Inn__line_101: Jubelle := Argontel will take care of it.
Day4Inn__line_104: As if on cue, a literally bubbly woman made of viscous purple slime slides over.
Day4Inn__line_106: Argontel := Are you done with your meal?
Day4Inn__line_110: Argontel reaches over to the plates and silverware, shlorping them into her body one at a time. You watch the food particles part from the ceramic plates and disperse inside of her before she carefully stacks them.
Day4Inn__line_112: Jubelle := <PLAYERNAME>, this is Argontel, the Inn’s cleaning lady.
Day4Inn__line_115: Jubelle := We are in a slow period, yes?
Day4Inn__line_118: Jubelle moves away from the bar and you follow her. Argontel burbles happily, giving the bartop and chairs a quick wipe down before carrying the plates back for rinse and reuse.
Day4Inn__line_123: Thrund := Ye seemed to like the food youngun’, did ye want some pointers?
Day4Inn__line_126: Thrund looks over to Camellia, who nods in agreement. The swinish man gives a sagely snort and gets down to business.
Day4Inn__line_128: Thrund := Allright we’re gonna be cooking. At its very basic level, cooking'is simply mixing multiple ingredients together an' gettin' a meal from it. The more ingredients ye add the more complex and nourishin' the dish. Ye aren’t just feedin' the body, ye’re feeding the soul.
Day4Inn__line_130: //bring up the cooking tutorial card here. Have the player make whatever, I can work on commentary for every item later but we need this tutorial out now. In the meantime just play these lines.
Day4Inn__line_132: Thrund := Alright, here's a real simple one ta start.
Day4Inn__line_140: Thrund := Not bad, now try somethin' with these.
Day4Inn__line_149: Thrund wipes his brow with one shaggy forearm. How he keeps his bristly hair out of the dishes he prepares is beyond you.
Day4Inn__line_151: Thrund := Alright then, thanks fer the help, <PLAYERNAME>, but I think we both got work ta do. Now off with ye, if ye ever want to know about these dishes come by during the slow hours.
Day4Inn__line_157: Jubelle makes a note on her clipboard.
Day4Inn__line_159: Jubelle := Alright, I think we’re finished with your remedial training for the moment, I'll see you tomorrow..
Day4Inn__line_161: <PLAYERNAME> := So I'm free for the rest of the day?
Act_1_Part_1_Dialogue_Goldra__line_1: //[To be played the first time you talk to Goldra, after the act 1 story has begun]
Act_1_Part_1_Dialogue_Goldra__line_10: Goldra finally glances over in your direction, as though just now noticing your appearance.
Act_1_Part_1_Dialogue_Goldra__line_11: Goldra := Ah, Farmer <PLAYERNAME>. Any queries you have about your station can be addressed by Jubelle out in the barracks.
Act_1_Part_1_Dialogue_Goldra__line_12: <PLAYERNAME> := Oh, that's actually not why I'm here, I came to see you, Goldra.
Act_1_Part_1_Dialogue_Goldra__line_14: <PLAYERNAME> := ... Well! I was hoping to talk to you about the Catfolk and the Poachers?
Act_1_Part_1_Dialogue_Goldra__line_15: Goldra := If it will expedite your departure, then with all haste, please proceed.
Act_1_Part_1_Dialogue_Goldra__line_20: "What do you think of the poachers?":
Act_1_Part_1_Dialogue_Goldra__line_22: "Do you want to come with me?":
Act_1_Part_1_Dialogue_Goldra__line_28: For once, Goldra snickers softly, and a smirk settles on her face.
Act_1_Part_1_Dialogue_Goldra__line_29: Goldra := They're poachers. What more is there to it? You crush them like an insect.
Act_1_Part_1_Dialogue_Goldra__line_35: <PLAYERNAME> := We could put a stop to those poachers once and for all!
Act_1_Part_1_Dialogue_Goldra__line_42: <PLAYERNAME> := Hmm, that's all for now, I guess. I'll see you around, Goldra.

ProvisionDayGroup1Simon__line_7: Kreyton := Give up ya wee lad, ya gotta be at least sea king sized before ya can drink an ogre under the table!
ProvisionDayGroup1Simon__line_9: Kreyton takes two pints of hard bernard beer and chugs them effortlessly, before putting them down with what seems to be two dozen other empty mugs
ProvisionDayGroup1Simon__line_14: Jubelle := Wow that's almost two seasons worth of marine drinking rations gone in just a few minutes!

ProvisionDayGroup7Camellia__line_8: Camellia := All right, seems like things are running in order. Thrund dear please make sure the hors d'oeuvre haven't been consumed yet by Brontide and throw Popondopulous out if he as much as comes close to the buffet.

Yonten's Shop Ouside__line_5: <PLAYERNAME>	:=	Is this a General Store? It has the Union mark and all.
Yonten's Shop Ouside__line_7: Jubelle			:=	This is indeed Cloverton's General Store, the Hovel. Yonten manages it. He may seem a bit intimidating, but I assure you he is quite friendly. I can introduce you to him when we go inside.
Outpost Training Grounds Scene__line_0: //[To be played the first time the player interacts with the bell in the basement of the Union Outpost]
Outpost Training Grounds Scene__line_5: A heavy wrought iron bell rests near the wall.
Outpost Training Grounds Scene__line_6: <PLAYERNAME> := What's a bell doing down here?
Outpost Training Grounds Scene__line_7: Brontide := Hah! That, cadet, is the training bell. If you think you have the proper nerve for it, give it a ring then you and I shall best whatever beast may dare stand before us.
Outpost Training Grounds Scene__line_8: <PLAYERNAME> := Woah! You mean like, a real monster?
Outpost Training Grounds Scene__line_9: Brontide := In every sense of the word. We must be careful, but I will do everything in my power to make sure no true harm comes to you. You have my word as a member of the Guard!
Outpost Training Grounds Scene__line_19: You grab onto the side of the bell, shaking it as it rings out crystal clear, it's reverberations echoing off of the nearby walls.
Outpost Training Grounds Scene__line_21: Brontide := I was hoping you'd ring it!
Outpost Training Grounds Scene__line_23: Footsteps echo from above as Goldra haughtily makes her way down the ramp.
Outpost Training Grounds Scene__line_31: Goldra := Another vagabond you've brought into Outpost, Brontide? I thought I'd told you-
Outpost Training Grounds Scene__line_32: Brontide := No time for introductions now sister, we're going to challenge a monster!
Outpost Training Grounds Scene__line_36: Goldra := I suppose I shall enter the fray as well. Twice the skill, double the triumph.
Outpost Training Grounds Scene__line_42: <PLAYERNAME> := Maybe not just yet, I still haven't fully gotten back my land legs after all.
Outpost Training Grounds Scene__line_43: Brontide := Come back down here any time, I'll gladly spar with you.
Camellia Recruit__line_4: Camellia is, as per usual, reigning over her small kingdom from a seat at the bar. You approach her to make your case.
Camellia Recruit__line_6: Camellia := Ah, hello there <PLAYERNAME>! Is there something I can do for you?
Camellia Recruit__line_8: <PLAYERNAME> := I’m going down into the mines to confront those cats and I could use your help.
Camellia Recruit__line_10: Camellia := Ah, I see my reputation precedes me. Well then, one moment...
Camellia Recruit__line_12: Camellia rises from her chair, clacks her fan closed and clears her throat.
Camellia Recruit__line_16: Morgan := How can I help you, Lady Camellia?
Camellia Recruit__line_18: Camellia := Keep things orderly while I’m gone, dear.
Camellia Recruit__line_22: Camellia := Alright then, let me know when we are heading out, <PLAYERNAME>.
ProvisionDayGroup8Belladeon__line_6: Bella := You were right Dire, this land is truly unlike any other, the kindness of these strangers knows no bounds, for the first time in all these years I feel at peace.
ProvisionDayGroup8Belladeon__line_7: Dire := Yes, perhaps one day when we're ready we can take what we've learned here and bring some of it to our homeland.
ProvisionDayGroup8Belladeon__line_8: Bella := Unless our homeland finds us first.
Beck__line_5: You see a mycoid steward busily tending to its cart, checking its inventory. Atop the cart are various goods and scrumptious rations from all across Central Kingdom, a staple selection from the renowned
Beck__line_6: Agatha's Catering Company, that supplies long-voyage ships with excellent provisions far and wide. As it notices you, it does a small excited twist and turns to face you, and before you can say anything-
Beck__line_8: Beck := Well, it seems like we're finally at the last stop. Cloverton, the edge of the Frontier! Nothing but the ever expansive Frontier past this area, so I guess you's getting off, huh?
Beck__line_10: Beck := The motions of the Blue Liner make me a bit dizzy, so I ain't so talkative during the early voyage. Before we departed, you's homeroom mentor told me to give you dis!
Beck__line_14: Beck := And here's one on the house, from Agatha's Catering Company!
Beck__line_18: Beck := And here's an extra from me, but don't tells nobody.
Beck__line_22: The mycoid steward carefuly presents you with a small bag of candy, and paps you on the hand like a mischievous grandparent as you take it.
Beck__line_24: Beck :=  Edge of the Frontier towns are a rough livin', but I'm sure you can make something great outta dis opportunity. I can't tell why but I gots a good feelin' about you's!
Beck__line_26: Oh, and in case you run outta things to do, keep in mind, things are still sort of developing out there.
Beck__line_28: Now go on, your new life awaits, Frontiersman!
Beck__line_30: The mycoid steward does a joyful twist and goes back to tend to its food cart, before any hellos or good byes could be exchanged.
Skandr Market Day__line_4: Skandr := Ah yes, you there! My good guildsperson would you happen to have any eggs on hand? I offer excellent prices.
Skandr Market Day__line_9: "What are you doing with these eggs?":
Skandr Market Day__line_21: Skandr := Ah, an astute question from a consummate professional. I, my good young guilder, will have you know that I am a well connected monster. People, human and not-so-human alike, come to me to have problems solved. Among those is the simple desire to have a child.
Skandr Market Day__line_23: Skandr := Infertility got you down? Perhaps your current child needs a sibling? Current heir not so apparent? Well worry not, Skandr is here to scour the lands for the fittest finds a family could fund!
Skandr Market Day__line_25: Skandr := So yes, I acquire eggs and provide them to vetted patrons. No worries, anyone you place in my hands will live a well cared for life. Perhaps a demanding one, but cared for.
Skandr Market Day__line_27: Skandr := So then, care to entrust me with some eggs?
Valpongis Market Day__line_4: You come upon a large blue man with a long flowing white beard. His gut is prodigious, and his arms are thick with muscle.
Valpongis Market Day__line_6: Valpongis := Ah, an esteemed customer has come to see Valpongis! No doubt you were attracted by the tales of my quality goods and esteemed knowledge of the esoteric. But enough about me, let's see what we can do about you!
Valpongis Market Day__line_26: Valpongis snaps his fingers and a cloud of sparkling smoke appears around him, displaying exotic looking tools, weapons, and clothing.
Valpongis Market Day__line_28: // some kind of twinkling sound effect partnered with sparkling glitter on Valpongis emote
Valpongis Market Day__line_30: Valpongis := I, Valpongis the Munificent, am skilled in the use of magic and its practical application in the acquisition of rare goods. Come to me if you want magical goods to wear, use, or display!
Valpongis Market Day__line_35: Valpongis := Ah, I have an astute patron! Yes Valpongis is a Djinn and hails from the perhaps unimaginatively named Djinni Kingdoms far from here. I shall not bore this esteemed patron with tales of my homeland. Surely a magical shovel or raincoat would suit your interests far more?
BrumeWinterEvent__line_10: Brume := Hey kid, wanna help some people?
BrumeWinterEvent__line_11: <PLAYERNAME> := I’m not stealing presents for you.
BrumeWinterEvent__line_12: Brume := Who said anything about stealing? Gotta be dozens of provisions, just goin' to waste, scattered across the wilds from attacked ships.
BrumeWinterEvent__line_14: Brume := When you’re out there, doing your thing, you could gather those treasures. Instead of plundering them for yourself, bring 'em to me! I’ll see they go to people who really need it. As a bonus, if ya bring me at least 5 I'll thank ya pers'nally. *wink*
BrumeWinterEvent__line_35: Brume := Hey, you've really been doing some good work out there. I think maybe we should find a place to be alone. Together.
BrumeWinterEvent__line_38: Brume := Bring me some more provisions and I'll let ya fluff my fur!
BrumeWinterEvent__line_44: Brume:= Ah, excellent, I’ll see these go to the needy.
BrumeWinterEvent__line_47: Brume gives you a warm hug.
BrumeWinterEvent__line_48: Brume := You've really made this holiday for a lot of people. Thanks so much!
BrumeWinterEvent__line_64: Brume can kiss like a devil, his tongue is long and he knows how to use it.
BrumeWinterEvent__line_65: The two of you paw at one another atop your bed, hands roaming each other’s chests as you taste and feel one another.

Bridge Scene__line_5: Jubelle			:= Your farm is just over this bridge.
GradEnd__line_4: Montalvo := Thank you for your service Ensign, I look forward to many more graduation days with you.
Dock Scene__line_0: // Scene: When you leave the blue liner
Dock Scene__line_5: You step off the floating whale, feet finding purchase upon the dock. Far from the hustle and bustle of a Kingdom shipping yard, Cloverton's one-whale mooring is only occupied by two figures.
Dock Scene__line_6: You, and a canid monster-woman looking eagerly at you, her tail whipping from side to side as she closes the distance.
Dock Scene__line_7: Jubelle := Greetings Sailor, it looks like your land legs weathered the trip well enough! You must be the new farmer, am I correct?
Dock Scene__line_8: <PLAYERNAME> := Yes, I am! Thanks, it was quite a trip. My name's <PLAYERNAME>, it's nice to meet you! You... who are you?
Dock Scene__line_9: Jubelle:=Oh! Forgive me. Operations Director Jubelle, at your service!
Dock Scene__line_10: Jubelle finishes her full title with a salute, her heels clicking together, or they would, were it not for her fluffy fur covering them...
Dock Scene__line_12: Jubelle takes a deep breath, her shoulders slacking as she seems lost in thought.
Dock Scene__line_13: Jubelle := Mmm, you smell like chamomile.
Dock Scene__line_15: Jubelle := Where are my manners! I'm here to assist you in any official capacity you may need while you transition into your new position as Union Farmer for Cloverton!
Dock Scene__line_16: <PLAYERNAME> := Wow, that would be incredibly helpful! This is my very first posting, but I'm ready to do my part!
Dock Scene__line_17: Jubelle := Well, that enthusiasm will definitely aid you.
Dock Scene__line_18: Jubelle := There are two tasks I would recommend to you first. You could introduce yourself to the town, or if you find its lure too irresistible, we can head straight to the farm.
Dock Scene__line_27: <PLAYERNAME> := That's not a bad idea. Introduce me, OD!
Dock Scene__line_28: Jubelle := Good choice, Sailor. Lead the way, I'll act as your intelligence.
Dock Scene__line_31: <PLAYERNAME> := My insatiable lust for veggies cannot be put off any longer!
Dock Scene__line_32: Jubelle := Well, I can't fault a work ethic like that! But if you get a chance later, you'll find them to be great company!
Day7__line_4: After a quick jaunt through the clouds, you find yourself in Cloverton. You can hear dozens of merchants giving their product pitches. Some come in the form of catchy songs, others simply state the price and function of the product. A few are resorting to frankly confusing gimmicks.
Day7__line_6: Jubelle := So today is market day, every other weekday the merchants will gather together to sell their wares. I strongly advise you to visit town every day. The merchants also show up here in ones and twos when it's not market day, and you never know what might be going on.
Day7__line_8: ///cue market day tutorial and events card.
Day7__line_10: Jubelle makes a note on her clipboard.
Day7__line_12: Jubelle := Well then, I do believe that covers your orientation, I'm going to go get something to eat.
Day7__line_14: Jubelle takes her leave. The day is yours to do with as you see fit.

<PLAYERNAME> := Ho there! Brontide, sir!
Brontide’s grin grows even wider than it already was as he turns and spots you.
Brontide := Greetings, <PLAYERNAME>! How has your day fared so far? And, it’s just Brontide, my friend.
<PLAYERNAME> := Right. It’s been alright so far! You’re just the man I was hoping to find though.
Brontide := Oh, well what is it you need doing?
Brontide’s lax demeanor seems to invite whatever you have to tell him.
<PLAYERNAME> := I was hoping I could get a bit of insight from you about Dungeon Islands.
Brontide := Oh those? Sure thing, <PLAYERNAME>.
A glint of recollection hits the Drake’s eyes.
Brontide := Does this have anything to do with those Catfolk that attacked your farm? That was quite the event.
<PLAYERNAME> := Oh, were you there? Did you see how I fared against them?
Brontide := Did I!?
Brontide := .... Nope! I was getting breakfast at the time, fried eggs and crementine hash. Mmm!
<PLAYERNAME> := That does sound pretty good.
Brontide := Jack and Rickert told me all about it though. Grahah! Can’t wait 'til David gets back from deployment to tell him.
check: fight True jump: Won

<PLAYERNAME> := So you heard how well I did in a fight, huh?
Brontide := That’s what I heard. Not a bad job for a Frontiersman. I had a feeling you’d do well in an ambush though, good job.
Brontide nods approvingly. You feel a sense of pride at the praise.

<PLAYERNAME> := Ahah. Well, if you can, I wouldn’t mind a little embellishment on my own part in the story. That was a rough fight...

Brontide := Ixnay, got it. Though that would have been quite a sight.
jump: WinLoseContinue

<PLAYERNAME> := Well, if you know about all of that kerfuffle, I’m guessing a Lieutenant like yourself has already heard about this new adventure Sieger assigned, right?
Brontide := I have! Were you hoping to hear a bit more about the kinda job it’d be?
<PLAYERNAME> := Yes, actually. I’ve read bits and pieces about that kind of subject, but I’m sure someone like you has actually gone to Dungeon Islands, and dealt with it for real.

jump: Rootdialogue

Brontide := Well, those Catfolk aren’t really to blame. They’re only aggressive because they’re being hunted by those Poachers.
Brontide := And well, they’re the bad guys, which means we gotta stop them!
Brontide flexes before tapping his fists together.
<PLAYERNAME> := Of course. Is it really just that simple though?
Brontide := Well yeah. At least, I don’t think there’s much more to it.
Brontide crosses his arms.
Brontide := I mean. That’s just kinda the way the world is, you know? There’s bad guys who do bad things. Because of that, the Union hires people like us. People who are the good guys.
Brontide := That’s how I see it at least.
menu:
"When you put it that way...":
jump: Right
"That can’t be all there is to it.":

label Right:
<PLAYERNAME> :=  When you put it that way, I kinda like how simple it is. It’s direct, kinda like you, Brontide.
Brontide := Yep, now you’re getting it! They’re doing something bad, and we gotta stop them.
Brontide seems pleased with the mutual agreement, nodding his head knowingly.
Brontide := If I spent time fretting over the details, I’d never get around to solving all the problems that we have to deal with out on the Frontier.
<PLAYERNAME> := Seems like a lot for the Marines side of the Union. Does it ever get to be too much for you, though?
Brontide := Not really, I kinda like it!
Brontide := Not the bad parts though. What I mean is I can do a lot of good work, and my work lets me save a lot of people. That’s pretty close to a dream job.
<PLAYERNAME> := Huh, I kinda like the appeal of that. Seems like a pretty good creed for a guy like you.
Brontide := Sure is!
Brontide := Now what else can Brontide here shine some light on?
jump: Rootdialogue
label Nuance:
<PLAYERNAME> := I mean, I suppose you’re right that they’re doing bad things. Maybe there’s a reason though, even a bad one, that explains why.
Brontide := I don’t know. I guess I never really thought about that too much. Even if we figure out each and every reason though, we still have to stop them.
<PLAYERNAME> := I suppose. But maybe not? Perhaps we might find a better solution than if we didn’t bother asking at all.
Brontide := What do you mean?

<PLAYERNAME> := You know, like a crime pulp novel. Where the hard boiled detective is always aiming for the kingpin, the orchestrator of the crimes. He’s never aiming explicitly for the cronies that do their boss’ bidding.
Brontide seems lost in thought.

Brontide := ... I’ll be honest, I’ve never read one of those stories before. I think I get what you’re saying though. You kinda remind me of the way Goldra’s always talking about that stuff. Smart stuff.
<PLAYERNAME> := I guess! I mean I’m just going off of books, I bet she’s a lot more experienced with the real deal.
Brontide := I’m sure she is. I leave that stuff to her, that way I can focus on what needs doing in the moment.
<PLAYERNAME> := Well, seems like that’s your forte.
Brontide := Yep! Anything else?
jump: Rootdialogue
label Comewith:
<PLAYERNAME> := Well, someone’s going to have to head out there and stop those poachers. If it ends up being me, do you wanna help me do just that?!
Brontide := Do I?!
Brontide stands up straight, putting a hand on your shoulder. You feel a swelling sense of camaraderie flowing over you.
Brontide := Sure do! You can count on me if we head out there together.
Brontide flexes his free arm.
Brontide := If anyone tries to pick a fight with us, I’ll pummel them! And then I’ll hit them AGAIN! So if that’s what you need, then I’m your man!
<PLAYERNAME> := Well, with how strong you are, I’m glad you’re on my side!
Brontide := Hah, same. Though, that will NOT spare you from the occasional friendly headlock. Grahaha!
Brontide moves closer, hooking his arm under your chin as he does just that.
<PLAYERNAME> := Ogph! Ahaha. Okay big guy, getting a little hard to breathe!
He lets you down carefully, making sure that you don’t stumble.
Brontide := Sure thing, <PLAYERNAME>! Just let me know when you decide to head out. I’ll be there within two shakes of a drake’s tail.
<PLAYERNAME> := Of course! Now let’s see, was there anything else I wanted to ask you...?
command: GoldraBrontideRecruitment
jump: Rootdialogue
label Goldra:
<PLAYERNAME> := Hey Brontide. If you’re willing to go, do you think maybe you can convince your sister to come along as well?
Brontide smirks and nods.
Brontide := Nope!
<PLAYERNAME>  := N-no?
Brontide := Nope. This isn’t normally the kind of thing that Goldra deals with. After all, she’s got a really important job here at this union branch, as Head of Reconnaissance.
<PLAYERNAME>  := Ohh, right.
Brontide := She’s probably busy with a lot more important stuff. Usually her part in an operation is already done by the time they’re sending out the marines.
<PLAYERNAME>  := Wow, that’s actually pretty interesting. So do you two not work together that often?

Brontide := We do once in a while, when either a rapid response team has to be dispatched, or when she has to accompany a team because whatever information she has is sensitive. Stuff like that I guess.
You catch a flash of recollection on Brontide’s face, as though he recalled a few such instances.
Brontide := Sometimes if I ask nice enough though, she comes along, just so she can spend time with her dearest brother!
Menu:
"Well, why don’t you try asking nicely now?":
jump: Nicely
"That sounds cute.":
jump: Cute
"That’s kinda weird.":
jump: Weird
label Nicely:
<PLAYERNAME>  := Maybe she’ll come along.
Brontide breaks eye contact, looking over towards the wall.
Brontide := Well, it doesn’t always work, usually she’ll only come along if the conditions are ideal.
<PLAYERNAME>  := Oh. Well, is there anything we can do to help make it ideal for her?
Brontide := Well. I guess she’s forced me to be the messenger, so don’t shoot me, <PLAYERNAME>. She probably wouldn’t want to come along because you’re coming along.
<PLAYERNAME>  := Oh.
Brontide := Yeah, heh. She’s great once you get to know her, but she’s not a fan of letting new people get to know her. You know?
<PLAYERNAME> := Yeah. I get what you mean.
Brontide := Don’t take it the wrong way, <PLAYERNAME>. She’s like that with every-
<PLAYERNAME> := Maybe another time then! Maybe when I’ve gotten a better chance to get to know her and vice versa!
Brontide := Y-yeah! I mean, I like you, all vice versa like, so I’m sure given enough time she’ll come around too!
Brontide slaps you on the shoulder.
Brontide := So, anything else?
jump: Rootdialogue
label Cute:
<PLAYERNAME> := It also sounds kinda terrifying for anyone that has to face both of you down.
Brontide smiles, nodding emphatically.
<PLAYERNAME> := Also, it’s good that you get the chance to spend time with your sister. That must be nice.
Brontide := Yeah. We don’t always get along, but she’s the only sister I’ve got.
You can feel the warmth in Brontide’s words as he mentions her.
Brontide := Of course, we do get a chance to catch up when we’re not on duty. Sometimes she reads whatever book she has aloud while I’m tinkering away with my hobbies.
<PLAYERNAME> := That sounds nice. You should count yourself lucky to have such a bond.
Brontide := Oh yeah, I do! Now, let’s change the subject. What else would you like to know?
jump: Rootdialogue
label Weird:
<PLAYERNAME> := That’s kinda weird, haha.
Brontide crosses his arms.
Brontide := What’s so weird about that?
<PLAYERNAME> := Oh, uh. I suppose it’s not really all that weird when you think about it.
Brontide := Hey, don’t back down. Tell me why you think it’s weird.
Brontide’s tone shifts somewhere between an order and a demand.
<PLAYERNAME> := I mean, I hadn’t really considered what I meant. I’m just not used to anyone speaking so glowingly about their siblings, usually it’s just about how they quarrel.
Brontide := Well yeah, of course you quarrel. That doesn’t mean you love them any less though, <PLAYERNAME>.
<PLAYERNAME> := Yeah I guess that’s probably true.
Brontide := I mean, do you have any brothers or sisters?
<PLAYERNAME> := Oh, no, actually. I was an only child.
Brontide := Oh, well it’s kinda like when you get mad at your mom or dad, you still love them, you know?
<PLAYERNAME> := Uhh... Yeah, I think I get where you’re coming from! Haha, I guess that was a bit impolite of me, my bad!
Brontide := Well, let’s just call it a river with a bridge over it! Sound good, <PLAYERNAME>?
<PLAYERNAME> := Huh? Oh, water under the bridge, sure! So Brontide, can I ask you about some other things?
Brontide := Sure thing! Ask away.
jump: Rootdialogue
label Done:
