PoacherTrap4___nodes[0]._stepChain[2]._d: So, Sting and Prism put these out here…
PoacherTrap4___nodes[0]._stepChain[3]._d: Looking at the contraption almost makes you feel sorry for whoever made it, because they were either trying too hard, or not hard enough to wind up with… This.
PoacherTrap4___nodes[0]._stepChain[4]._d: Guessing out of the two of them, Prism is the one making these. Seems he has a penchant for odd contraptions…
PoacherTrap4___nodes[0]._stepChain[5]._d: The “Odd Contraption,” is a long pole with a rope hanging from the end of it, a bucket dangling from the loop at the end. Were you to stick your hands through the loop to get to the bucket, you can imagine if you stuck your hands through the loop what would happen.
You notice, however, how flimsy the construction of this is, the base isn’t even buried in the ground. So all it needs is a swift kick and…
PoacherTrap4___nodes[0]._stepChain[9]._d: You raise your boot up and deliver a kick a bit higher on the pole, it wobbles for a moment before falling over with a clanging crash. Food spilling from the bucket and onto the ground.
Savannah 4 Excavation Cave Wall__line_3: <PLAYERNAME> := This seems to be showcasing some sort of..pickling process, tenderizing and diluting steps, oh, this is a beer recipe.
SavannahF4PlungerDialogue___nodes[0]._st: It’s another plunger, already set up a distance away from a nearby boulder.
Huh… A plunger and a line… But no explosives…
SavannahF4PlungerDialogue___nodes[2]._st: Good thing I have some right here!
You place the bundle of dangerous explosives into the blast hole. You wince as you connect the wire back up to the explosives… Thankfully, nothing goes off!
“You’re right, Professor Hunt, modern dance does sound more fun!”
I gotta get a copy of that field ordnance textbook…
Now that it’s all hooked up, all that’s left is to detonate.
You take a moment to dust yourself off, dust and debris covering your overalls and face. Once the dust settles, you can see the path is clear!
SavannahF4PlungerDialogue___nodes[3]._st: Wonder where they could have gone… Doubt they got up and walked away on their own…
Well, if it’s not here, then it’s somewhere, I’ll be sure to keep an eye out for it!

<PLAYERNAME> := Hmm...this is probably enough water to dilute that boozant core I’m carrying... I think I know what the centaurs were doing with that stone hammer now.

Savannah 4 Excavation Cave Tatoma Intro_: Tatoma := I just had to open my big mouth and tell my seniors about the old centaur treasure scripture I found, could have been back at helix academy enjoying a good grownut bun and a warm bed..
Savannah 4 Excavation Cave Heather Intro: Heather := Well this has been quite the trek, though this is nothing compared to the daily occurings in the house of witchcraft, pirates are another thing, but fiends rising out of- err I mean -nope, no fiends, no dangerous magic being practiced, mhmm, just potions and bookkeeping!
Savannah 4 Excavation Cave Mercenary__li: Mercenary := Pirates may be gone but I'm keeping my eye on you-
Mercenary := Wait a minute, you’re that young’un I met at the blue liner! Hahah nice to see you’ve made it all the way here, guess you’re a real frontiersman now!
<PLAYERNAME> := Yeah It's been rough trudging, you weren't kidding about keeping distance from those claws - yowch.
Mercenary := Aye, but you know the deeper into frontier you go the more treasure there is to find!

Mercenary := I’ve heard rumors of the giant grassland deep in savannah full of undiscovered riches, ‘course getting to it means you gotta trudge through miles of floatin’ shaky landmass centaurs, catpeople and pirates, to top it off there’s been sightings of the nor’ easter’ sea-terror the Gelatitan-
Doctor1 := Excuse me I believe the correct term is Titan Gellatin.
Doctor2 := No you idiot it's The Refractitan!
Tatoma := I swear if you both dont settle down I will pound both of your stupid faces in!
Savannah 4 Excavation Cave Digger Intro_: <PLAYERNAME> := Heyo! Whatcha doin’ out here? Shouldn’t you have more people?

Digger := Ah these skinflints only paid for a skeleton crew and nabbed some drunken idiots from the tavern to be our guards. We ran into a group of pirates, didn’t have the numbers or gear to fight ‘em and had to toss all of our supplies and make a beeline for this cave.
Digger := Turns out it was the place we were looking for all along, no real digging to be done though. No ore, no jewels, no rare stones. Best we’ve got is this spring water I guess.
Digger := Been stuck here for about two days while those bookworms burn through our last of food supplies trying to decipher those wall carvings with sky pirates waiting outside.
Digger := Couldja lend us a hand with figuring this place out so I can collect my dues and get back excavatin’ maybe?
Digger := I'm sure there’s some trick to it, I’m not getting into that water hole though, no sir.
Savannah 5 Mason Centaurs Statue New__li: You examine Gelricht’s statue of your battle with the Centaur warriors. At its base is a nameplate: “Hoofbeats of War.”
Gelricht has captured the struggle well, and clearly took pains to depict you with the upper hand. It was nothin’ you couldn’t handle!
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_8: Before you is a male Centaur glaring at a row of half-finished stone statues. He looks down at the masonry tools in his hands and lets out a frustrated nicker.
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_10: After a moment, he spots you and a flash of curiosity passes his face.
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_11: Mason := Oh! Hold on a minute there…
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_12: Mason := Hmm, yes… Good posture, appealing features…
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_14: Mason := Yes!!! *You* are *exactly* what I need!
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_16: Is this flattering, or literally objectifying…?
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_25: <PLAYERNAME> := What am I, a Shrubstick Coldcut? Paint a picture if you like it so much, pal!
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_27: // NOTE: using 'surprise' emote slot for the special dramatic pose
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_29: Mason := Ohhh, *please* forgive me! I have the hungry eyes of an artist, starving for inspiration…!!!
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_33: Mason := My name is Gelricht, a stonemason of some repute. Perhaps you’ve heard of me?
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_39: Mason := I’ve been having terrible trouble finding my muse, that’s all! Absent any new stimulation, my capacity to create art has been… Sadly…
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_44: Mason := But you! When I look at you, o pioneer, I feel something stirring within me… Yes, I can feel the inchoate pleasure…
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_48: <PLAYERNAME> := Look, Gelricht, if you need help I’m happy to–
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_50: Gelricht lets out such a dramatic sigh that you are immediately silenced!
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_51: Mason := If you truly wish to help a *wretch* such as me, then you must commit yourself to four tasks…

Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_57: "I was born to serve the public! (Continue)":
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_62: <PLAYERNAME> := Ehhh, I’ll take it! Thanks, I guess.

Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_90: "I’d like to help, but I’m kinda in a hurry…":
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_92: "I was born to serve the public! (Continue)":
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_97: <PLAYERNAME> := I’d like to help, but I’m kinda in a hurry. Any chance that we could take a raincheck?
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_99: Mason := Oh, such cruel fate that inspiration graces me, only to be seized by incontestable fate!
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_101: Mason := Before the smoldering embers of your untapped potential are snuffed out forever, may I at least know the roads your wandering boots will travel?
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_102: <PLAYERNAME> := Oh, well I really need to head deeper into the Savannah. You see, I—
Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_105: Mason := Oh~!!! What sweet, syrupy misery it is that binds our fates together!!!

Savannah 5 Mason Intro New__line_134: "I was born to serve the public!":

Savannah 5 Mason Centaurs Turn-In New__l: Mason := You’ve returned, Frontiersman! Have you achieved victory over my brethren?
<PLAYERNAME> := Oh yeah, I’m chock-full of victory and brimming with confidence!
You strike a pose for Gelricht. You’ve definitely seen this in a magazine or something, so you’re pretty sure you’re doing it perfectly!
Mason := Excellent, then let’s begin! Please pose for me, <PLAYERNAME>.
Mason := What? Oh, I… I thought you had a cramp, or something.
<PLAYERNAME> := Look, I’m a monster-ranching public servant *first*, amateur model *second*!
Gelricht approaches and begins to adjust the position of your limbs.
You feel his strong hands moving confidently over your body, rearranging everything until your pose is completely different than it was before.
Mason := Excellent. Yes, now we’re getting somewhere… Hmm!
Mason := Alright, you can relax now. I'll just need a moment!
You watch on, as Gelricht begins working furiously over the nearby stone out of the corner of your eye…
Mason := There, I believe it’s finished!
You look up at the tall statue, taking in the depiction you in a fierce battle with multiple centaurs…
Mason := Although many of our warriors wax poetic about the thrill of battle, I always find myself anxious in a fight.
Mason := However, witnessing your majestic feats of prowess made my heart pound out of my chest! I simply *had* to capture that feeling in stone…
In the base of the statue you see a Dull Ley Acumen sticking out!

Get those cannonballs up that wall! I better see those crates getting hauled!
Private! I see you lollygagging! You best have those supplies properly COUNTED by the time I get over there!
Excuse me, Lieutenant?
What do you want… Oh! A Frontiersman!
At ease, do you have a moment to spare?
Negative, I am doing everything I can just to keep my head above all this chaos here, speaking of-
YOU GORMLESS CORAL-HEADED PLANKTON-EATERS! I TOLD YOU TO GET THOSE CANNONBALLS UP-
The rest of his words are buried in a tirade of orders and commands as he continues to organize the camp. He seems fairly busy, it might be best to come back another time.

SetUpCharacters
Frontiersman! Welcome to the front line!
{0} works just fine, Lieutenant! Do you mind telling me what’s happening here?

Of course. We had started to send scouts ahead, looking for those poachers. Instead, we came across a giant homunculi blocking our path downwards. Normally that wouldn’t be an issue, except it has a lot of little friends.

Usually, we would have sent word for reinforcements, but those pirates blasted cannon and keeps trying to knock us out of the air. That, and the path behind has gotten rather dicey after that rockslide.
Instead of simply holding the line, we’ve been a bit stranded out here. At least, until you came along.
Is there anything I can help with to speed this along?
Hah, undoubtedly. Let me check through my list…
The most pressing matter is we have our retreat route blocked. We *were* preparing some demolitions, but…

One of the siege engineers got it in their head to go into the Centaur cave nearby, for cover or something. He left the detonation plunger behind when a local herd of centaur showed up asking questions. Bit of a fraidy-cat, that one.
Either way, we’ll need that pathway cleared before I feel comfortable ordering an attack. We’ll need a way to retreat with the wounded, and non-combatants, should the worst happen.
Complete Help Out Lieutenant quest step

I see, so as long as the plunger is in there…
No path back, and no safe means of retreat for the wounded and non-combatants. I can’t issue such an order that puts Unioniers in needless jeopardy.
And you shouldn’t. I’ll get this handled.
Thank you, Frontiersman.

That obstruction has been cleared!

Just a bit of friendly competition.

His competition was *nothing*!
He was a worthy opponent.
Such musculature in motion. It was a duel of wills!
We triumphed o’er him with excellent skill, led by the grace of our noble leader.
You’d be surprised how easy a big fella like him can surrender~ We had him on his back in only a few moments.

Frontiersman! Welcome back! Any news on the demolition plunger?
Sorry, I’m working on it.
Fortunately, we still have time.
Blast that demolitionist. Pardon the wordplay, but if he hadn’t turned and run, we’d be in a much better position now.

It doesn’t help that everyone else I sent back keeps trying to have a roll with the Centaurs, and *Forgetting* why they came. Even had some sneaking off and coming back discombobulated and grinning. Had to close the gates earlier, just to stop it.
PlungerNotYetCompleted
The challenge wasn’t all *that* difficult!
Good! With our back secure, we’ll be able to push forward with no fear of being boxed in.
Now we should be able to take the fight to that big creature!
Marines! It’s time for action, Captain Sieger needs this way cleared, so we’re gonna clear it! Charge!
The marines let out battle cries as they charged ahead, leaping into the swarm of Homunculi!
Complete Plunger, Start Kelpie Quest, Warcry? Gate?
We have the advantage in gunpowder, and people, but… That big one out there has been resistant to every one of our attacks.
It dodges our cannonballs, and in our earlier attacks the little ones swarmed any who went after it.
If the marines can hold off the others, then I’m more than capable of taking it on!
I can’t thank you enough, {0}.
You don’t need to Lieutenant, it’s my duty as a Frontiersman!
I will be back here, coordinating the rearguard. We’ll make sure you can fight uninterrupted.
Scales be in your favor, Frontiersman!

Frontiersman! I have another request, if you don’t mind me asking.
What do you need?
Even with the way behind cleared, we’d still run into some difficulties securing new supply lines. There’s more than a few threats out there, which could jeopardize our continued mission.
I’m guessing you’d like those areas cleared?
Correct, and I was wondering if you would give us assistance.

Guess they scare easier than ye thought!
Nothing we couldn’t handle.
I fear recounting the many complexities of our battles, to you, would take all day. Perhaps another time, maitre tacticien~
I don’t need to predict the outcome when we get involved!
They went down fast when we started punchin’!
Our spirit was greater.
They weren’t anything my vines couldn’t handle!
We could never be undone by such feeble effort.
Some… ‘Gentle’ persuasion was required.
We were like *BAM* and then they were like -Gasp- and we were like *POW*!
The task is done, as per your request.
Please tell me we’re done now, right?
There was no way they could stand up to my *Secret Move*!
I wish we could have been more gentle, but fate places us at the crossroads of urgency and necessity~
This conversation was harder than those fights.
OptionalQuestChimeIn
Yeah, they were really no problem for us!
I’m glad to hear that, and thank you, Frontiersman. You’ve helped out the Union immensely.
First thing’s first, we’ll get our puffer post back up and running. It may not be safe to transport slow, heavy supply runs, but I’m sure we can sneak by a few vital personnel and items.
Alright, enough dawdling around, if you’re auxiliary rearguard duty, you’re now fixing up the post!
OpenOptionalShortcutCutscene
A sonorous choir of groans and sighs can be heard as a dozen marines start digging through the tunnel to the mesa above. After a few minutes, the pathway is cleared enough to get through.
Outstanding work, all of you. Now, I want a squad patrolling our supply lines. The rest of you, fix up what you can!
There you go. You should be able to travel between here and Katarina much easier. It’s not much, but it’s the least we can do for your help.
All in a day’s work!

You return to the camp. Around you, Marines are quickly getting supplies moved around, the triage tent is packed with the wounded, but you can *feel* the air of victory and relief as the Union prevailed in this fight.
Frontiersman! You made it back!
Hah! Was there any doubt?
None at all!
With that creature defeated, what will happen now?
Well now this camp dedicates itself to keeping the area secure and sending out scouts.
Goldra’s reconnaissance squads have been waiting for their chance to stretch their legs after being stuck here for so long.

You there, come no closer.
You’re not gonna fight me too, are you?
Only if you bring violence with you.
Well, I’m not here for that. So, is it alright if I come in?
To enter into our ancestral breeding grounds, you will need to prove yourself worthy.
In years past too often it was the case that others come in here to couple. And, were not prepared for the sheer *stamina* and *endurance* it takes to keep up with us.
So, it was decided generations ago that until a champion could prove themselves worthy of our virility and stamina, that those amongst them would be offered no shelter within.
Any chance I could just scooch past you real quick? I just need to-
No non-centaur may enter, until a champion amongst them has proven themselves.
I was afraid you’d say that… So this challenge is…?
You may nominate a champion, yourself or anyone you bring with you. If they can prove to match me in a trial of endurance, then you may enter properly.
And this trial is- like a sex thing?
You may test yourself carnally, or through feats of strength in a tauric wrestling match. Either one will prove to me your group’s endurance and commitment.
Alright, that gives us options at least.

(Nominate a champion for the sexual trial)

How does this work again?

Simple, you may submit a champion for the trial, and they will challenge me to a contest of endurance. The trial is for me to determine, but I shall allow both a trial of sexual endurance, or tauric wrestling.
If your champion is able to last against me, then you will be allowed to stay here as long as you like.

Savannah6BangRecruitment___nodes[2]._ste: Bang-bang-bang! There you are, nekky! Hehe~
Savannah6BangRecruitment___nodes[4]._ste: Kochamura preserve me, not this again!
Must you continually attract such horrible fools to your company, {0}?
Gah!!!! I mean, uh, I en’t scared! She just startled me is all, the lil punk…
Oh no, my head is still pounding from the last time!
Heyyy, it’s that Hairball! We love her, right guys? … Guys?
Ohhh, I can’t wait to see how far this drags out!~
Savannah6BangRecruitment___nodes[5]._ste: Actually, I don’t think I actually got your name last time!
Well, what’re you up to now, Bang?
Taking a quick look around, you see that Bang is surrounded by rickety crates. Upon closer inspection, the crates are full of…
Bang looks back at you innocuously.
Savannah6BangRecruitment___nodes[6]._raw: How far are you willing to go for the truth?
Savannah6BangRecruitment___nodes[6]._opt: You’re not stealing again, are you?
Savannah6BangRecruitment___nodes[7]._ste: You’re not stealing again, are you? That’s what got you into this mess to begin with!
Pffft, here we gakkin’ go again! I wuz never thievin’, I just usin’ what ain’t bein’ used!
“Using” pots and pans is one thing, Bang, but Monster Essence Cells are a potent energy source!
Pfft, silly nekky! I don’ get shiny juice from scrapin’ an thievin’...
I get it from the Other Thing!
Bang gives you a toothy grin.
Savannah6BangRecruitment___nodes[8]._opt: Is this some kind of sex thing?
Savannah6BangRecruitment___nodes[9]._ste: Is this some kind of sex thing? Because if so-!
Hehe nasty nekky!~ No no no, the Other Thing isn’t *that*.
The Other Thing I do for fun!
Bang, is there something you do for fun that ISN’T vaguely threatening?

Whelp, looks like all those Economics courses back at Academy are about to come in handy!

Then, you can trade those coins for new bang-bang!
Ya know, a lotta ‘bout nekky world suddenly make a lotta gakin’ sense.

… I’ve made a huge mistake, haven’t I?

Savannah 7 BigPirate NPC__line_3: character alias SkyPirateCaptain Sky Pirate Captain
Savannah 7 BigPirate NPC__line_22: <PLAYERNAME> := So you probably already figured this but-
Savannah 7 BigPirate NPC__line_23: SkyPirateCaptain := The vault was full of jewels and gold and so on right?
Savannah 7 BigPirate NPC__line_25: SkyPirateCaptain := Ha! Knew it, they figured it was full of horrible monsters and wizard weapons and so on. Just sell the stuff ye found and maybe share me bunk if ye like.
Savannah 7 BigPirate NPC__line_29: SkyPirateCaptain := Shall we share a bunk together?
Savannah 7 BigPirate NPC__line_48: SkyPirateCaptain := Ahoy there matey, might I take a moment of your time?
Savannah 7 BigPirate NPC__line_50: SkyPirateCaptain := Ye can't be a pirate without a ship and a crew and I've lost both.
Savannah 7 BigPirate NPC__line_54: SkyPirateCaptain := I wanted to loot a nearby vault but me men lost patience and mutinied, left me here all by my lonesome. Now I'm seeking to give up this life of crime but I just have one problem-
Savannah 7 BigPirate NPC__line_55: <PLAYERNAME> := You want to see what's behind the vault door right?
Savannah 7 BigPirate NPC__line_56: SkyPirateCaptain := Or just hear about it so if ye break into the vault o'er yonder and tell me what lies inside I'll do me best to reward ye before moving on.
Savannah 7 BigPirate NPC__line_58: SkyPirateCaptain := Do more than that matey, though I ain't got the vault key. I'd go look, but I took such a beating from me men that I couldn't make it past any monsters that tried to jump me.
Savannah 7 BigPirate NPC__line_75: <PLAYERNAME> := I'll give it my best shot!

PoacherTrap7___nodes[0]._stepChain[3]._d: It’s a rather obvious trap. A pole holding a rope, with a loop at the end. A bucket with food in it hangs from the loop in such a way that you have to stick your hands through the hole in the loop to get at the bucket.
The purpose is clear, to tie someone’s hands as they reach for the bucket, but…
PoacherTrap7___nodes[0]._stepChain[5]._c: Dang… that’s too boring to even be funny.
Well, at least no one’s falling for that!
Huh. Looks like you have to reach in here, like—! Hey! Why’d you slap my hands?!
I’ve come across many traps in my time on the Frontier, but this has got to be the *least* effective looking.
I’m not sayin’ I’d fall fer it. But, I am curious what’s in the bucket.
Calling this trap anything but the most flagrant insult to our intelligence wouldst do us a disservice {0}. Pray thee, be rid of this thing.
Put your hands in the loop and it tightens ‘round your wrists, simple as. Though dunno how effective it’d be against catfolk, centaurs… Or really any monster for that matter.
Who is this even for? Nothing with *sense* is going to fall for this.
Cute. Maybe the poachers would like to have their hands bound one day.
I don’t think anyone would fall for it, but you really should get rid of it, {0}.
{0}. Let’s just disable it and move on.
I don’t think I want to foresee if this has or will work… I don’t think it would be good for me to know…
I would argue that removing it would be doing a disservice to the local community. If they fall for it, aurait une intelligence planctonique...
PoacherTrap7___nodes[0]._stepChain[6]._d: This is… Well, it’s not a great trap all around. Best to just get rid of it.
PoacherTrap7___nodes[0]._stepChain[10]._: You raise a boot up and kick the central rod unceremoniously. It wobbles for a moment before crashing to the ground.
{0}! Ohhh {0}, my beautiful muse, how I missed you!
It’s good to see you too, Gelricht! But what are you doing here?
Starving for inspiration as always, I heard there was a dispute at the local breeding grounds… Naturally, I felt compelled to attend as an observer.
Unfortunately, I was overtaken by a thundercloud of ~melancholia~, and was forced to stop here to rest.
But drinking only made me even MORE depressed! Ugh!!!
I thought I could emulate your courageous deeds and heroic BREEDING, {0}, but I’m no hero! I’m just another artist crawling on his belly, lacking any purpose in life...
Hmm… Gelricht’s focus on you is verging on an unhealthy spiritual attachment.
“Heroic breeding,” eh? I can get used to that!
Gelricht is spiritually charged with creative energy, but he’s unbalanced… It would be best if you could set him on the right path, {0}.
‘E’s talkin’ about me, yeah? Heroic breeding, courageous deeds n’ all that? Yeah, it’s definitely me.
Heroic breeding! Verily, {0} thou art a noble hero yet.
Amusing though it is, Gelricht is on a dark path. He needs to find some focus in his life… Besides you, I mean.
Courageous deeds! Well lookit us, a right little band o’ heroes!
Ohhh, more attention? I like attention.
Hmph! Art is nothing but a beautiful lie…
Can you PLEASE make some friends that aren’t so intense, for once?!
Oooo, looks like Gelricht owes us a nice, tidy favor~
Hopefully we don’t have to pose, again…
Ohhh, so heroic! I hope one day I’ll be as cool as you, {0}!
What to do with such a peculiar fellow?
Ah! Yes, I’m sure you have much more important things to attend to…! -sigh-
How’s your art coming along, Gelricht? Maybe you could find inspiration in the uh, sights and sounds of… the Savannah?
Gelricht is about to respond when he’s suddenly interrupted by a loud burp from a nearby Centaur warrior.
Ugh!!! How could I find inspiration when I’m *languishing* in mediocrity…!
You truly are my greatest muse, {0}. Alas, I fear I’ve already taken too much of your time and energy…
Ohhh, I’ve even taken the dignity of my countrymen to further my career! I’ve been so selfish~!
Gelricht's clearly in a rough spot
Savannah7GerlichtRecruitment___nodes[10]: If you’re tired of taking, maybe it’s time to start giving?
Katarina Station is looking for someone who can supply building materials to the locals.
Well, my sources for sculpting supplies *are* quite reliable…
But is the great Gelricht ready for such a dramatic return to the public eye?
It’s decided! I will open my supplies to the people of Katarina Station. Their spirits are no doubt starved for inspiration, as mine was when I first met you.
Perhaps I can give to them what you so generously gave to me!
Savannah7GerlichtRecruitment___nodes[12]: Well done, {0}. Perhaps Gelricht will find peace in service to the community.
And the good deeds keep rackin’ up!
Keeping your admirers all in one place, {0}? An interesting strategy…
With Gelricht’s life in balance, perhaps he can use his skills to benefit his neighbors.
I think a few statues of the Bun’s Guns would liven Katarina right up!
Thou deservest nought but a statue in thine honour, my {0|liege|lord|lady}.
Does the little hero want their own statue?~ How amusing… Though I do admit, you might look good in granite.
A little push down the right path goes a long way! Be well, Gelricht.
If he needs help cartin’ supplies back, I can round up a few lads!
Oooh, a mason setting up shop sounds wonderful! Think he’d make one of me?~
Are you telling me we’ll have to talk to this guy whenever we need supplies…?
Would you stop bein’ such a good influence, boss? It’s kinda crampin’ my style!
If only finding my own purpose in life would be so easy…
Wow, paying it forward actually works sometimes! -happy sigh-

Savannah 7 Grass Sheep Herder__line_27: ShettleHerder := Ah! Hello there stranger, may I ask what you’re doing here?
Savannah 7 Grass Sheep Herder__line_28: <PLAYERNAME> := Frontiersman stuff mostly, assessing the area, collecting some resources, beating up poachers. You need anything friend?

PoacherTrap8___nodes[0]._stepChain[3]._d: This trap is closest to their base. I guess they like this design?
PoacherTrap8___nodes[0]._stepChain[4]._d: Before you stand two things. One, most prominently, is a cage suspended in the air by a pulley system. Second, is a well-drawn catfolk posing beneath the cage in a very ‘come hither’ type of way.
PoacherTrap8___nodes[0]._stepChain[5]._d: I wonder if this is only to catch catfolk… Or does it work on Centaurs too?
PoacherTrap8___nodes[2]._stepChain[2]._c: It’s clearly made for catfolk, any centaur small enough to get trapped in it would just be a bonus.
The question is who else would? Maybe we can set this up in cloverton, and see who falls for it?
The centaur I’ve met usually like strong partners, but for some I bet a catfolk is fine too.
The heart wants what it wants. I’m sure some centaur would be persuaded, unfortunately.
-sigh-... I’m going to need a cold shower after this, {0}.
You’d be surprised who a centaur with beer goggles wouldn’t flirt with.
Lust is a dangerous thing, sometimes more literally than others.
-ahem- Right, well the trick line is probably hidden right around here…… (Why do I feel like his eyes are followin’ me…)
Just get it over with. We’re here to get rid of these, not entertain the poacher’s thoughts…
I’d be surprised if anyone fell for it.
I mean, he’s a pretty handsome fella. I bet it works on Centaur too.
If they can fit in that cage. If it fell on me it’s more likely ta break than me head!
I mean, I’m not falling for it, but he is kinda cute!
I have not the eyen for such questions of the heart… or loins…
PoacherTrap8___nodes[2]._stepChain[3]._d: I think later we might need to discuss what bait is, but first…
PoacherTrap8___nodes[3]._stepChain[0]._d: Ah, I think I see what I need to do, just a swift….
PoacherTrap8___nodes[4]._stepChain[4]._d: You bring your shovel down, cutting through the trigger mechanism hidden in front of the fake catfolk. The cage rattles and then comes down with a heavy clang.
However, the bars hit with such force that they pop out of their slots and the entire cage deconstructs itself.
PoacherTrap8___nodes[4]._stepChain[5]._d: … Well, at least no one was hurt, though whoever made this probably should tighten their bolts up more…
Savannah 8 Trade Sequence Chest King__li: // x - hasn't started quest                                       = ISACTIVE false HASFULFILLED false HASCOMPLETED false

ChestKing := Oh, if it isn’t <PLAYERNAME>! How do you do?
You can’t help but notice when the King speaks, there’s a certain ‘rusty’ accent coming from his body.
<PLAYERNAME> := Mr. Chest King, are you... Well?
ChestKing := Now that you mention it. I HAVE been feeling like my hinges are getting rusty.
<PLAYERNAME> := Do you need me to find some oil?
ChestKing := Sea Kings! No {lad/lass/old sport}, I need them replaced wholesale... Tell you what, if you find some suitable replacements, I promise to reward you handsomely for your endeavors.
<PLAYERNAME> := Well, I’m not gonna pass up on that, I’ll look around and find you some hinges!
ChestKing := Fair <PLAYERNAME>, do find some suitable replacement hinges, I promise to reward you handsomely for your endeavors.
You remember the ornamental hinges you traded from the Centaur earlier.
<PLAYERNAME> := Here are the new hinges, Your Majesty.
ChestKing := Bravo, {lad/lass/old sport} just hand them over to me and I shall do the rest!
You toss the hinges into the King. For a moment there’s sounds of groaning, then a metallic POP as he coughs up the old hinges on the ground.
ChestKing := I say, sorry for the display there, but I feel a million leagues better now! And as for your reward-
Popping his ‘head’ open, the King tosses an object towards you.
ChestKing := Here you go! This belonged to one of my most fair mistresses, but I feel as if you could use it more.
<PLAYERNAME> := Thank you Your Majesty, it’s been an honor.
ChestKing := Hello again {lad/lass/old sport}, have you been enjoying that hair comb?
<PLAYERNAME> := Of course! Thank you once again for your generosity!

Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_10: // Savannah 8 Poacher Island Conclusion can jump here, so keep the portraits hidden because of the obnoxious cut
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_36: Sieger := My tent is yours if you need it, as well as my company, if you want it.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_52: Sieger := Really? I was hoping you'd say yes. Then if you'd follow me.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_57: <PLAYERNAME> := I'm flattered Sieger, but sorry I'm not interested.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_58: Sieger := No harm in offering, and no slight in being turned down. Until next time, my friend.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_62: Sieger := <PLAYERNAME>! Good to see a friend in a place like this.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_63: <PLAYERNAME> := Sieger! How is everything down here?
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_64: Sieger := Better now that you're here. We've had a spot of trouble, but its nothing we can't deal with. A Union Marine doesn't know the meaning of the word 'retreat'.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_65: <PLAYERNAME> := It hasn't dampened your spirits any.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_66: Sieger := Of course, it would take more than a few poachers, sky pirates, monsters and homonculi to do that. It would take at least, well, three times their number at least.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_67: <PLAYERNAME> := Never one to lose your nerve, are you?
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_68: Sieger := Yes, but with that said we could still use some help. The camp is solid, the men did a good job throwing it together, but we are a tad...well...cut off down here. If you've talked to the doctor you'll know we have our share of wounded, and our supplies are limited as well. We're stretched rather thin.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_69: <PLAYERNAME> := It's a hard spot to be in, even for a hardened bluecloak.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_70: Sieger := That's why I thought I'd ask, if you're willing. I would handle the sky pirates down here myself but-
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_80: <PLAYERNAME> := You have to protect your men, and you can't be everwhere at once.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_83: "I can handle the pirates, count me in!":
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_89: <PLAYERNAME> := Count me in, I'm always up for taking down some pirate scum.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_90: Sieger := Excellent! If there's one thing I've learned about you, <PLAYERNAME>, its the righteous sense of justice which beats inside you. But justice is only a pretty word if it isn't backed with steel.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_91: <PLAYERNAME> := Just leave them to me, Sieger.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_95: <PLAYERNAME> := Sorry Sieger, but I can't deal with it right now.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_96: Sieger := Damn! Still, if you change your mind you know where to find us. We won't be going anywhere, not any time soon. Best of luck to you <PLAYERNAME>.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_101: <PLAYERNAME> := How are you really doing Sieger? How are you holding up?
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_102: Sieger := Honestly? I'm doing the best I can with what I have but...I don't have very much. A brave face and a bold voice only go so far. I'm confident we can resist an attack, but the longer we're trapped here, with limited supplies and wounded Marines...
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_103: <PLAYERNAME> := I understand. Don't forget to take care of yourself too Sieger. If you don't rest you're no good to anyone.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_104: Sieger := I appreciate the concern, but don't worry about me. You've a good heart, <PLAYERNAME>. I've always liked that about you.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_107: // bridging dialogue between the first encounter to the completion dialogue
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_109: Sieger := It looks like you've already pushed the pirate forces back!
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_112: // talking to NPC anew, but with quest criteria fulfilled
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_114: Sieger := <PLAYERNAME>! You're back. And in one piece, thank Bray.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_118: <PLAYERNAME> := Did you really think a pack of deckscrapers could stop me?
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_119: Sieger := Not in the least, though I must confess I was a little concerned. Anything can happen in the thick of battle, even to someone as valiant as you.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_120: <PLAYERNAME> := Nothing to worry about. At least you won't be having any trouble from the pirates down here again.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_121: Sieger := Hell, now maybe I can relax. You have my thanks, and more if you're interested.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_127: Do you want a ride back to town?
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_138: <PLAYERNAME> := I think I've done just about everything, guess I should head home.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_140: Sieger := You've done well, I think you've earned yourself a chance to rest. Don't worry, we'll be able to clean up here. Haha!
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_146: <PLAYERNAME> := I'm going to explore the Savannah for just a while longer.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_148: Sieger := I'll be here for a bit in case you change your mind, else i'll see you back in Cloverton.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_150: //cutscene ends, player can continue moving around the camp.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_152: // todo if selecting yes, transition to cloverton
Savannah 8 Union Camp Sieger__line_153: // todo if selecting no, just let the player through - sieger & co will clean up after scene change

character alias Handler Plankton Pen Handler
Handler := I hope you're taking good care of your plankton!
Handler := My plans, my life's work, swiped by those...those...THOSE BLACKGUARDS!
<PLAYERNAME> := Easy there, what exactly was stolen? Maybe we can help.

Handler := Yes, maybe you can. You're <PLAYERNAME>, aren't you? Well I'm a plankton breeder, and I had just finished construction plans for a new breeding pen until those...those...THOSE INFERNAL MARAUDERS stole them!
<PLAYERNAME> := That's rough, is there anything we can do about it?
Handler := You could recover my plans from those...those...THOSE SADISTIC BRUTES. If you could recover my plans I'd gladly reward you.

Handler := Why I breed plankton of course! Plankton breeding is the new big thing for the frontier, and I was all set up to start. My plans would have revolutionized plankton breeding as we understand it. Until those...those...THOSE MALICIOUS DECKSCRAPERS stole my plans!
<PLAYERNAME> := You feel really strongly about this.
Handler := Of course, how would you feel if someone stole your life's work?
Handler := Wonderful! I'll be waiting here.
<PLAYERNAME> := I don't know if we'll have the time...
Handler := Don't say that! Oh I can't bare to hear it...!
Handler := You're back! Did you find the construction plans?
Handler := Did you already find the construction plans?
Handler := You're back! Did you find the construction plans?
Handler := Oh thank you, oh bless you, oh happy day! My life's work is rescued from the hands of those...those...THOSE...ah but they've been dealt with now...
Handler := Words can't express how grateful I am but...here, take this as a sign of my gratitude.
Handler := Your very own plankton-handling gloves! Oh what joys you'll discover through plankton breeding. Your life is about to change completely! Why I remember before plankton came into my life I-
<PLAYERNAME> := Uh, thanks! But I think Seiger needs to see me.
Handler := But there's so much to learn, all about-
Savannah 8 Lost Plankton__line_5: You see a small plankton milling about the cave in a very subdued fashion. Your farmer senses begin to tingle, almost sensing that this plankton is in need of a companion. It would be cruel to leave it like this, so you pick it up and swear that you will find it a friend.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_6: You see two women chattering away nearby, you're not one to eavesdrop, however it seems that their conversation was centered around landmarks that were strewn throughout the savannah.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_8: <PLAYERNAME> := Oh, excuse me, I don't mean to bother either of you, but do you two know the way around down here?
Savannah 8 Heather__line_9: Tatoma := Well maybe not the full way around down here. We're tourists.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_10: Heather := Sightseers, we explore where we can, and take in some of the landmarks we've seen.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_16: Heather:= Oh hey, it's you again, got some more questions?
Savannah 8 Heather__line_24: "Tell me about a random landmark you've seen!":
Savannah 8 Heather__line_27: "Heather, if you don't mind me asking, are you a witch?":
Savannah 8 Heather__line_30: "Tatoma, if it's not too sensitive a subject, are you a... Cyclops?":
Savannah 8 Heather__line_33: "Any idea of where I can get some help?":
Savannah 8 Heather__line_36: "Nothing for now, thank you for your time.":
Savannah 8 Heather__line_41: Heather := Oh we've seen plenty, right Tatty?
Savannah 8 Heather__line_42: Tatoma := Absolutely, there's a lot to look at on the way down, like...
Savannah 8 Heather__line_52: Heather := Like the Centaur Beer? Yeah, that was some really strong stuff, that was back up a ways though right? I heard that <PLAYERNAME> helped brew it too!
Savannah 8 Heather__line_53: Tatoma := Yeah! Hey <PLAYERNAME> think you can make some more for us?
Savannah 8 Heather__line_54: <PLAYERNAME> := Not without some very specialized equipment I can't.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_55: Heather:= Oh well, we'll just have to hope they have more on our way back up.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_60: Heather := There are some statues that look eerily like you <PLAYERNAME> a few levels up.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_61: <PLAYERNAME> := Oh yeah! I posed recently for the Mason to help clear away their Mason's... block.... It's like writer's block, but for stone, I think.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_62: Tatoma := They look really good though.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_69: Heather := Oh yeah, I remember that! The entrance was all rubbled up by the time we got there, good thing too, I got a bad feeling about that place....
Savannah 8 Heather__line_75: Heather := Right right! I remember the one like... Directly above us somewhere? I'd have loved to explore more, but... Well, we had... Other places to be, right?
Savannah 8 Heather__line_81: Heather := Getting down here was totally worth it though, all the sightseeing we did, I'm really impressed by the savannah.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_85: Heather := I am! I'm a proud student of the Silentville House of Witchcraft!
Savannah 8 Heather__line_86: <PLAYERNAME> := I can't say that I am familiar...
Savannah 8 Heather__line_87: Heather := I'm not surprised, considering other, more... austere academies. We're relatively new, and relatively niche. We study and use the ley lines that monsters-
Savannah 8 Heather__line_89: Heather := -other beings use. You see, there are entire types of magic only available to those who try to draw on the ley lines, and I am down here to study the ones unique to this area.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_90: <PLAYERNAME> := Fascinating, though... Aren't witches supposed to have grey skin?
Savannah 8 Heather__line_91: Heather := We do! But only at higher levels of magic and only if we stop being able to maintain our own magical equilibrium, I don't know much about the process myself, so you'd have to ask a more learned witch than I.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_95: Tatoma := It's not a sensitive subject at all! Yes, I'm a cyclops.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_97: Tatoma := In my head? Oh! Glad you asked. You see, there is a rare mutation in Cyclopses, where our eyes grow in our heads, as opposed to our stomachs or chests, it's why I'm studying at Helix.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_98: <PLAYERNAME> := Helix? Isn't that school super expensive?
Savannah 8 Heather__line_99: Tatoma := Oh absolutely, but fun fact, if you're the subject OF a study being conducted by them, you get free tuition for as long as they study you, and it's going to take them longer to figure out my eye than it will be for me to get my doctorate~.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_103: Tatoma := Well, if you're needing work, I think Digger has been complaining about wanting to go to the surface, but being stuck down here, you might want to ask her what's up.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_104: Heather := There's also a mercenary around that had a run-in with poachers recently, he might be able to give you some advice about their leader.
Savannah 8 Heather__line_109: Tatoma := Very happy, please come and find us if you need our assistance.
Savannah 8 Poacher Island Blueprint Plan: You see what looks like a complex but mostly mundane blueprint for fabricating a Plankton pen.
<PLAYERNAME> := Hmm, If I'm reading this right...this should be everything I'd need to raise plankton on my farm! Well, once it's built anyway.
You copy the parchment down in your journal.
Savannah 8 Poacher Island Sieger Walk Of: Sieger := <PLAYERNAME>! Did you find anything from your search of the camp?
Sieger := Keep looking for info - I'll prevent anyone or anything from interfering with your search.
Savannah 8 Sex Cave Cat__line_2: // when interacting with the generic Catgirl
Savannah 8 Sex Cave Cat__line_3: Approaching the Catgirl, she takes the valuable time out of grooming herself to look up at you. Almost appearing as every other Catgirl you’ve ever encountered before.
Savannah 8 Sex Cave Cat__line_10: <PLAYERNAME>:= Hey, have I ever seen you before?
Savannah 8 Sex Cave Cat__line_11: Catgirl := Mrrrrw? No, no, I mean… Possibly not, I don’t think I’ve seen you around before. Would you like to hop in the pool with me and become familiar though~?
Savannah 8 Sex Cave Cat__line_18: "Maybe another time! I’m feeling really busy now.":
Savannah 8 Sex Cave Cat__line_24: <PLAYERNAME> := Maybe another time! I’m feeling really busy now.
Savannah 8 Sex Cave Cat__line_29: Catgirl := Awww, well, come around again and I can show you my favorite way to splash around~.

Savannah 8 Alpha Clash Stonebreaker__lin: //To be played when interacting with the Stonebreaker Leader at the Savannah Breeding Grounds
The Stonebreaker kneels down on all four hooves, catching himself with a muscular, outstretched arm.
<PLAYERNAME> := G-good! Wow, that was a tough fight! So, you'll agree to whatever I decide?
Stonebreaker := Yes, we will abide by your decision.
Stonebreaker := I was wrong to judge you a spring rain, you are a mountain stream, able to make paths through rock.
<PLAYERNAME> := Thank you, I'll be ready to make a decision in just a moment!
Despite your best efforts, the centaur warriors force you to surrender!
Stonebreaker := You expected to best us? The earth hardly yields to your hoofsteps!
Stonebreaker := Come back when you're stronger. My warriors could always use the practice, Harhorhor!
He turns to face the Denmother again, stomping his hoof.
You approach The Stonebreaker. His crystal horn gleams, as he tilts his head down to look at you.
Stonebreaker := Who are you, name yourself or be trampled.
Stonebreaker := State your business, or make your leave like the transient dust.
<PLAYERNAME> := I'm here to... to stake my own claim to these breeding grounds!
The stonebreaker stares for a moment, and then laughs.
Stonebreaker := Harhorhor! That, is funny... And what purpose would you have with these grounds? You don't look very fertile.
<PLAYERNAME> := I-I'm not here for my own business. I'm here to resolve this dispute, with a challenge!
Stonebreaker := You seek to challenge our best warriors? Horhahhah! You realize you will be fighting me, my brother, and our bravest kin. Are you ready to accept such a challenge?
Stonebreaker := I admire your spirit, small warrior, but a mountain will not yield to a light spring rain. Brother, kin, let us meet this challenge!
<PLAYERNAME> := On second thought, I might need a bit more time.
Stonebreaker := Take as much time as you need, but remember, with each passing year, a mountain grows, not shrinks.

Savannah 8 Digger__line_31: Digger := Well look who it is, need a place to rest?
Savannah 8 Digger__line_41: Digger := You can have it whenever you like~
Savannah 8 Digger__line_56: Digger := You're lucky you're so damn cute. Fine then, I'll be your "hot mole".
Savannah 8 Digger__line_61: <PLAYERNAME> := Sorry friendo, but I got too much on my mind to be gettin all frisky.
Savannah 8 Digger__line_65: A monotone voice speaks up from what you had first assumed to be a dusty fur coat with legs.
Savannah 8 Digger__line_66: Digger := Eh? Careful about what holes ya go crawlin' into. You're just as like to get a warm welcome as a pickaxe to the back of your noggin. Lucky you're wearin' proper Union garb.
Savannah 8 Digger__line_67: <PLAYERNAME> := Oh! I didn't know there were such things as mole monsters!
Savannah 8 Digger__line_68: Digger := Ain't a damn mole, or a monster. Now ya done bein' a clod or got somethin' else "funny" ta say before I change my mind about the pickaxe to your noggin?
Savannah 8 Digger__line_70: Digger := Actually... You see, this is the basecamp my friends and I use on our way back up from minin'. Now, it's been a while since I was able to see town, and while I'd LOVE to keep minin' for valuables-
Savannah 8 Digger__line_80: Digger := Should someone clear out all tha metal 'n' stone chunks from this here part o' the Savannah.
Savannah 8 Digger__line_84: "I think I'll head back to the surface instead...":
Savannah 8 Digger__line_88: Digger := I'd be -really- greatful... Greatful enough to give a -reward-.
Savannah 8 Digger__line_90: Your eyes slide down Digger’s body for just a moment, long enough that they give you a languid smirk.
Savannah 8 Digger__line_95: Digger := Alright then, ya know where ta find me.
Savannah 8 Digger__line_99: Digger := Well look who it is, need a place to rest?
Savannah 8 Digger__line_107: Digger := My home away from home. I didn’t expect to be playin’ host but with the Poachers running amok and rilin’ up the monsters? Don’t really got much of a choice.
Savannah 8 Digger__line_108: Digger := Glad I carved out as much room as I did. You might be a clod, but you can come rest here if you need a break from fightin’.
Savannah 8 Digger__line_111: // bridging dialogue between the first encounter to the completion dialogue
Savannah 8 Digger__line_113: Digger := 'Ey, looks like you've been a big help and already dug up all the rocks 'round these parts.

Savannah 8 Digger__line_118: Digger:= So my buddies tell me you've wrapped up mining the nodes, thanks for your help, really...
Savannah 8 Digger__line_122: Digger := And as for your reward...
Savannah 8 Union Camp Card-playing Marin: Walking up to a Marine, you see him idly flipping through the cards in his deck and muttering to himself.
Marine := Huh? Oh! You’re <PLAYERNAME> ain’t ya? Well I’m just passin’ tha time… Tell me, do you know how to play Skipper?
<PLAYERNAME> := I ah… Hmm… I don’t think so.
Marine := Well I know all about it! Want me to teach ya? Won’t take long, I promise.
Marine := Well it’s simple, in Skipper, each player gets dealt two cards by the dealer, one face-up, one face-down. The goal of the game is to hit the number twenty-one without going over.

Marine := The trick to it is, if you think you have a bad hand, or want to mess with the other players, you can ‘Skip’ and be passed over two fresh cards, you don’t know what’s on them, but if you’re gonna bust, it’s better to go with the unknown.
Marine := Besides that? Highest number wins. There are a few variations of it, like Pirate Skip, or Kingdom Siege, but they’re harder to set up.
Marine := Understood, if ya ever find yourself with some downtime, I’m almost always here.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_5: Mercenary := Hah! I knew you'd be a tenacious one the moment we first met on that whale bound for Cloverton. I do have to admit, didn't expect to see you this far into these islands.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_6: Mercenary := Glad you were smart enough to bring some friends with you. You're never too big to ask for back up when you need it. That aside, what's got you so driven to come all the way out here?
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_7: <PLAYERNAME> := I'm trying to put a stop to the poachers that are giving the Union trouble and riling up the local monsters.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_8: Mercenary := Hmm, I see. While I can't lend a hand, what with my duties and all, is there any other way I can help?
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_9: <PLAYERNAME> := Do you know anything about them? They go by Sting and Prism. They're the ones that have been poaching the monsters here.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_10: Mercenary := Prism and Sting, eh? Yeah I know a thing or two about them.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_11: Mercenary := Never ran into ‘em personally, but I've got merc' buddies that have. Which one you want to know about first?
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_19: "Hey so... Mind showing me what's under that armor~?":
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_22: "Tell me about the tall poacher; Sting":
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_30: Mercenary := Prism, short fella, reptile that has a knack for making things go "BOOM". So don't let his size fool ya, he's a tricky sort that takes full advantage of catching folks off guard.  Also heard he can take a punch, so don't expect to knock him on his ass easily.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_31: Mercenary := An ogre mercenary I've worked with, ya know ogres right? Big lugs? Always needing a snack? Right, anyways he was out on a caravan guard job. Easy enough stuff so long as you're taking the ones using Lower Sky routes.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_32: Mercenary := It was towards the tail end of the caravan's route when their scout relayed sighting of a beast in the lurks. Any caravan head knows to hunker down and keep quiet.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_33: Mercenary := So during the impromptu downtime, the ogre fella takes opportunity to have an early 3rd lunch.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_34: Mercenary := Turns his back for a moment, looks back, and sure enough, his grub's gone! Any dolt will tell ya, you-do-not steal an ogre's food. So he's in a right rage at that point, starts sniffin and stompin' around for the culprit.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_35: Mercenary := Spies some short green fella he ain't seen before. Smacking his lips and licking his fingers. Smellin' just like the meal that went missing.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_36: Mercenary := Ain't hard to imagine he'd go confront the thievin' bastard. What's mad is that the little bastard went and admitted it, then taunted him about it! "First come, first serve!". After that line,he said he gave Prism a dead-on thwack with a club and he took it like he were a cyclops!
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_37: Mercenary := My acquaintance said, the next thing he knew his ears were ringing. He couldn't keep a grip on his weapon and was too damn winded to stand proper. Seems he got hit with a pair of explosives.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_38: Mercenary := Based on all that, the best I can say? Won't matter how good your defenses or constitution is. Knock that bastard on his ass before he knocks you on yours. Got anyone good at knockin' folks dizzy in your corner?
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_43: Mercenary := Now, Sting? I know a bit more about that one. Was at a tavern once, tying one on with a few buddies after finishing a job. About three tankards in, we peer down from the 2nd floor of the tavern. Some drunk sods were havin' an argument with a scorpiones lookin' woman. Probably something about payment, was a bit too far up and buzzed to hear proper.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_44: Mercenary := So we keep watching and sure enough the fellas stand up, looking like they're going to have a go at this one woman. Now we saw her walk in by herself, so what happened next was a sight. Without skippin' a beat, she turns at the bar and says. "Well, is anyone goings to be helping a lady out?~"
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_45: Mercenary := Now, I didn't see that woman cast a spell or hold up some crazy device. But half the bar got up and pummeled the poor louts. After that she stepped over to the one that'd been makin' the most ruckus. Stared at ‘im smilin and lifted her tail.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_46: Mercenary := Now I shouldn't need to tell ya, when monster kin with stingers start waving their tails in your face, best be ready for a world of hurt.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_47: Mercenary := She barely touched him with that stinger of hers and his face went this sickly pale purple. Flopped over on his side groanin' in agony. Wasn't our place to get involved and wasn't a Union town we were in. Poor sod was probably groanin' and moanin' for a few days.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_48: Mercenary := My advice on Sting? Have a healer handy on you, or keep some good rations handy - obvious but some folks take a bit of patching up for granted when they're in the thick of it. She's also a poacher, so goin' of the way she handled random bar-goers? There's a fair chance she's broken in and tamed some of those monsters they've got.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_53: Mercenary := Oh~? Been eyeing me up have you? Well I'm on break right now. if you'd like, we can take a bit to get to know one-another better?
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_69: Mercenary:= Delightful, let's just scoot over to a more private area~
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_74: Mercenary := No? I understand. I'll be here for a bit longer until I get new orders.
Savannah 8 Mercenary Sex__line_78: Mercenary := Best of luck out there, kid!
Savannah 8 Poacher Island Workbench__lin: You start to look over the papers, but it becomes apparent that they consist primarily of poorly thought out inventions and traps.
<PLAYERNAME> := These look terrible, and this one is just called "Rope can?"
Savannah 8 Poacher Island Crate__line_3: You spot a container that has been adorned luxuriously. Metallic paint decorates the exterior, and a brilliant monogrammed 'R' adorns the side.
Savannah 8 Poacher Island Crate__line_4: <PLAYERNAME> := These don’t look like the other crates around here. That’s really fancy...

Savannah 8 Kaga__line_17: Kaga := Hail, Union member. Do not be surprised, word travels fast here. I know of you, and your deeds. You are very brave, to venture so deep into the dungeons. Few of your kind make it as far down here.
Savannah 8 Kaga__line_18: Kaga := I am Kaga, keeper of the Centaur history. The mural before us is one such record of our kind. Come, stay and listen to my tales. I can assure you the experience will be rewarding in more ways that one.
Savannah 8 Kaga__line_22: Kaga := Come, stay and listen to my tales. You will find your time among the carvings will avail thought and action alike.
Savannah 8 Kaga__line_31: "I have time, tell me about your history.":
Savannah 8 Kaga__line_38: Kaga := I am Kaga, lore-keeper of the Centaurs. Generations have we passed down our stories so that we will not forget the triumphs and indignities of our ancestors. This duty is passed honorably from lore-keeper to lore-keeper, while I am the only one for now, there will come a day when I pass on the mantle to the young so I can take a well-deserved rest.
Savannah 8 Kaga__line_39: Kaga gives a gentle smile at the thought.
Savannah 8 Kaga__line_44: Without looking, Kaga makes a sweeping gesture to the mural.
Savannah 8 Kaga__line_45: Kaga := This is one of the prides of the Centaurs, a mural that visually depicts our history. While I can no longer see it, I still recall every brush stroke vividly, every little detail, down to the splotches of paint. It will be re-painted when a new lore-keeper takes the mantle, so that we may not lose even a single detail of our history.
Savannah 8 Kaga__line_50: Kaga := Thank you for your interest, I will do my best to give you the abridged version of our history now... Let’s begin.
Savannah 8 Kaga__line_55: Kaga takes a deep breath and opens his milky eyes, his voice resonating in a way only a person practiced at storytelling can.
Savannah 8 Kaga__line_57: // move chars off to the side so we can see the Mural
Savannah 8 Kaga__line_64: Kaga := Long, long ago, when the ground beneath our feet was created, and the stars were placed in the skies… There were the Tyrants.
Savannah 8 Kaga__line_65: Kaga := They were being of unbridled power, and their idlest wonts were carried out regardless of the effects it had on those beneath them.. And there were many beneath them. Humans were their slaves, legions dedicated to carrying out their whims, while monsters were created in their image, in some perverse form of vanity.
Savannah 8 Kaga__line_66: Kaga := For eons all of us suffered, that was.. Until the Wizards arrived. They were the unifying force behind the humans, rallying them in uncountable numbers, and we followed their example.
Savannah 8 Kaga__line_67: Kaga := What followed was nothing short of a slaughter. For every Tyrant we felled, we lost scores, but we did not falter, it was only through our cooperation that we eventually watched the last Tyrant become one with the night sky.
Savannah 8 Kaga__line_68: Kaga := When the war was over, some stayed behind, seeking to remain under the banner of unity, but others, like the Centaurs, could not remain with their comrades, we are still of a kind, deep down, but the ways of humans and wizards are not our ways, and so we parted in peace.

DenMother := Why if you DID think, you wouldn't have tried to make off with all those nice things - and I wouldn't have to keep you here as an example!
"So how do I get you to give me that guy?":
DenMother := Oh I don't know, I'm as fine as any feline fit to fuss but I do confess to needing something to spruce up my look...
<PLAYERNAME> := So find you some kind of accessory so you look nicer?
<PLAYERNAME> := Lemme see what I can do.
DenMother := Don't be afraid to ask me questions~
You approach the Den Mother. The captive pirate looks tired and defeated.
DenMother := My, what a positively fine fragrance.
You show her the perfect luminescent flower and she takes it from your hands with a careful precise motion, in a few moments she's woven it into her hair.
DenMother2 := I'll be havin' to visit Cloverton to have that Mandragora fella' preserve this ,but you done good. You can have this dumb thief, if you want him.
The Pirate somehow manages not to burst into tears as he runs away from the mistress of the catfolk.
While the Den Mother is busy preening herself, you notice something small, dark and gleaming had lain on the ground of the cave floor where the pirate was cornered.
The Den Mother is looking into the water to check her reflection, too ensorcelled by her appearance to notice you.

You can see the feline matron toying with her hair and sharpening her claws. Absent the pirate captive she's taken to using errant bits of junk to test the sharpness of her claws. You're pretty sure she's sliced a glass bottle clean in half.
You choose to leave before you become a volunteer for whatever she has planned.
Savannah 8 Digger's Home__line_2: Entering the recessed entrance just behind the rock formation brings you into the cave. Guided down by a run of ladders.  To your surprise, rather than a dusty crate strawn hole in the wall, you’re greeted by a proper hide away.
Savannah 8 Digger's Home__line_3: A Union colored carpet with a short ramp way leading up from it to a series of book and scroll cases. Beneath that an assortment of rations and equipment with a makeshift counter for preparing meals. Even a furnace and bathtub towards the back! A cozy place of respite from poachers and wild monsters.
Savannah 8 Pirate Camp Gates__line_3: character alias Captain Pirate Camp Captain
Savannah 8 Pirate Camp Gates__line_18: Captain := Looks like yer wantin' ta go through our gates! But that's a big no-can-do!
Savannah 8 Pirate Camp Gates__line_19: <PLAYERNAME>:= Why? Do I need to fold you into a pretzel to get inside?
Savannah 8 Pirate Camp Gates__line_20: Captain := What? N-nooooooo. I'm a... A... Pacifist! I don't fight, i'll let ya in.. IF ya do something fer me.
Savannah 8 Pirate Camp Gates__line_21: <PLAYERNAME> := What do you need me to do?
Savannah 8 Pirate Camp Gates__line_22: Captain := Mah best matey was MINDING HIS OWN BUSINESS an' got snatched up by dem monsters an' dragged off to their caves. Ya bring him back, an' I'll open the gates.
Savannah 8 Pirate Camp Gates__line_23: <PLAYERNAME> := Alright, alright, I’ll go get ‘em for ya.
Savannah 8 Pirate Camp Gates__line_28: Captain := I'll let ya in, if you find mah friend. Got snatched up by dem monsters an' dragged off to their caves. Ya bring him back, an' I'll open the gates.
Savannah 8 Pirate Camp Gates__line_36: Captain := Yah found mah buddy an' everything!
Savannah 8 Pirate Camp Gates__line_37: Pirate := Heeeeeyyyyyy *hic* Look whosh back~! Ya’ll are awlright in mah booksh.
Savannah 8 Pirate Camp Gates__line_38: Looking over, the recently-freed Pirate seems to have dipped into the booze and is swaying on his feet.
Savannah 8 Pirate Camp Gates__line_39: Pirate := Assesh ash far ash dah eye can shee...
Savannah 8 Pirate Camp Gates__line_40: Captain := Dun mind 'im, he's been like dat since he got back! Now then, ya wanna go through? Ya get ta go through!
Savannah 8 Pirate Camp Gates__line_42: Captain := An' dere ya go! Good as me word! Can't promise the rest o' me crew will be too kind, so watch yer step.
Savannah 8 Pirate Camp Gates__line_43: The gates move on unseen mechanisms as they slide open.

At the end of things you are left with a joined plankton, so good on you!

Savannah 8 Union Camp Doctor__line_36: Doctor := We're always running out of medical supplies. If you find any out in the Savannah, deliver them to me and i'll make it worth your while.

Savannah 8 Union Camp Doctor__line_43: Doctor := Wounded. We've got a mess of wounded marines back here and not enough supplies to go around. If we don't do something about it soon...
Savannah 8 Union Camp Doctor__line_44: <PLAYERNAME> := How can I help? If there's anything I can do, just ask.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Doctor__line_45: Doctor := The problem is a lack of medical supplies. We're patching these kids together with tape. There should be some supplies still out there, if we could get our hands on them my patients would have a fighting chance.

Savannah 8 Union Camp Doctor__line_65: Doctor := Don't take too long. The longer this drags out, well...
Savannah 8 Union Camp Doctor__line_66: <PLAYERNAME> := Gotcha. You can count on me.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Doctor__line_71: Doctor := Don't take too long. The longer this drags out, well...

Savannah 8 Union Camp Doctor__line_81: // bridging dialogue between the first encounter to the completion dialogue

Savannah 8 Union Camp Doctor__line_93: Doctor := And not a moment too soon! There's kids who'll be making it home now thanks to you. Here, take this. You've earned it.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Doctor__line_95: Doctor := Damn straight I'm sure! Last thing we need is you winding up back here too. Now scram, I've got work to do.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_3: With chiseled looks, white hair, and a muscular physique, the strapping man in front of you is quite the sight. While for a moment you'd think he was a prime specimen of a man, his onyx horns give away some other ancestry. He looks around, eyeing up the scenery around him before noticing you.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_15: Vitos := Hey there, <PLAYERNAME>. You look a bit out of place.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_24: "You look like you could use a local welcoming.":
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_26: "I'll do my best to help in any way I can.":
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_33: "I'll do my best to help in any way I can.":
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_39: Vitos := Hey there. You look a bit out of place.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_41: Vitos := Hah! Well, you and I both stick out quite a bit.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_42: He motions up to his horns
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_44: Vitos := Not that that's a bad thing though. What's your name?
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_55: "My name? This isn't some kind of bargain thing, is it?":
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_62: "<PLAYERNAME>, but what's a handsome guy like yourself go by?":
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_64: "My name? This isn't some kind of bargain thing, is it?":
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_68: <PLAYERNAME> := I go by <PLAYERNAME>. What about yourself?
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_69: Vitos := <PLAYERNAME>, that has a nice ring to it. You can call me Vitos.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_70: <PLAYERNAME> := Good to meet you then, Mr. Vitos.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_71: Vitos := Hmm, just Vitos works for me. Mr. Vitos just sounds... off.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_72: <PLAYERNAME> := Gotcha. So what brings you here, Vitos?
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_73: Vitos := Well, that's a good question actually...
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_77: <PLAYERNAME> := <PLAYERNAME>, but what's a handsome guy like yourself go by?
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_78: His smile widens slightly as he stretches.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_79: Vitos := For now, you can call me Vitos.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_81: Vitos := Well, let's see where things head.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_83: <PLAYERNAME> := Alright, I like the sound of that. So what brings someone like you around a spring like this?
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_84: His expression dampens, but he doesn't lose his demeanor.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_85: Vitos := I wish I had a fun answer for you, but I'm just as confused.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_89: <PLAYERNAME> := My name? This isn't some kind of bargain thing, is it?
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_90: He blinks for a moment, and then laughs.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_91: Vitos := Hahaha, no. I've got my own sort of contract going on with the big guys. I'm not really looking for that sort of thing.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_92: <PLAYERNAME> := Big guys? Well, in any case, you can call me <PLAYERNAME>.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_93: Vitos := <PLAYERNAME>, I like that. If it makes you feel more at ease, you can call me Vitos.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_94: <PLAYERNAME> := Vitos? That's not bad. So, Vitos, what brings you here?
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_95: Vitos := Well, now that I have your true name...
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_96: You feel the hairs rise up on the back of your neck.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_97: Vitos := Nah, I'm just getting a rise out of you. Actually, that's a good question you have there...
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_101: Vitos seems to be puzzling something.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_106: Vitos := I'm not exactly sure how I got here.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_107: <PLAYERNAME> := To this spring? Well, centaur pheromones can be pretty strong-
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_108: Vitos := No, what I mean is-
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_110: Vitos := I'm not sure how I got *here*. As in, all of this.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_113: Vitos := Yeah... One minute I'm in the castle's library, the next thing I know it all goes black... It's hard to remember after that.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_114: <PLAYERNAME> := I'm not sure about what kind of phenomenon could do that, but it sounds like you're a long way from home. Like, extra-planar-ly speaking.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_115: Despite the news, he doesn't seem that bothered.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_116: Vitos := Well, I'm sure it'll work out somehow. You can imagine my confusion though.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_117: <PLAYERNAME> := Oh, yeah. What a place to wake up too.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_118: Vitos := No kidding. I've been hoping someone could give me a hand figuring it out. Everyone seems a bit preoccupied though. Then your handsome face showed up.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_125: "Handsome? You've got chiseled looks like that, and you're calling me handsome?":
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_127: "Now that that's sorted out... You look like you could use a local welcoming.":
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_129: "I'll do my best to help in any way I can.":
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_133: <PLAYERNAME> := I hope that you'll be able to figure out what happened. I'll do my best to help in any way I can.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_134: Vitos := I appreciate it, but I think I'll be alright. I'll think of it as a bit of a vacation from my contractual obligations.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_135: <PLAYERNAME> := That's some impressive optimism, or abdication.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_136: Vitos := Whatever works. Right now, I think I'll hang around here for a bit. The scenery isn't bad.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_137: <PLAYERNAME> := I'll let you get back to ogling then, Vitos. Take care!
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_138: Vitos waves, looking back over to a group of centaurs and catfolk going at it. He might be here for a bit, but you get the feeling you'll see him around again sometime.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_142: <PLAYERNAME> := Handsome? You've got chiseled looks like that, and you're calling me handsome?
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_144: Vitos := What can I say, I have a soft spot for handsome little cherubic {guys/gals/people} like you.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_146: Vitos := I think I could use a bit of a workout. What do you say to the two of us in a little quiet spot here?
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_151: "I think I'll have to take a raincheck.":
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_159: <PLAYERNAME> := I think I'll have to take a raincheck.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_163: <PLAYERNAME> := Now that that's sorted out... You look like you could use a local welcoming.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_164: Vitos := Is that part of the local customs?
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_165: <PLAYERNAME> := If I say maybe, would that suffice?
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_167: Vitos := I don't think it matters either way. I'm up for some cardio, if you are.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_169: "I could use a good workout, or at least a good stretch.":
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_175: <PLAYERNAME> := On second thought, maybe another time.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_179: <PLAYERNAME> := I could use a good workout, or at least a good stretch.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_184: Vitos := Good, I like that. Why don't you and I head over to that quiet little pool over there?
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_189: Vitos := Humph. No harm, no foul. I'll just enjoy the scenery then.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_190: <PLAYERNAME> := I hope you see you around, though.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_191: Vitos := I'm sure you will. I have a habit of running into {guys/gals/people} like you.
Savannah 8 Vitos__line_192: Vitos waves, and turns to look back at the orgy going on. You get the feeling you'll probably see him again sometime.
Savannah 8 Sex Cave Stalker__line_3: Walking over, you spot a cat-woman whose eyes are fixed completely on you. On approach, her lips curl into a mischievous grin.
Savannah 8 Sex Cave Stalker__line_10: <PLAYERNAME> := Hey, is there uhm… Something I can help you with?
Savannah 8 Sex Cave Stalker__line_11: Stalker := Well if you walk on over here, I’ll show you ~exactly~ what you can do for me.

Savannah 8 Sex Cave Stalker__line_24: <PLAYERNAME> := Sorry, but there’s been an emergency and I have to get as far away from you as possible.

Savannah 8 Union Camp Cannoneer__line_2: Walking over, you hear the grumblings of the marine on the cannons.
Savannah 8 Union Camp Cannoneer__line_7: Marine := Bleedin' Titan, I can't BELIEVE they would just send a canon out here without a full crew!
Savannah 8 Union Camp Cannoneer__line_8: Marine := It takes at LEAST three bodies to run this thing, ya gotta load tha powder, load tha ball, light the fuse, let it fire, then cool it off!
Savannah 8 Union Camp Cannoneer__line_9: Marine := One person doing this will take all day!
Savannah 8 Union Camp Cannoneer__line_10: Marine := And that's if they have the powder measured out ALREADY!
Savannah 8 Union Camp Cannoneer__line_11: Marine := I want to know who thought a single person can work the cannon so I can put them in one and shoot them out!
Savannah 8 Trade Sequence Amber Mimic__l: Reaching down, you give the Amber Mimic a pat on its... Well, it’s not EXACTLY a head, but close enough.
So excited by the petting, the little creature gives you a reward in the form of coughing up a key.
